TV Series.title: The Book Group
TV Series.overview: An American in Glasgow hopes to make friends by starting a book club, which succeeds in bringing an unexpected collection of people into her life.

TV Series.title: The Goes Wrong Show
TV Series.overview: Based on the `The Play That Goes Wrong', the internationally successful, award-winning Mischief Theatre brand. `The Goes Wrong Show' is written by and star the original founding Mischief Theatre members: Henry Lewis, Jonathan Sayer, and Henry Shields alongside Nancy Zamit, Charlie Russell, Bryony Corrigan, Greg Tannahill, Dave Hearn and Chris Leask. With their unique brand of physical theatre, the Mischief team perform six brand new, hand-crafted, half hours of theatrical catastrophe in front of a live studio audience.

TV Series.title: Date My Dad
TV Series.overview: IMDB 7.1 rating - Ricky Cooper had the perfect life. A former professional baseball player, who was married to Isabella, the love of his life. Ricky's world comes crashing down when Isabella passes away leaving him to raise three daughters alone.

TV Series.title: Primo
TV Series.overview: From Mike Schur, Executive Producer of Parks and Recreation & The Good Place, and creator Shea Serrano. Primo is a coming-of-age comedy about Rafa Gonzales, a wide-eyed teenager, being raised by his mother Drea and his five overbearing uncles (Rollie, Mike, Ryan, Jay, and Mondo) as he balances college aspirations, societal expectations, and a hectic home life on the south side of San Antonio.

TV Series.title: The Weakest Link
TV Series.overview: Romesh Ranganathan is in charge of the strategic big money game show. Can the contestants create a chain of answers and avoid the boot?

TV Series.title: Halt and Catch Fire
TV Series.overview: Set in the early 1980s, Halt and Catch Fire dramatizes the personal computing boom through the eyes of a visionary, an engineer and a prodigyIt’s March 1985. More than a year has passed since Joe MacMillan (Lee Pace) set fire to a truck full of Cardiff Giant PCs, the last in a long string of destructive acts that burned the people that made the machine possible: Gordon Clark (Scoot McNairy), Donna Clark (Kerry Bishé), Cameron Howe (Mackenzie Davis) and John Bosworth (Toby Huss). The Giant is about to go the way of the dinosaur, like any number of personal computers to enter the market in the wake of IBM. The lesson is harsh but clear: in history, only the truly disruptive ideas are destined to matter.

TV Series.title: Dispatches from Elsewhere
TV Series.overview: Four diverse strangers searching for meaning stumble into a mysterious game hidden in plain sight.

TV Series.title: Hap and Leonard
TV Series.overview: After hearing about a sunken treasure from his ex-wife, two unlikely best friends set out to find it, but their plan is a lot easier said than done.

TV Series.title: Fear the Walking Dead
TV Series.overview: Companion series to the show `The Walking Dead', this dramatic thriller focuses on new characters and storylines. Set in Los Angeles, the show explores the very beginning of the plague that led to the zombie apocalypse depicted in `The Walking Dead'.

TV Series.title: TURN: Washington's Spies
TV Series.overview: A young farmer joins a group of childhood friends to form a spy network charged with sniffing out British military strategy and helping turn the tide of the American Revolution.

TV Series.title: Chasing the Rains
TV Series.overview: Track three wild matriarchs on the hunt for life-giving water during one of Kenya’s worst droughts. Trek alongside the Royals elephant clan, see wild dog Phoenix fend off wily hyenas, and watch cheetah Kuleta keep her cubs out of predators’ reach.

TV Series.title: Documentary Now!
TV Series.overview: Starring Fred Armisen (Portlandia) and Bill Hader (Barry), the Emmy Nominated Documentary Now! parodies the current obsession with documentaries featuring six different stories and stylistic approaches paying tribute to the doc format. Created by Seth Meyers (Late Night with Seth Meyers), Bill Hader and Fred Armisen.

TV Series.title: SisterS
TV Series.overview: Two women, one from Canada and the other from Ireland, discover they are half-sisters and embark on a road trip to find their alcoholic father, a trip that becomes a vessel for self-discovery filled with the macabre humour that can come with trauma.

TV Series.title: The Creep Tapes
TV Series.overview: The Creep Tapes is a collection of video tapes from the secret vault of the world's deadliest and most socially uncomfortable serial killer.

TV Series.title: Preacher
TV Series.overview: As our story inches closer to the finale, God's endgame for the universe begins to click into place. Trapped between heavenly prophecies, hellish prisons, and all-out nuclear war, Jesse, Tulip, and Cassidy make their bloody way to the Most High. Whether they can reach God in time — or whether all this carnage is part of His divine plan — will soon be revealed as Preacher barrels towards the end..

TV Series.title: Z Nation
TV Series.overview: Un equipo de héroes cotidianos debe transportar al único sobreviviente conocido del virus zombi al último laboratorio viral en funcionamiento.

TV Series.title: Parish
TV Series.overview: Haunted by the violent murder of his son, Gray Parish (Giancarlo Esposito, "Breaking Bad") finds himself thrust into an adrenaline-charged thrill ride through the criminal underworld. With no escape, the wrong way may be his only way out.

TV Series.title: Hell Motel
TV Series.overview: Hell Motel sees a group of 10 true crime obsessives invited to the opening of the newly renovated Cold River Motel, the site of a satanic mass murder. History repeats itself when the guests get stranded and start getting knocked off one by one.

TV Series.title: Horror's Greatest
TV Series.overview: Masters of horror celebrate the best of the genre: the essential giant monsters and must-see Stephen King adaptations, wildest Japanese horror films and funniest horror comedies--plus a deep-dive into films that embrace and subvert tropes & clichés.

TV Series.title: Manhattan
TV Series.overview: In 1943, a group of scientists arrive at a top-secret lab in Los Alamos, New Mexico for a fateful mission: to build the world’s first atomic bomb.

TV Series.title: Riviera
TV Series.overview: Riviera's highly anticipated return picks up in the immediate aftermath of the explosive first series finale, where the Clios family is faced with the tragic death of one of their own. Only this time, the blood is on the hands of our female protagonist, Georgina.

TV Series.title: The Walking Dead: World Beyond
TV Series.overview: Season two of The Walking Dead: World Beyond concludes the epic story of Iris, Hope, Elton, and Silas. As they face off against the mysterious Civic Republic Military, goals shift, bonds form and crumble, and innocence is both lost and found.

TV Series.title: The Secrets She Keeps
TV Series.overview: Two women have a chance encounter in a supermarket in an affluent Sydney suburb. They are the same age, both heavily pregnant and due at the same time. Meghan is an online influencer on the rise. Agatha works in the supermarket as a shelf stacker.

TV Series.title: Hemlock Grove
TV Series.overview: From executive producer Eli Roth (Hostel, Cabin Fever) comes the darkly poetic, moving and terrifying hit US series Hemlock Grove. Set deep in the heart of Pennsylvania, a gruesome murder sends shockwaves through the eccentric residents of the mysterious suburb.

TV Series.title: Los artistas: Primeros trazos
TV Series.overview: Cata, una experta en arte originaria de México, se encuentra en un bache personal y profesional. Por casualidad conoce a Yago, quien les vende baratijas a coleccionistas inexpertos.

TV Series.title: Island
TV Series.overview: Evil took its first step to destroy the world. On the mysterious island of Jeju Island, the gateway to this, "Van," a mix of human and monster, "Won Mi-ho," the one in the center of fate, and "Johan," the one who exercises God’s power, come together. A strange, yet captivating, action-packed exorcism fantasy in which they fight evil, share the fate of saving the world, and defy their own...

TV Series.title: She Walks Alone
TV Series.overview: Carla, maestra de preparatoria, investiga si las acusaciones de acoso contra Ricardo, su colega y amigo, son mentiras de Daniela, una alumna problema. La situación revive viejos traumas que creía olvidados. La justicia en el presente sanará su pasado.

TV Series.title: Lucha de Antojos
TV Series.overview: Ocho chefs de Ciudad de México compiten en la calle, para enfrentarse a los titanes de la comida callejera por el mejor antojo. Pelean el título de Lucha de antojos.

TV Series.title: Cualquier Parecido
TV Series.overview: En una entrega de premios, Carlota se reencuentra con JJ, su esposo, después de 6 meses de no verse. Ella intenta hablar con él para salvar el matrimonio y en vez de lograrlo, precipita el final.

TV Series.title: Un buen divorcio
TV Series.overview: Los abogados de divorcio Mónica y David viven su propio colapso matrimonial tras fuertes complicaciones en un caso y la revelación de una boda sorpresa. Mónica defiende a su cliente descubriendo oscuros secretos y David tiene un desliz inesperado.

TV Series.title: Wendy, perdida pero famosa
TV Series.overview: En una nueva realidad, Wendy descubre el impacto de su participación en el programa. Ahora ella es la estrella y, como tal, debe hacer cosas de estrellas: dar entrevistas, firmas de autógrafos, huir de la prensa, conflicto con Marlon y regrear a León.

TV Series.title: Y llegaron de noche
TV Series.overview: Esta hilarante historia protagonizada por Eugenio Derbez cuenta cómo un grupo de extravagantes Latinos grabó de noche, y con escasos recursos, la versión de ‘Drácula’ en español, qué contra todo pronóstico fue más exitosa que la versión en inglés.

TV Series.title: El Gallo de Oro
TV Series.overview: El amor y la suerte se cruzan entre La Caponera, una cantante de palenques con el don de dar fortuna, un hacendado adicto al juego y un tímido pregonero con sueños de ser gallero. Con el azar de por medio ¿podrá encontrar ella su verdadero amor?

TV Series.title: Juegos interrumpidos
TV Series.overview: Una madre se entera que dieron en adopción a su hijo, de origen mexicano, por medio de una red de trata de personas. Ella emprenderá un viaje para buscar respuestas, pero su misión implica peligros, que pondrán en riesgo la vida de los involucrados.

TV Series.title: Consuelo
TV Series.overview: En los mojigatos años 50´s, Consuelo es una mujer que tiene la vida perfecta de un ama de casa de clase alta. Todo cambiará en el momento en que su marido la deje y deba entrar en un vibrante y prohibido negocio para mantener a su familia.

TV Series.title: Solo para Mujeres
TV Series.overview: Esta es la historia de Solo para Mujeres; desde los inicios de Sergio Mayer y Alexis Ayala en el star system mexicano de los 90 hasta el impacto cultural del show en la sociedad, la sexualidad en la cultura popular y las luchas de sus protagonistas.

TV Series.title: LeBaron Muerte en la Tierra Prometida
TV Series.overview: En Bavispe, Sonora, tres mujeres mormonas, méxico-americanas, y sus hijos, fueron masacrados. Éste hecho se convirtió en escándalo internacional. ¿Quiénes eran estas víctimas y por qué las asesinaron? ¿Fue un ataque contra los LeBaron?

TV Series.title: Se llamaba Pedro Infante
TV Series.overview: A bordo de un viejo avión, Pedro Infante y el Capitán Vidal, pelean con los mandos, ya que van en picada. La mirada de angustia de Pedro nos lleva al día anterior. Pedro acuerda con María Luisa terminar con la demanda por bigamia.

TV Series.title: Profe Infiltrado
TV Series.overview: Julián, un tipo bonachón que trabaja como repartidor de electrodomésticos robados, es capturado por la policía y obligado a infiltrarse como profesor de deportes en el Instituto Cuévano, la preparatoria privada en donde estudia la hija de su jefe.

TV Series.title: Paraíso blanco
TV Series.overview: La bio serie de Carlos Lehder, después de pasar 30 años en la cárcel regresa a Alemania con su hija Julie, recordando todo lo que dejó atrás.

TV Series.title: Isla Brava
TV Series.overview: La misma noche que Lucía confiesa a su marido Alfredo, dueño de un lujo resort, que está enamorada de Bruno, él desaparece misteriosamente. La búsqueda de Alfredo revelará un perverso secreto familiar.

TV Series.title: Cómplices
TV Series.overview: María José, Paula, Roberta y Stacy, conductoras de un talk show, quedan impactadas por la muerte del hombre que las atormentó. Acusadas de un asesinato que niegan, se unen y abrazan la vida, enfrentando tragedias personales con humor negro.

TV Series.title: Al Chile
TV Series.overview: 'El Vítor' explora el alma picante de México, con humor y picardía. Más que un simple ingrediente, el chile es identidad. Entre risas y sabores, 'Al chile' es una declaración de amor al picor, que enciende el plato y el corazón.

TV Series.title: El extraño retorno de Diana Salazar
TV Series.overview: Por sus pesadillas Diana busca apoyo en su psicólogo Joaquín, pero la llegada de Mario a CDMX desencadena una serie de eventos sobrenaturales. Juntos vivirán una gran historia de amor que sobrepasa épocas y vidas.

TV Series.title: Papá Soltero
TV Series.overview: César, perdido tras la muerte de Sandra, recibe la visita inesperada de María, su otra hija. Cesár Intenta controlar la situación llenando la casa de becarios, pero todo se vuelve un caos, al punto de perder a su hijo Cesarín.

TV Series.title: LaLola
TV Series.overview: Romina, en medio del despecho, acude con una bruja, Circe, para vengarse de su novio. Acto seguido, Lalo, despierta en el cuerpo de una mujer y en medio del desconcierto se hace llamar Lola, teniendo que adaptarse y pidiendo ayuda a Alexa.

TV Series.title: Camino a Arcadia
TV Series.overview: Bajo una identidad falsa, Pablo y su hijo se refugian en Arcadia. Su pasado regresa para destruirlo todo; viejos enemigos, traiciones y un amor perdido, pero para proteger a su familia, deberá enfrentarse a su mayor miedo, convertirse en quien fue.

TV Series.title: Par de ideotas
TV Series.overview: Vadhir y José Eduardo Derbez prueban suerte abriendo un antro por dos semanas, le quieren demostrar a su padre y a ellos mismos que pueden hacer algo exitoso, pero descubren en el proceso que tiene un vínculo especial.

TV Series.title: Con esa misma mirada
TV Series.overview: Eloísa está sumergida creando un cuadro para su esposo Octavio, él lleva manteniendo una relación secreta con Gabriela desde hace dos años. Eloísa conoce a Pablo, periodista en medio de un divorcio. Eloísa enfrenta la realidad de su matrimonio.

TV Series.title: Riquísimos... Por Cierto
TV Series.overview: Los López Pérez reciben la noticia de que su tío Fidel, el cacique de Angangueo, ha fallecido y les ha dejado su fortuna. ¡Ahora son inmensamente ricos! Y como tal, necesitan la mejor servidumbre. ¿Qué no harán ahora que son ricos?

TV Series.title: El dentista
TV Series.overview: Una serie de asesinatos de mujeres en Veracruz en el año 1889 son investigados por la policía local con la ayuda de Eduardo Nolasco Black, dentista y pionero en la investigación forense, de la mano de Sofía, una química de la alta sociedad.

TV Series.title: De viaje con los Derbez
TV Series.overview: Eugenio convinces his reluctant family to take a vacation together for the first time ever. Despite their busy schedules, they drop what they’re doing to join him for a month in Morocco where they embark on a crazy, emotional and hilarious adventure.

TV Series.title: Mujeres Asesinas
TV Series.overview: Las protagonistas de esta serie tienen varios elementos en común. Sus vidas no fueron sencillas ni serenas ni felices. Lidiaron con parejas violentas, padres o madres manipuladores, jefes hostiles, situaciones de humillación, historias de venganza.

TV Series.title: Oríllese a la Orilla
TV Series.overview: En esta ocasión Brayan es señalado por los vecinos de ser cómplice de delincuentes. Toña, le sugiere que se haga policía y Brayan la anima también a ella, se imagina deteniendo a una banda y siendo heroína de la historia.

TV Series.title: Nunca tuvo miedo
TV Series.overview: Chalino enfrentó dificultades a lo largo de su vida en Sinaloa, por lo que decidió ir a Estados Unidos en búsqueda de mejores oportunidades. Es allí donde comenzó a escribir sus primeras canciones, que marcaron el inicio de su carrera.

TV Series.title: Deal or No Deal
TV Series.overview: This exciting game show has contestants play for a highly coveted cash prize in a tournament which requires nerve, talent, and a bit of luck.

TV Series.title: Molly of Denali
TV Series.overview: The daily adventures of 10-year-old Alaska native Molly Mabray, her family, her dog Suki and her friends Tooey and Trini.

TV Series.title: Chihayafuru
TV Series.overview: Chihaya Ayase has spent most of her life supporting her sister’s model career. When she meets a boy named Arata Wataya, he thinks Chihaya has potential to become a great karuta player. As Chihaya dreams of becoming Japan's best karuta player, she is soon separated from her karuta playing friends. Now in high school, Chihaya still plays karuta in the hope that she will one day meet her frien...

TV Series.title: Senryu Girl
TV Series.overview: Yukishiro Nanako may seem like a normal girl, but she expresses herself only through written senryu poetry! This means she communicates in 5-7-5 syllables as she and her ex-delinquent bestie, Busujima Eiji, run their high school’s Literature Club.

TV Series.title: After the Rain
TV Series.overview: Akira Tachibana was a track star, but an injury forced her to quit the team. Masami Kondo wanted to be a writer but now manages a restaurant. When Akira takes a job at Masami's business, they begin to reconsider everything about themselves.

TV Series.title: GODANNAR!!
TV Series.overview: Goh's and Anna's wedding is interrupted by aliens. As Goh struggles in battle against them, Anna s uses a robot to save him. They become the mighty robot "Godannar," making this husband and wife duo the strongest opponent the aliens have faced!

TV Series.title: Mezzo DSA
TV Series.overview: In the near future, Androids and high tech gadgets are commonplace. Whether it's serving as a bodyguard, securing biological weapons, or uncovering massive scandals, Suzuki Mikura, Kurokawa Kenichi, and Harada Tomohisa are always on the case.

TV Series.title: Fate/kaleid liner Prisma Illya
TV Series.overview: Illya (Illyasviel von Einzbern) is a typical young girl attending Homurabara Academy who just happens to have a slight crush on her brother-in-law. Then, one night, a magic wand called Magical Ruby falls from the sky into her bath and tricks her into signing a contract...

TV Series.title: RahXephon
TV Series.overview: Ayato's life changes forever when he learns that only he can pilot a super weapon known as RahXephon.

TV Series.title: Beyond the Boundary
TV Series.overview: In this new observational documentary series cricketer Pete Trego will be travelling around the world to meet passionate players and supporters of the game.

TV Series.title: Mayo Chiki!
TV Series.overview: Have you heard the one about The Cross-Dressing Butler, the Female Wrestlers, the Chicken AND the Principal’s daughter? Sakamachi Kinjiro suffers from acute gynophobia, but his female troubles don’t redline until a wrong turn exposes Subaru’s secret; if her cross-dressing isn’t enough of a drag, Kinjiro’s girl problems also include a martial artist, a fetishist, AND his own sister! The freak flags fly, the punch lines aim low, and the butler is cross-dressed to kill in Mayo Chiki!

TV Series.title: Fate/stay night
TV Series.overview: A young amateur magician unknowingly enters a tournament that is fought to the death.

TV Series.title: Maid Sama!
TV Series.overview: Misaki is class president of a formerly all-male school. A beacon of hope to the female students as well as teachers, she rules over the boys with an iron fist and a heart of ice. A popular male student stumbles on to her secret double life- working part-time as an upbeat and cheery waitress at a maid cafe! Misaki is forced to make a deal: spend some time with him, or have her hard earned reputation destroyed by revealing her embarrassing secret.

TV Series.title: Monster Musume: Everyday Life with Monster Girls
TV Series.overview: When Kimihito finds himself sucked into a government exchange program he soon develops a monster problem: monster girls!

TV Series.title: Teen Mom 2
TV Series.overview: `Teen Mom 2' follows four girls from the second season of MTV's documentary series `16 and Pregnant' as they face the challenges of their first years of motherhood. Chelsea, Jenelle, Kailyn and Leah are seen trying to come to grips with the myriad of responsibilities that caring for a child brings, and doing so while worrying about such things as finances, living arrangements, graduating from high school, family support (or lack thereof) and the role of their baby's father.

TV Series.title: Killing Eve
TV Series.overview: In this series that topples the typical spy-action thriller, two fiercely intelligent women go head to head in an epic game of cat and mouse.

TV Series.title: Rob Dyrdek's Fantasy Factory
TV Series.overview: Rob is no longer lounging at his familiar house in the Hills. Instead he's commanding operations in a massive industrial, and fully skate-able, warehouse and office complex. Visit Rob Dyrdek's Fantasy Factory, where strange and wonderful dreams come true.

TV Series.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
TV Series.overview: The world is divided into four nations -- the Water Tribe, the Earth Kingdom, the Fire Nation and and the Air Nomads -- each represented by a natural element for which the nation is named. Benders have the ability to control and manipulate the element from their nation. Only the Avatar is the master of all four elements. The ruthless Fire Nation wants to conquer the world but the only bender who has enough power, the Avatar, has disappeared... until now. His tribe soon discovers that Aang is the long-lost Avatar. Now Katara and Sokka must safeguard Aang on his journey to master all four elements and save the world from the Fire Nation.

TV Series.title: Degrassi
TV Series.overview: Degrassi: The Next Generation is a pull-no-punches dramatic series that tackles the real-life issues of high school students.

TV Series.title: Pretty Hard Cases
TV Series.overview: "Pretty Hard Cases" follows Guns and Gangs detective Sam and Drug Squad detective Kelly. By day, they are heroes in their particular way: skilled, tough, determined, and entertaining, fighting to do good in a broken system.

TV Series.title: The Librarians
TV Series.overview: Far deep under the Metropolitan Public Library in New York, Flynn Carsen, a magical librarian who keeps ancient treasures safe in secret, is facing a fear of an evil society. NATO Colonel Eve Baird is invited to join the Library as a guardian, but her original team menber are too unique to fight with... To save the world, a great adventure begins!

TV Series.title: Sailor Moon
TV Series.overview: Usagi Tsukino is a cheerful 14-year-old schoolgirl who often finds herself in unwanted trouble. One day, she saves a talking cat named Luna, and her life is changed forever.

TV Series.title: Sledge Hammer!
TV Series.overview: The adventures of a deranged police detective who always looks for the most violent solution to any problem.

TV Series.title: Play-Doh Squished
TV Series.overview: PLAY-DOH SQUISHED features three teams of fun-loving adults and kids going ‘doh-to-doh’ in the ultimate Holiday Competition. The groups compete in two physical challenges that culminate in a sculpting event where they must build immersive Winter Wonderlands out of Play-Doh! In the end, only one team will win a grand prize, while the other teams’ creations will get SQUISHED! Sarah Hyland hosts.

TV Series.title: Pokémon
TV Series.overview: Ash and Pikachu are off to the distant Unova region where they'll encounter new friends, new rivals, new challenges, and all-new Pokémon!

TV Series.title: Highlander: The Raven
TV Series.overview: Conflicted Amanda Darieux (Elizabeth Gracen) is a 1,200-year-old immortal thief who joins forces with retired security specialist Nick Wolfe (Paul Johansson) to dispose of crooked immortals in this spin-off from the popular Highlander television series

TV Series.title: Gary and His Demons
TV Series.overview: Un chasseur de démons a du mal à rester intéressé par la responsabilité de sauver la Terre, qu'il n'a jamais demandée.

TV Series.title: Alex Rider
TV Series.overview: Alex Rider is an ordinary teenager enlisted to work on behalf of MI6, where he uses skills he didn't know he had to become an extraordinary spy.

TV Series.title: The Enfield Haunting
TV Series.overview: In 1977 London, a family finds their home beginning to show signs of poltergeist activity and must rely on the help of experts in the field.

TV Series.title: Collision
TV Series.overview: A devastating road accident has forever changed the lives of those involved, but as an ongoing investigation reveals: it goes so much deeper.

TV Series.title: Bancroft
TV Series.overview: Centers around Detective Superintendent Elizabeth Bancroft, who is forced to confront her demons when a case from her past is reopened.

TV Series.title: Taboo
TV Series.overview: An adventurer returns to London to bury his father and claim his inheritance—a small piece of land that the East India Company is willing to kill for.

TV Series.title: Ascension
TV Series.overview: Back in 1963, the U.S. government sent hundreds of citizens on a century-long voyage to a new world. Fifty years later, chaos breaks out on the ship.

TV Series.title: The Prisoner
TV Series.overview: After he resigns from his job, a secret agent is abducted and taken to what looks like an ideal village, except it is really a bizarre prison .

TV Series.title: Solos
TV Series.overview: Solos is a seven-part anthology series that explores the strange, beautiful, heart-breaking, hilarious, wondrous truths of what it means to be human. Performed by eight of the finest actors of our time, this anthology series spans our present and future and illuminates that even during our most isolated moments we are all connected through the human experience.

TV Series.title: Lost in Austen
TV Series.overview: A modern London woman obsessed with the romance in Jane Austen’s work discovers that she’s switched lives with a character from Pride & Prejudice.

TV Series.title: Vagrant Queen
TV Series.overview: Now an orphaned outcast, former child queen Elida flees Lazaro's army with her friends and sets off on a dangerous adventure through the galaxy.

TV Series.title: Space: 1999
TV Series.overview: The crew of Moonbase Alpha must struggle to survive when the force from a massive explosion throws the moon out of orbit and into deep space.

TV Series.title: The Dead Zone
TV Series.overview: After suffering a tragic car accident, a young man awakens from a coma with extraordinary psychic powers. Based on the Stephen King novel.

TV Series.title: The Center Seat: 55 Years of Star Trek
TV Series.overview: A 55-year voyage back to the beginning for a behind-the-scenes glimpse inside the USS Enterprise and one of greatest landmark series of all time.

TV Series.title: Murdertown
TV Series.overview: Emilia Fox explores ten chilling cases across the UK, uncovering the crimes that shook local communities and shocked the nation.

TV Series.title: Moses Jones
TV Series.overview: When a mutilated dead body is discovered in the Thames, Moses Jones is put on the case by his superiors at Scotland Yard, simply because of his ethnic heritage. Paired with DS Dan Twentyman the two are at a loss as to whether to put the mysterious death down to ritualistic murder, terrorism, organized crime or the work of a lunatic.

TV Series.title: Masterminds
TV Series.overview: Get an insider’s look into how real-life crimes were pulled off: from bank robberies and great escapes, to impersonations and fraud.

TV Series.title: The City and the City
TV Series.overview: Inspector Tyador Borlú of the Extreme Crime Squad in the European city-state of Beszel, investigates the murder of a student from Beszel's twin-city of Ul Qoman. Based on the award winning novel "The City and the City" by China Miéville.

TV Series.title: Mayday
TV Series.overview: A small town's Mayday festival turns to panic when its newly crowned May Queen vanishes, revealing the sinister secrets lurking beneath the surface.

TV Series.title: Screw
TV Series.overview: A drama exploring an all-male British prison like no one has ever seen before: through the embattled, inspiring characters who work there.

TV Series.title: Cambridge Spies
TV Series.overview: Four Cambridge University students are plunged into a world of lies and deception when they are recruited as double agents for the Soviet Union.

TV Series.title: Occupied
TV Series.overview: From a storyline conceived by bestselling author Jo Nesbø, `Occupied' focuses on political and environmental issues affecting Scandinavia. The ten-part Nordic drama is based in the near future, when environmental concerns prompt the Norwegian government to stop all oil and gas production in the North Sea. With limited resources available elsewhere, these actions result in a world crisis. Stepping in on behalf of the EU, Russia invades the country with the sole aim to complete a "silk-glove" operation, which involves taking control of the oil supplies. However, as the mission gets underway, further political conflicts take over the nation.

TV Series.title: Spy High
TV Series.overview: When teenager Blake Robbins files a lawsuit claiming his school is spying on him, it sparks a wild scandal with alarming digital privacy implications.

TV Series.title: Crime Files the Homefront
TV Series.overview: Delve into the mind of a killer and discover the truth behind some of the most notoriously criminal cases in history. 4 episodes include infamous murders Stacy Castor, the Menendez brothers, Drew Peterson and more.

TV Series.title: Second Sight
TV Series.overview: Ross Tanner, a maverick ambitious Detective Chief Inspector who gets results by always going that extra mile is a man with a terrible secret. Detective Inspector Catherine Tully, a competitive graduate officer is drafted into Tanner's serious crime unit to help investigate the apparently motiveless, brutal murder of a nineteen year-old boy.

TV Series.title: Decoy
TV Series.overview: Based on a NYC undercover policewoman’s real case histories, her inner world of suspicion, fear, and living with hard choices unfolds with each tale.

TV Series.title: Silent Witness
TV Series.overview: The multi-award-winning crime drama returns with five more gripping stories for the team of scientists to solve. Led by pathologist Dr Nikki Alexander and forensic scientist Jack Hodgson, no case is ever the same for the investigators.

TV Series.title: An Unknown Enemy
TV Series.overview: Fernando Barrientos, Head of the National Security Directorate, Mexico's Secret Police, is trying to reach the highest position in the country. On his way, he'll have to manipulate, betray, and kill, and he's well prepared for it. However, his path will be full of obstacles. Nobody, not even his family, will be immune to the chaos left in his quest for total power.

TV Series.title: Tin Star
TV Series.overview: After being left destroyed by the chaos that had followed Jim and his alcoholic alter ego Jack Devlin, Tin Star Season 2 picks up with the unlikely hero cut off in the remote Rockies wilderness with his grieving and shell-shocked family struggling to come to terms with their ordeal.

TV Series.title: Rebecka Martinsson
TV Series.overview: When a close friend from her childhood suddenly passes away Rebecka reluctantly returns to Kiruna, the place where she grew up. It soon turns out that not everything is as it appears to be. The questions pile up when she discovers that her friend was actually murdered and Rebecka cant leave until she has found some answers.

TV Series.title: Deadly Women
TV Series.overview: Former FBI criminal profiler Candice DeLong explores the stories of female murderers and the psychological motivations that drove them to kill.

TV Series.title: ReGenesis
TV Series.overview: Geneticist David Sandstrom is the chief scientist at the prestigious North American Biotechnology Advisory Commission. The virology/micro-biology NorBAC laboratory is a joint enterprise between the USA, Canada and Mexico that investigates problems of a scientific nature, such as bio-terrorism, mysterious disease and radical environmental changes.

TV Series.title: The Sandbaggers
TV Series.overview: Taut Cold War-era spy series following the Sandbaggers, an elite British Intelligence team taking on anything from assassinations to aiding defectors.

TV Series.title: Route 66
TV Series.overview: The adventures of two young drifters across America on Highway Route 66.

TV Series.title: Viewpoint
TV Series.overview: DC Martin Young, a surveillance detective, sets up his observation post in the home of a single mother when a primary school teacher goes missing.

TV Series.title: The Consultant
TV Series.overview: After an unspeakable tragedy at CompWare, a games studio based in downtown Los Angeles, a mysterious consultant, Regus Patoff, blows into town and takes charge.

TV Series.title: Without Motive
TV Series.overview: A headstrong cop tries to balance a dead-end serial killer investigation with a panicked public, a shade-throwing press and a crumbling marriage.

TV Series.title: Wire in the Blood
TV Series.overview: A clinical psychologist joins forces with the Bradfield police department to help track down brutal serial killers and bring them to justice.

TV Series.title: The Trial: A Murder in the Family
TV Series.overview: The Trial: A Murder in the Family is a British television docudrama, produced by Dragonfly Film and television, that first broadcast on Channel 4 on 21 May 2017. The five-part series follows a fictional court case in which university lecturer Simon Davis is tried for the murder of his wife Carla, in an attempt to recreate an accurate portrayal of an English legal trial.

TV Series.title: And Never Let Her Go
TV Series.overview: In this miniseries based on a true story, a passionate affair between a government aide and an attorney evolves into a dangerous obsession and murder.

TV Series.title: Bäckström
TV Series.overview: Evert Bäckström is a rock star among cops and a genius at solving crimes; a woman's skull is found, and Bäckström sees a case only he can solve.

TV Series.title: Whitechapel
TV Series.overview: Modern Whitechapel is experiencing déjà vu with a series of murders that exactly copy those of perpetrated by Jack the Ripper. Can Detective Chandler, a rookie when it comes to murder cases, bring safety back to the streets of Whitechapel?

TV Series.title: Halifax f.p.
TV Series.overview: Jane Halifax is a freelance forensic psychiatrist (f.p.) a psychological super-sleuth immersed in a mire of crime and punishment: Jane is an expert of the human mind.

TV Series.title: Utopia
TV Series.overview: Utopia is a conspiracy thriller that follows a group of young fans who come together when they discover that the conspiracy in an elusive comic, Utopia, is real. The comic foretells the demise of humanity and the world as we know it, thrusting this group of underdogs to embark on a high-stakes twisted adventure to use what they uncover to save themselves, each other and ultimately humanity.

TV Series.title: Clean Break
TV Series.overview: When a kidnapping goes horribly awry, the ensuing backlash leaves a drastic and catastrophic effect on the entire community of Wexford.

TV Series.title: Unsolved Mysteries
TV Series.overview: Re-enactments, interviews, and updates   clues and answers to real mysteries, from unsolved crimes to missing people and paranormal events.

TV Series.title: The Gulf
TV Series.overview: In this gripping psychological mystery from New Zealand, Detective Jess Savage (Kate Elliott, Wentworth) is recovering from a car crash that killed her husband when she learns about a new lead in a cold case. Jess restarts the investigation but notices troubling lapses in her memory. As she searches for answers, she begins to fathom that justice isn't always right, and not all crimes are wrong.

TV Series.title: Archangel
TV Series.overview: A British professor of Soviet history attends a conference in Moscow, where he becomes embroiled in a series of mysteries surrounding Joseph Stalin.

TV Series.title: Sasquatch Unearthed: The Ridge
TV Series.overview: With insight from Sasquatch experts, this series closely examines the investigation of the Chestnut Ridge area of Pennsylvania.

TV Series.title: Fireball XL5
TV Series.overview: In the year 2062 the World Space Patrol watches the skies with its fleet of spacecraft.

TV Series.title: 100 Years of Horror
TV Series.overview: Hosted by Christopher Lee, this program chronicles the history of horror from the earliest chillers and creature features to the modern era of horror.

TV Series.title: The Island
TV Series.overview: After a deadly virus takes down a small community living on an island in the North Sea, the few survivors left must fight for their lives.

TV Series.title: Kamen Rider
TV Series.overview: A motorcycle-riding cyborg fights the evil organization that transformed him for their evil deeds.

TV Series.title: Purgatory
TV Series.overview: A group of strangers gather at an exclusive winter resort in the mountains to ring in the New Year, but not every member of the party is there to celebrate. One of them is looking for revenge.

TV Series.title: Bedlam
TV Series.overview: Residents of an apartment building converted from a pre-Victorian psychiatric asylum start to experience supernatural happenings.

TV Series.title: Hammer House of Horror
TV Series.overview: Terror awaits in this anthology series from Britain's famed Hammer studios, featuring stories of haunted houses, demons and other macabre delights.

TV Series.title: The Returned
TV Series.overview: In a French Alpine village, a random group of people realize they’ve been dead for several years. Soon, devastating secrets emerge.

TV Series.title: Todd and the Book of Pure Evil
TV Series.overview: A stoner metalhead named Todd Smith, his crushee Jenny, his best friend Curtis, and the geeky Hannah, search their high school for a mayhem-causing Satanic spell book, while being opposed by Atticus, the evil guidance councillor.

TV Series.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: True Crime
TV Series.overview: A humourous take on unsolved crimes, hauntings, and historical mysteries, as a conspiracy theorist tries to convince his sceptical friend that evidence isn't always what it appears to be.

TV Series.title: South of Hell
TV Series.overview: In the most possessed city in the world in South Carolina, a young exorcist casts out demons for a living, except for the one that lives inside her.

TV Series.title: The Secret of Crickley Hall
TV Series.overview: Chilling ghost story adapted from James Herbert's novel, telling both the story of the modern day haunting of a troubled family and the dark events buried in their new home's past.

TV Series.title: Northern Mysteries
TV Series.overview: "Northern Mysteries" is a docudrama series that retells some of the most unusual events in Canadian history, exploring encounters with ghosts, paranormal events, lost treasures and bizarre murders.

TV Series.title: Lore
TV Series.overview: From an executive producer of The Walking Dead and the executive producer of The X-Files, this anthology series brings to life Aaron Mahnke’s “Lore” podcast and uncovers the real-life events that spawned our darkest nightmares. Blending dramatic scenes, animation, archive and narration, Lore reveals how our horror legends - such as vampires, werewolves and body snatchers - are rooted in truth.

TV Series.title: The Ray Bradbury Theater
TV Series.overview: Science fiction author Ray Bradbury presents a series of dramatisations of his acclaimed novels and short stories.

TV Series.title: Extreme Ghost Stories
TV Series.overview: Gripping dramatizations of truly harrowing paranormal encounters in some of the most infamously haunted locations throughout the United Kingdom.

TV Series.title: The Adventures of the Young Marco Polo
TV Series.overview: Young Marco Polo sets off on wild adventures through distant lands to find his missing father.

TV Series.title: The Magical Adventures of Quasimodo
TV Series.overview: The stories of Quasimodo will never grow old. They are timeless tales filled with adventure and humormagical stories of fun and fantasy that live forever in the imagination of us all. From the shadowy belfries of Notre Dame to the echoing streets of Paris, Quasimodo vividly portrays another place and time when mystery and magic prevailed. A remarkable time of kings and pickpockets, dukes and gypsies, it is a time of song and celebrationand a remarkable young man Quasimodo and his exceptional friends.

TV Series.title: The Rubbish World of Dave Spud
TV Series.overview: Dave Spud is a British children's animated series featuring the surreal adventures of the eponymous Dave Spud of Grimsby, his friends and tower block-dwelling family.

TV Series.title: The Latest Buzz
TV Series.overview: En esta serie, una revista para adolescentes en dificultades contrata a cinco estudiantes de secundaria para ayudar a aumentar su número de lectores.

TV Series.title: My Dad the Rock Star
TV Series.overview: Lo único que quiere un chico de 12 años es una vida común y corriente, pero su papá es una estrella de rock súper popular y multimillonaria.

TV Series.title: Five Children and It
TV Series.overview: Five Children and It is the faithful retelling of Edith Nesbit's (The Railway Children) moralistic Victorian children's classic in which five children discover a sand fairy, the Psammead (sammyadd), which can make wishes come true. Robert, Anthea, Jane, Cyril embark on a series of intriguing adventures filled with the Psammead's special brand of magic.

TV Series.title: BeyWarriors: Cyborg
TV Series.overview: Sho, Jin and Leon find themselves trapped on a strange world once defended by the Six Mythic Beasts who upheld justice and brought prosperity to all through the battling BeyRaiderz tournaments.

TV Series.title: Danger & Eggs
TV Series.overview: Danger & Eggs follows the endless adventures of a fearless, teal-haired girl named D.D. Danger (voiced by SNL's Aidy Bryant) and her ever cautious best friend, a giant talking egg named Phillip. Together, join this buddy system as they explore an underground laboratory, meet a tech-savvy raccoon, and find moments of heart in the smallest bite of broccoli.

TV Series.title: Rated A for Awesome
TV Series.overview: What's the one thing that strikes dread in the hearts of kids everywhere?  It's BLAH!  Caught looking doofy at a school dance? Stuck with the world's most boring teacher? You can bet Blah's behind it. But hope is not lost! Enter five best buds with a mission: fight back against blah using all their powers of Awesomization!

TV Series.title: The Worst Witch
TV Series.overview: Follows the magical adventures of Mildred Hubble, an accident-prone but determined young witch-in-training at Miss Cackle's Academy for Witches,

TV Series.title: Tenkai Knights
TV Series.overview: Teens from Earth are chosen to become the new generation of Tenkai Knights and prevent a villain from taking control of two worlds.

TV Series.title: The Dangerous Book for Boys
TV Series.overview: The McKenna family must cope with the passing of its much-loved patriarch, Patrick. Hope appears in the form of a book called The Dangerous Book for Boys that Patrick created for his three sons.  It becomes a how-to guide that inspires fantasies in his youngest son, Wyatt, enabling him to reconnect with his father and learn lessons that help him navigate real life.

TV Series.title: Once Upon a Hamster
TV Series.overview: Hammy wanders far from home and meets Martha Mouse, who takes him to see Turtle, the Wise Old Frog and GP the Guinea Pig. TV-G

TV Series.title: Captain Tsubasa
TV Series.overview: Based on the global hit manga, soccer fanatic Tsubasa Ozora embarks on a journey that will see him face the toughest competition in all of Japan!

TV Series.title: Costume Quest
TV Series.overview: Four friends face off against ferocious, nougat-munching monsters that lurk in the shadows of their sleepy town. They must learn to use their imaginations to unlock the magical powers of their homemade costumes and save the universe from monsters.

TV Series.title: Classic Tales
TV Series.overview: Classic tales that have entertained and enchanted generations of kids all around the world are brought to life through contemporary animation.

TV Series.title: Detentionaire
TV Series.overview: After being falsely accused of a major prank at his high school, Lee Ping must sneak out of detention every day to find out who framed him and why.

TV Series.title: Patchwork Pals
TV Series.overview: The Patchwork Pals are a bunch of fun-loving animals that live together under a massive patchwork blanket.

TV Series.title: M.I. High
TV Series.overview: A team of highly-trained teenage spies must juggle keeping the world safe from villains with ordinary school work.

TV Series.title: Highlander: The Animated Series
TV Series.overview: For 700 years, evil Immortal Kortan ruled a ruined Earth. Now, Quentin MacLeod, the Last of the MacLeods, rises to challenge him and his reign.

TV Series.title: Rupert
TV Series.overview: A young bear unintentionally ends up on great adventures in faraway and mystical places but always makes it back safely to his home of Nutwood.

TV Series.title: Little Big Awesome
TV Series.overview: Little Big Awesome follows Gluko and Lennon, the two best friends ever of all time in the history of everything. While having weird and wonderful adventures around Townopolis, these besties help the citizens live their best lives, even if helping sometimes causes more problems than it solves.

TV Series.title: Strange Hill High
TV Series.overview: Mitchell, Becky, and Templeton set out to discover their school's mysteries, encountering monsters, paradoxes, and crazy nonsense along the way.

TV Series.title: The Tricky Band
TV Series.overview: An animated sonic series where little ones are challenged by the host of a family band to guess musical instruments, based on a single note.

TV Series.title: Miniforce X
TV Series.overview: Space pirates DanDanDan find Zenos, a weakened cosmic villain. He escapes by promising them rewards. Miniforce must stop him once and for all!

TV Series.title: Gortimer Gibbon's Life on Normal Street
TV Series.overview: Gortimer Gibbon's Life on Normal Street follows Gortimer and his two best friends, Ranger and Mel, on magical exploits triggered by their thirst for adventure. The trio sets out to end a jinx while helping the unluckiest kid on Normal Street, solve a mystery before a spooky spirit turns them into ghost stories, find a fabled lost treasure, and outsmart fate after some advice from a fortune teller.

TV Series.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
TV Series.overview: Las aventuras de Sonic, un erizo del planeta Mobius, y una princesa para impedir que un científico transforme a los residentes en robots esclavos.

TV Series.title: Extreme Dinosaurs
TV Series.overview: 65 Million years ago, Dinosaurs disappeared. Now they're Back! T-Bone, Spike, Bullzeye, and Stegz. 4 prehistoric dinosaurs, evolved into intelligent beings by an extra-dimensional scientist reawaken in a bizarre new world, but they aren't alone. Wicked Raptors are also in the modern world. That means trouble. The fate of humanity lay in the hands of four heroic dinosaurs. Extreme Dinosaurs!

TV Series.title: Alf Tales
TV Series.overview: ALF and his friends from his home planet Melmac uniquely retell classic stories in this entertaining animated series for the whole family.

TV Series.title: Jungle Beat
TV Series.overview: The Jungle Beat Explorers are four intrepid adventurers on a slapstick mission of discovery!

TV Series.title: The Super Mario Bros. Super Show!
TV Series.overview: A pair of plumbers get sucked into a magical kingdom, where a beautiful princess needs their help to stop a wicked reptile bent on destruction.

TV Series.title: Pee-wee's Playhouse
TV Series.overview: Join Pee-wee and his friends as they let their imaginations run wild in his wacky, whimsical playhouse where there is never a dull moment.

TV Series.title: Numberblocks
TV Series.overview: Learn all about numbers with the Numberblocks!

TV Series.title: The Dreamstone
TV Series.overview: Evil Zordrak and his henchmen conspire to steal the Dreamstone from the Land of Dreams, but are foiled time and time again by the Dream Maker.

TV Series.title: The Kicks
TV Series.overview: Devin Burke and her family have moved cross-country to California and now must adjust to a new life and a new soccer team. The Kentville Kicks don't quite play up to the standard that Devin is used to, so she must establish herself as a leader while also trying to make friends in a strange place.

TV Series.title: Beyblade: Metal Saga
TV Series.overview: Ginga, nuestro héroe, y su grupo de leales amigos se enfrentan a un peligroso grupo llamado Dark Nebula en una batalla entre el bien y el mal.

TV Series.title: Ruby Gloom
TV Series.overview: Quizás sea la chica más alegre del mundo, pues Ruby no es de las que lo ven todo negro y en cambio anima a sus amigos a celebrar sus diferencias.

TV Series.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog
TV Series.overview: The speediest hedgehog around teams up with his best friends to stop his arch nemesis Dr. Robotnik from enslaving the population of Planet Mobius.

TV Series.title: Slugterra
TV Series.overview: Deep in the underground world of Slugterra, young Eli Shane and his crew of Slugslingers fight for justice, duelling it out using magical transforming Slugs fired from amped-up customised blasters!

TV Series.title: The Adventures of Super Mario Bros. 3
TV Series.overview: Koopa has escaped from a Banishment Zone to battle the Super Mario Bros. And he has a powerful new weapon, the Koopa Kids - Koopa’s bratty, yet lovable, offspring! It's the irrepressible Marios versus wild kids gone amuck in outrageous comedy adventures.

TV Series.title: Niko and the Sword of Light
TV Series.overview: Chapter One: The Cursed Volcano. A plague of shadows has swept across the land, turning innocent creatures into terrible monsters. One champion remains to battle the darkness and return the world to the light: Niko. Armed with his magic sword and guided by a determined Princess, young Niko must journey to the Cursed Volcano, defeat evil sorcerer Nar Est and free his people from their magic prison.

TV Series.title: Lost in Oz
TV Series.overview: After being transported from Kansas to Oz on a magical tornado, 12-year-old Dorothy Gale finds herself lost in a strange new land with her trusty dog Toto. With the help of some new Ozian friends, Dorothy and Toto search Oz for the magic they need to get back home. Follow their adventure with 10 new episodes.

TV Series.title: Sigmund and the Sea Monsters
TV Series.overview: Brothers Johnny and Scotty find Sigmund, a sea monster, on the beach and bring him home to their clubhouse. They become fast friends, but when a monster hunter, Capt. Barnabas (David Arquette), finds out, the kids have to scramble to keep Sigmund hidden. Worse still, Sigmund's brothers Blurp and Slurp don't like humans. Against all odds, can they still have an endless summer of fun?

TV Series.title: Simeone. Living Match by Match
TV Series.overview: During nearly three decades as a player and manager, Diego Pablo Simeone has developed a unique and globally recognised approach to football. We spent a unique season with El Cholo to discover the secret behind a success story that has begun to write the history of his legacy.

TV Series.title: Courtois, the Return of the Number 1
TV Series.overview: A portrait that shows the spectacular work of Thibaut Courtois to reach the decisive stretch of the season after the serious injury suffered just before the start of LaLiga. We will experience the uncertainty of undergoing surgery, the sacrifice he made to get back to his best, his day-to-day life with Mishel, his children and family, his intense schedule and other previously unknown facets.

TV Series.title: The I-Land
TV Series.overview: Wiped clean of memories and thrown together, a group of strangers fight to survive harsh realities — and the island that traps them.

TV Series.title: FC Barcelona: A New Era
TV Series.overview: Cuando el FC Barcelona pasa por una situación de crisis, Xavi Hernández es elegido nuevo entrenador. Pero los inicios nunca son fáciles. Xavi se encuentra a un equipo hundido y que no conoce la idea de fútbol que él tiene.

TV Series.title: The Test
TV Series.overview: The Australian Men's Cricket Team is tasked with rebuilding their reputation after being rocked by the sandpaper scandal of 2018.

TV Series.title: Robson Green's Ultimate Catch
TV Series.overview: Extreme Fisherman Robson Green pushes the angling boundaries further than ever before in search of the Ultimate Catch.

TV Series.title: All or Nothing: Brazil National Team
TV Series.overview: The Brazilian National Team goes on a journey of faith, brotherhood, and hard work to reimagine their identity and to re-engage a disgruntled fanbase as they attempt to win the 2019 Copa América on home soil. From the locker room, trough the trainings, to the games, we go exclusively behind-the-scenes with the world’s most famous football team.

TV Series.title: Sweet Combat
TV Series.overview: The daughter of a global Chinese business family goes against all expectations when she begins boxing and falls in love with her trainer.

TV Series.title: Good Rivals
TV Series.overview: Experience the rise of the US Men’s National Team through their decades long rivalry with the Mexico Men’s National Team. The series peels back the political, social, and sporting layers of the rivalry through the eyes of Landon Donovan (US) and Rafael Márquez (MX), who became symbols of their countries’ soccer cultures.

TV Series.title: Redefined: J.R. Smith
TV Series.overview: Drafted to the NBA out of high school when he was only 19 years old, two time NBA Champion JR Smith has a new focus. He’s getting a college education and pursuing a new athletic passion at the nation’s largest historically black university - North Carolina A&T.

TV Series.title: Inside Edge
TV Series.overview: Inside Edge is the story of the Mumbai Mavericks, a T20 cricket franchise playing in the Powerplay League. Set in a landscape of conflicting interests, where selfishness is almost a virtue, where sex, money, and power are mere means to an end, Inside Edge is a story that pulls no punches, minces no words, and takes no prisoners. Come witness the game behind the game.

TV Series.title: Robson's Extreme Fishing Challenge
TV Series.overview: Robson Green has fished the world-now he has to show what he's learned. He faces his ultimate fishing challenge, as he pitches himself against fishing champions in an epic journey through the Americas. From Alaska to Brazil he's out to take on the best and win-as he pursues some of the most remarkable fish in the water.

TV Series.title: This Is Football
TV Series.overview: An emotionally-charged, six-part documentary, exploring football’s extraordinary impact on the world. From the streets of Delhi to the fields of post-war Rwanda to the pitches of the Champions League, this globe-spanning series tells a unique story of the game and its power to unite countries, inspire generations and captivate billions.

TV Series.title: For the Win: NWSL
TV Series.overview: For The Win is an immersive docuseries that follows players like icon Alex Morgan, rising superstar Trinity Rodman, and soccer phenom Marta through the 2024 NWSL playoffs as dynasties crumble, history refuses to wait, and new champion will be crowned. In 2024, the NWSL isn't just breaking records - it's shattering expectations.

TV Series.title: Deadliest Journeys
TV Series.overview: Every day, people trek incredible journeys, dodging landslides in Tajikistan, crossing frail bridges in Madagascar and battling monkeys in Guyana.

TV Series.title: All or Nothing
TV Series.overview: ARIZONA CARDINALS: For the first time in history, Amazon and NFL Films present an unprecedented look behind the scenes of the Arizona Cardinals organization over an entire NFL season. Witness the real life, behind the scenes journey with coach Bruce Arians, President Michael Bidwill, GM Steve Keim, and Pro Bowlers Carson Palmer, Larry Fitzgerald, Patrick Peterson, and Tyrann Mathieu.

TV Series.title: Coach Prime
TV Series.overview: Coach Prime is the biggest story in college football. Watch how his coaching legacy was built in his third year at Jackson State as his team experiences a dramatic season that includes a water crisis, player injuries, and heightened expectations for his football team.

TV Series.title: Taurasi
TV Series.overview: Basketball legend Diana Taurasi shares the inside story of her life and career - with no stone left unturned.

TV Series.title: Real Madrid: How Could I Not Love You
TV Series.overview: In Real Madrid, the requirement to win all the titles puts its executives, coaching staff and players to the test every year. In the 2023-24 season, the club strengthens to build a roster that can rise to the challenge: completing a decade that can turn the team into a legend and writing a new golden chapter for the team in football's history.

TV Series.title: Uninterrupted's Top Class
TV Series.overview: Situated 30 miles northwest of Los Angeles in the San Fernando Valley, Sierra Canyon High School has established itself as a perennial powerhouse for Southern California basketball. The defending back-to-back state champions embark on their 2019-20 basketball season seeking a threepeat for the state crown, hopes of a National Championship.

TV Series.title: God. Family. Football.
TV Series.overview: The 2022 high school football season is one of high hopes for Evangel Christian Academy. After going 0-9 in 2020 and not winning a game for the first time in history, Head Coach and Pastor Denny Duron is looking to bring the glory back to the storied football program. The team must stay unified and focused while battling adversity, on and off the field, in order to make a run at the state title.

TV Series.title: Le Mans: Racing Is Everything
TV Series.overview: The 24 Hours of Le Mans is a motor race like no other. Taking place in France each year, it is an endurance test for drivers and cars that literally takes 24 hours to complete. Travelling from Kuala Lumpur to the Côte D’Azur, shot in breathtaking 4K and with unprecedented access to six of the teams competing for glory, Le Mans: Racing is Everything is motorsport as you’ve never seen it before.

TV Series.title: Ice Vikings
TV Series.overview: This docuseries explores the wild and perilous world of commercial ice fishing on Lake Winnipeg, one of Canada's largest lakes.

TV Series.title: One Shot: Overtime Elite
TV Series.overview: One Shot: Overtime Elite showcases the lives of the next generation of basketball stars as they navigate their pursuit of a professional basketball career. These young men are on the brink of achieving everything they have dreamed of- will they rise to the challenge or will they struggle with the pressure? The Thompson twins are at the top of the NBA draft, which forces everyone to up their game.

TV Series.title: Surf Girls
TV Series.overview: The next generation of Native Hawaiian female surfers compete at elite levels to earn a coveted spot on the World Tour of professional Surfing. This 4 part series offers behind the scenes access as they train, navigate family responsibilities and battle against the highest ranking surfers to get to the top of the podium.

TV Series.title: The Ride
TV Series.overview: The world's top bull riders juggle their families, faith, and a modern-day cowboy lifestyle as they compete for the inaugural team series championship.

TV Series.title: Evolution of the Black Quarterback
TV Series.overview: In celebration of how Black quarterbacks have changed the game of professional football, Michael Vick travels across America learning about the pioneers who fought for acceptance, the players who cemented their spot, and what the future of the game can hold. Connecting with stars like Patrick Mahomes, Cam Newton, Steve Young, Common, Andy Reid, and Jamie Foxx.

TV Series.title: Maradona, Blessed Dream
TV Series.overview: Maradona overdoses, and his life hangs by a thread. Diego starts the career that makes him a soccer icon.

TV Series.title: The Cinder Path
TV Series.overview: Seeking redemption, the son of a totalitarian farmer joins the Western Front of World War I and faces not only the enemy, but also his inner demons.

TV Series.title: The Last Tycoon
TV Series.overview: An up-and-coming studio executive struggles find a place in the movie industry while dealing with his boss and mentor.

TV Series.title: The Frankenstein Chronicles
TV Series.overview: Sean Bean (Time) stars as Inspector John Marlott, who investigates a series of crimes in 19th century London, potentially committed by a scientist seeking to re-animate the dead.

TV Series.title: Kronprinz Rudolf
TV Series.overview: Unhappy and isolated, Crown Prince Rudolf begins a tempestuous affair that could threaten his future as heir to the Habsburg monarchy.

TV Series.title: Yosi, the Regretful Spy
TV Series.overview: An intelligence officer, whose infiltration into the Jewish community could have been used to commit two terrorist attacks in his country, looks for justice before he and his family get killed.

TV Series.title: The Stuarts: A Bloody Reign
TV Series.overview: Cuatro reyes de la Casa de Estuardo ocuparon el trono inglés entre 1603 y 1688. Fue una época de gran conflicto e inestabilidad política.

TV Series.title: The Tide of Life
TV Series.overview: The lively and unconventional Emily Kennedy learns valuable lessons about life and love while navigating relationships with three very different men.

TV Series.title: Lillie
TV Series.overview: Follows the life of British blueblood Lillie Langtry who defied societal convention to become an internationally renowned stage actress.

TV Series.title: Forbidden History
TV Series.overview: We lift the lid on history’s great mysteries by tunneling deeper and traveling wider into ancient relics, hidden treasures and conspiracy theories.

TV Series.title: History in the Making
TV Series.overview: Reveals the addictive and endlessly entertaining process of making historically significant items using the original, time-honored methods.

TV Series.title: The Last Journey Of The Vikings
TV Series.overview: Travel 1000 years into the past for a dramatic recreation of the Vikings' departure from their homeland of Scandinavia for a new life overseas.

TV Series.title: Great British Ships
TV Series.overview: A new view of some of the greatest ships in Britain’s history, from the wrecks of the Mary Rose and the Titanic, to the majesty of the Cutty Sark.

TV Series.title: The Bletchley Circle
TV Series.overview: Four women who secretly cracked Axis communications code in World War II in England come together to solve a terrible series of violent murders.

TV Series.title: Life of a Mistress
TV Series.overview: After the death of her wealthy lover, a born mistress becomes a slave to be auctioned to her lover’s cruel nemesis who will now own her entire being.

TV Series.title: Dates That Made History
TV Series.overview: Historian Patrick Boucheron guides viewers through the story of the world through by exploring a few decisive events that changed history.

TV Series.title: Royal Inquest
TV Series.overview: Scandal, assassination, drug deals and kidnapping plots are just some of the more shocking scandals of royal families investigated in this series.

TV Series.title: To Catch a Smuggler
TV Series.overview: The security team at the El Dorado International Airport in Bogotá works to prevent smuggling.

TV Series.title: Ekaterina
TV Series.overview: Popular historical drama about Russia's Empress, Ekaterina II, also known as Catherine the Great and her rise to power and passionate entanglements.

TV Series.title: The Celts: Blood, Iron and Sacrifice
TV Series.overview: Hosted by anthropologist and professor Alice Roberts, and archaeologist Neil Oliver, this three-part documentary discovers the origins and beliefs of the Celts in artifacts and human remains across Europe. What emerges is not a portrait of wild people on the western fringes of Europe, but a highly sophisticated tribal culture that influenced vast areas of the ancient world - and even Rome.

TV Series.title: Cleopatra
TV Series.overview: The Egyptian princess-turned-queen conducts two high-profile affairs and bears an out-of-wedlock son while protecting her kingdom from the Romans.

TV Series.title: History Uncovered
TV Series.overview: Myths die hard, and the history of the 20th century is no exception. This series examines the major events of the 20th century through a new lens.

TV Series.title: A Woman of Independent Means
TV Series.overview: Follows seven decades of love, loss and courage in the life of a member of Dallas’ high society through her two marriages, three children and beyond.

TV Series.title: Mansfield Park
TV Series.overview: When impoverished Fanny is sent to live with her wealthy aunt and uncle, she struggles to feel accepted in this adaptation of Jane Austen’s novel.

TV Series.title: The Wingless Bird
TV Series.overview: In the shadow of the war, Agnes supports her sister’s ambitious marriage while grappling with her own conflicts between love and societal expectation.

TV Series.title: Crimes That Made History
TV Series.overview: From Jack the Ripper to Jonestown and Roswell, relive crimes and events-turned-sensational news that left an indelible mark on their time in history.

TV Series.title: Inventions That Shook the World
TV Series.overview: This educational series explores each decade’s life-changing inventions: from the radio to the machine gun, and everything in between.

TV Series.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
TV Series.overview: Join Professor Alice Roberts as she explores Britain's historic towns, revealing the various challenges that each time period brought.

TV Series.title: Royal Murder Mysteries
TV Series.overview: These programmes feature modern investigations into history's most notorious murder cases involving royalty in Russia, Germany, Kenya and Great Britain.

TV Series.title: Cursed Bloodlines
TV Series.overview: This series tells the stories of some of history’s most prominent families who seemed to have it all but were plagued by tragedy and misfortune.

TV Series.title: Greatest Tank Battles
TV Series.overview: Action-packed series about the fiercest, most suspenseful tank battles around the world, featuring ultra-realistic animation and eyewitness stories.

TV Series.title: The Terminal List: Dark Wolf
TV Series.overview: Before THE TERMINAL LIST, Navy SEAL Ben Edwards (Taylor Kitsch) finds himself entangled in the black operations side of the CIA. The deeper Ben goes into the ‘gray’, the harder it will become to not give himself over to his darker impulses. Every man has two wolves inside him – light and dark – fighting for control. Which wolf will Ben Edwards feed?

TV Series.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
TV Series.overview: The story of the Batman's journey to the screen through false starts, accidents, big personalities, and endless reinventions. A visionary director, two upstart producers and an unlikely star overcome a troubled production to deliver a hit. After the sequel fell flat, it would take a director with a vision grounded in reality to resuscitate it.

TV Series.title: Icons Unearthed: Marvel
TV Series.overview: The Marvel Cinematic Universe is the most successful franchise of all time and it has changed the way movies are made. Each film would introduce one key protagonist, building toward the release of one giant blockbuster, The Avengers, that would put them all together. If a single one of those films failed at the box office, it could derail what may be the biggest gamble in the history of cinema.

TV Series.title: Moby Dick
TV Series.overview: A ship's crew finds itself under the mad will of Captain Ahab, whose vengeful need to slay the great whale Moby Dick has become a dangerous obsession.

TV Series.title: Merlin
TV Series.overview: The legendary magician Merlin recounts the story of his war against Queen Mab and his role in the reign of King Arthur.

TV Series.title: Black Scorpion
TV Series.overview: A city police detective takes to the streets as the vigilante Black Scorpion after her father is shot by a corrupt district attorney.

TV Series.title: ReBoot
TV Series.overview: Inside a computer mainframe is an entire world Guardian Bob and his trusty friends must defend from the super-virus attacks threatening the system.

TV Series.title: Steve Canyon
TV Series.overview: An Air Force pilot and Big Thunder Air Force Base commander troubleshoots his way from base to base when he's not busy solving his personal problems.

TV Series.title: Death and Compromise
TV Series.overview: The price is high for two Texan outlaws whose run-in with a corrupt deputy gets them framed for murder as they become targets of a sheriff’s wrath.

TV Series.title: I Spy
TV Series.overview: Kelly Robinson (Robert Culp) and Alexander Scott (Bill Cosby) travel around the world posing as an international tennis star and his trainer, under cover of their real profession as agents for the United States government.

TV Series.title: The Incredible Journey of Mary Bryant
TV Series.overview: A true epic of an extraordinary young woman and her fight for the freedom and dignity of her young family in the penal colony of Botany Bay, on the open seas of the Pacific Ocean, in the fine homes of Timor and in the courts of Georgian England.

TV Series.title: Enemy at the Door
TV Series.overview: A compelling drama series about life in the British Channel Islands under German occupation during World War II; passionate battles against restraint, pragmatic struggles with principle and internal conflicts rage as fiercely as those on the battlefield. Ultimately, both sides find they are compromised as much by the actions of their compatriots as they are by the enemy that is always at the door.

TV Series.title: Merlin's Apprentice
TV Series.overview: This magical series follows the epic sorcerer Merlin and his young apprentice Jack as they discover the Holy Grail and restore Camelot.

TV Series.title: Farscape: The Peacekeeper Wars
TV Series.overview: When a full-scale war is engaged by the evil Scarran Empire, the Peacekeeper Alliance has but one hope: reassemble human astronaut John Crichton.

TV Series.title: RoboCop: The Series
TV Series.overview: In a near-future Detroit, the remains of a gruesomely slain police officer are pieced together by a corporation to create a cybernetic crime fighter.

TV Series.title: Robin of Sherwood
TV Series.overview: History and mythology mix in this gritty telling of the legendary outlaw defender of the oppressed and his band of merry men in Sherwood Forest.

TV Series.title: El Candidato
TV Series.overview: In "El Candidato," rookie CIA field operative Isabel Alfaro works alongside infamous CIA legend Wayne Addison to bring down Rafael Bautista, Mexico's most vicious and brilliant narco. Her mission brings her into conflict with Eduardo Yzaguirre, her former boyfriend and the current Mayor of Mexico City, the cleanest and most inspirational politician in the country.

TV Series.title: Sophia
TV Series.overview: In 15th-century Russia, the last Byzantium Princess, Sophia Palaiologina, moved from Rome to Moscow to marry Czar Ivan III. Destined to become the first influential female figure of the Russian Empire, Sophia overcomes court intrigue and betrayals and helps Ivan consolidate the fragmented country, push Mongolian invaders out, and build the Kremlin.

TV Series.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
TV Series.overview: Based on the Shonen Jump manga series, this multigenerational tale follows the heroic Joestar family and their never-ending battle against evil.

TV Series.title: Paper Girls
TV Series.overview: Four young friends’ paper routes are disrupted on Hell Day 1988, when they unknowingly time travel to 2019. While searching for a way home, they clash with members of two time-jumping factions at war, and must come face-to-face with their adult selves and learn how to work together to save the world.

TV Series.title: Bonekickers
TV Series.overview: Packed with historical mystery and contemporary action adventure, this witty and fast-paced series centres on a team of talented archaeologists working at the front line of history.

TV Series.title: Hitler: Germany's Fatal Attraction
TV Series.overview: At the turn of the 20th century Europe is in a state of flux, the perfect conditions for the formation of the most terrifying political organization history has seen, the Nazi's. Hitler: Germany's Fatal Attraction tracks the birth, rise and ultimate demise of Hitler and the Nazi Party.

TV Series.title: Paatal Lok
TV Series.overview: A down and out cop lands the case of a lifetime when four suspects are nabbed in the assassination attempt of a prime time journalist. The case turns out to be a devious maze where nothing is what it looks like. The pursuit of it leads him to the dark netherworld - the 'Paatal Lok', and to shocking discoveries in the past of the four suspects.

TV Series.title: Brave 10
TV Series.overview: Before the Warring States era came to a close, legend has it that Yukimura Sanada had been gathering ten warriors with the power to change history.

TV Series.title: Durham County
TV Series.overview: They say there's only six degrees of separation between you and the rest of the world, but sometimes the most brutal evil you can imagine is already part of your world. When Detective Mike Sweeney movies his family from the city to a seemingly idyllic suburb in search of a new start, the appearance of a local serial killer makes his hopes for a new beginning difficult.

TV Series.title: Legend of Earthsea
TV Series.overview: When an amulet that’s kept the peace between humans and dragons for centuries is broken, a neophyte wizard must restore balance and stop an evil king.

TV Series.title: Danger Man
TV Series.overview: John Drake is a special operative for NATO, specializing in security assignments against any subversive element which threatened world peace. The series featured exotic locales from all over the world, as his assignments frequently took him to Africa, Latin America, and the Far East.

TV Series.title: Thunderbirds
TV Series.overview: From a top-secret island base in 2065, the family team at International Rescue engage in a never-ending humanitarian crusade to protect the innocent.

TV Series.title: Dreamkeeper
TV Series.overview: "Dreamkeeper" is a heartfelt miniseries in which the legends of the Native American nations come to life. Grandpa (August Schellenberg, "Free Willy") wants to attend the All Nations ceremony, but he's not feeling well and can't make the drive alone from South Dakota to New Mexico. He recruits his grandson Shane (Eddie Spears) for the trip, whom he regales with vivid stories.

TV Series.title: Mirzapur
TV Series.overview: The power-hungry heir of a millionaire carpet exporter goes to extreme lengths to continue his father's legacy.

TV Series.title: Iria: Zeiram the Animation
TV Series.overview: When an escape mission unleashes the world's deadliest monster, apprentice bounty hunter Iria is forced into the training from hell in this anime classic. Working with rebellious doctors, secret agents, veteran hunters, and more, Iria must halt the all-powerful Zeiram from world domination.

TV Series.title: Tracker
TV Series.overview: An alien bounty hunter scours the Earth for extraterrestrial fugitives but, since they've assumed human form, finding them won't be easy.

TV Series.title: Age of the Living Dead
TV Series.overview: Quarantined by the rest of the world, America harbors both humans and vampires. The tenuous peace between the two factions is ready to explode.

TV Series.title: Professionals
TV Series.overview: When a high-tech medical satellite explodes, a billionaire and his partner enlist the expertise of an ex-intelligence officer to uncover the truth.

TV Series.title: 10.5: Apocalypse
TV Series.overview: A seismologist fights to abate a hellish catastrophe when the aftershocks of an epic earthquake in California trace paths toward two nuclear reactors.

TV Series.title: Yancy Derringer
TV Series.overview: In post-Civil War New Orleans, a charming ex-Confederate soldier-turned gambler and his silent Pawnee Native American partner become crime fighters.

TV Series.title: Detective Maria Kallio
TV Series.overview: Detective Maria Kallio is a drama series about a thirtysomething cop, who dreams of becoming a lawyer but ends up heading the murder squad.

TV Series.title: Touching Evil
TV Series.overview: The BAFTA Awards-nominated series follows the exploits of the celebrated Organized and Serial Crime Unit, especially that of police officer Dave Creegan, who has a special ability to sense and detect criminals.

TV Series.title: Cuffs
TV Series.overview: A team of under-resourced law enforcers in the seaside city of Brighton, England face daily dangers and verbal abuse, all in the name of justice.

TV Series.title: Ring of Fire
TV Series.overview: An oil rig triggers volcanic eruptions across the globe that could mean the end of humanity if a young activist can't stop the ripple effect.

TV Series.title: CAT. 8
TV Series.overview: After an experiment to harness energy from the sun goes wrong, sending a solar flare plunging toward the Earth, one man must try to save humanity.

TV Series.title: Jason and the Argonauts
TV Series.overview: The banished son of a king sails uncharted seas with the legendary band of Greek heroes to find the Golden Fleece and reconquer his kingdom.

TV Series.title: Gallipoli
TV Series.overview: When a 17-year-old lies about his age to enlist with his brother in the Great War, he finds himself caught in the chaos that shaped the Anzac legend.

TV Series.title: The Odyssey
TV Series.overview: King Odysseus endures an arduous and epic journey home to Greece after winning the Trojan War in Homer's epic, magnificently recreated for television.

TV Series.title: Hunter
TV Series.overview: Renegade cop Rick Hunter partners with the equally tough-minded Sgt. Dee Dee McCall, doing whatever it takes to put Los Angeles criminals behind bars.

TV Series.title: Mike Hammer, Private Eye
TV Series.overview: Mickey Spillane's hard-boiled sleuth cracks cases in the chaotic streets of 1990s New York, teeming with danger, deception and dames.

TV Series.title: Water Rats
TV Series.overview: In Sydney, an elite police squad tackles some of the most sinister and brutal crimes that fester in the underbelly of the city’s glittering harbors.

TV Series.title: King Solomon's Mines
