TV Series.overview: A world-famous hunter journeys into the African jungle to search for a man who went missing while searching for the lost treasure of King Solomon.

TV Series.title: Aftershock: Earthquake in New York
TV Series.overview: In chaos-stricken NYC, Mayor Lincoln and ex-Fire Chief Ahearn race to save lives and restore order after a devastating earthquake shatters the city.

TV Series.title: Jack Hunter
TV Series.overview: A globetrotting archaeologist discovers danger and intrigue while searching for an elusive treasure of the ancient Kingdom of Ugarit.

TV Series.title: Troy: Fall of a City
TV Series.overview: An epic story of love and war, intrigue and betrayal.  When Helen and Paris fall in love, they trigger a chain of events that threatens their families and the city of Troy.

TV Series.title: SS-GB
TV Series.overview: The Second World War's Battle of Britain has ended in victory for Hitler's Germany and the population of 1940s Britain struggles to adjust to life under Nazi occupation. When investigating what appears to be a simple black market murder, Detective Douglas Archer, is dragged into a much darker and more treacherous world where the stakes are as high as the ultimate outcome of the war.

TV Series.title: Hawkeye (The First Frontier)
TV Series.overview: Set during the 18th century French and Indian War, a woodsman teams up with a brave English woman whose husband is a prisoner of France.

TV Series.title: Peter Gunn
TV Series.overview: A well-dressed, iconic Los Angeles private investigator loves jazz, has won the hearts of countless women, and is always on the case.

TV Series.title: Hidden: First Born
TV Series.overview: A Stockholm student has a bad accident and, as a result, gains supernatural powers that lead him to an organization with similar people.

TV Series.title: Our Girl
TV Series.overview: Gripping war series that features one storyline each season about a female British army medic deployed to Afghanistan and Kenya, respectively.

TV Series.title: Renegade
TV Series.overview: Reno Raines goes from detective to escaped fugitive to bounty hunter after a crooked fellow cop kills his wife and frames him for the murder.

TV Series.title: Wolfblood
TV Series.overview: Being a teen is hard, but being a Wolfblood is even harder in this series about a young shape-shifter trying to keep her secret from the world.

TV Series.title: King
TV Series.overview: After she is brought on as the lead detective of a major crime task force, a woman tackles leading a series of complicated investigations.

TV Series.title: The Curse of King Tut's Tomb
TV Series.overview: In 1922 Cairo, two archeologists with competing agendas venture to find King Tut’s emerald tablet they believe holds the power to world domination.

TV Series.title: S.O.Z: Soldiers or Zombies
TV Series.overview: Drug lord Alonso Marroquín escapes from a Mexican prison in an attempt to go into hiding. A US military secret experiment goes wrong and the elite unit from the Mexican Police that is after Marroquín gets infected, creating a new zombie species. The Army and the zombies end up at the drug lord’s hideout and a battle for human survival begins.

TV Series.title: Masters of Horror
TV Series.overview: The biggest names in the horror film genre, including John Carpenter, Dario Argento, and Takashi Miike unite to create this series of horror films.

TV Series.title: Clarence
TV Series.overview: Clarence finds something amazing in just about everything. Discover the best that life has to offer--epic pinecone wars, backyard tree forts and the secret worlds beyond milk cartons--all through the eyes of Clarence and his friends, the unpredictable Sumo and overly-cautious Jeff.

TV Series.title: The Lovers
TV Series.overview: The series follows Janet, a foul mouthed Belfast supermarket worker and Seamus a broadcaster with a perfect London life. When Seamus unexpectedly drops into Janet's world they clash and yet also find themselves inextricably drawn to each other...

TV Series.title: Confronting a Serial Killer
TV Series.overview: Author and journalist Jillian Lauren uncovers Sam Little's darkest secrets and aids law enforcement in solving several cold cases; Jillian Lauren races to identify Little's victims.

TV Series.title: FBI: Most Wanted
TV Series.overview: FBI: MOST WANTED is a high-stakes drama that focuses on the Fugitive Task Force, an elite unit that relentlessly pursues and captures the notorious criminals on the Bureau's Most Wanted list.

TV Series.title: The American Revolution
TV Series.overview: This talk is given by Richard Bell of University of Maryland.

TV Series.title: Secrets in the Sand
TV Series.overview: Deserts are often an afterthought when it comes to climate change, but as global temperatures increase, they are among the most vulnerable places on the planet. Violent sandstorms and erosion are increasingly reshaping the arid regions of the earth and as they do, astounding discoveries are being exposed.

TV Series.title: 90 Day Fiancé
TV Series.overview: Individuals travel to the US on K-1 visas to live with their prospective partners for the first time. The couples must make the lifechanging decision to marry before their visas expire in 90 days or the foreign partner must return home.

TV Series.title: Lakeside Murders
TV Series.overview: In the lakeside city of Tampere Inspector, Koskinen and his team in the Violent Crimes Department grapple with computer viruses, arson, teen gangs and more! From Walter Presents, in Finnish with English subtitles.

TV Series.title: Lost Worlds, Vanished Lives
TV Series.overview: David Attenborough presents a series on fossils and palaeontology.

TV Series.title: Fake or Fortune?
TV Series.overview: Art expert Philip Mould and journalist Fiona Bruce investigate mysteries about paintings to prove authenticity or find the truth behind myths.

TV Series.title: Killer Kings
TV Series.overview: With meticulous research and forensic investigative methods, Killer Kings asks; were some of history's most reviled Kings the merciless murderers they have become known as or were their deadly deeds no more than expected in a time when violence was the norm?

TV Series.title: The 10th Kingdom
TV Series.overview: A father and his daughter are transported from New York into a parallel world of fairy tales to help a prince reclaim his kingdom.

TV Series.title: Gordon Behind Bars
TV Series.overview: Mercurial chef Gordon Ramsay goes to jail in Britain with the hopes of getting some prisoners to give back through making food dishes for the public.

TV Series.title: Embarrassing Pets
TV Series.overview: Experts help desperate owners from across the United Kingdom with their beloved pets' embarrassing and out-of-control behavioral issues.

TV Series.title: Operation Repo
TV Series.overview: In the car capital of the U.S.A. comes a crew in Southern California’s San Fernando Valley working under high pressure while making cars go bye-bye.

TV Series.title: Life’s Funniest Moments
TV Series.overview: Funny and family-friendly, this special features wardrobe malfunctions, sports and wedding fiascos, school play outtakes, pet videos and much more.

TV Series.title: Killer Cakes
TV Series.overview: Host Matthew Lillard welcomes four teams of killer cake artists to an abandoned warehouse, where they will compete for $20,000 and the Golden Knife trophy. They will work with some of the best horror special effects artists in Hollywood to bring their cakes to life and scare the hell out of the show’s expert judges—Scream Queen Danielle Harris and food artist and Halloween aficionado Nikk Alcaraz.

TV Series.title: Would I Lie to You?
TV Series.overview: Led by their team leader, two teams bluff about their deepest secrets, trying to make the other team believe their outrageous stories.

TV Series.title: Money for Nothing
TV Series.overview: Literal trash becomes treasure as a designer rescues refuse from collection sites, turns it into something desirable and then puts it up for sale.

TV Series.title: World's Wildest Police Videos
TV Series.overview: Retired Sheriff John Bunnell hosts this explosive series consisting of the most outrageous police footage: car chases, robberies, riots, arrests and more!

TV Series.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
TV Series.overview: In this reality series, crews work to keep North America's most intense and busiest stretch of highway open in any weather conditions.

TV Series.title: Plastic Surgery Knifemares
TV Series.overview: This series explores what happens when dreams turn into plastic surgery nightmares, and how celebrities influence both the industry and its clients.

TV Series.title: The Celebrity Apprentice
TV Series.overview: It's an new twist to The Apprentice when 14 celebrities compete to raise money for charity and for the title of the very first Celebrity Apprentice.

TV Series.title: The Ibiza Weekender
TV Series.overview: This reality series provides a weekly look at the life of reps working in Ibiza, their interaction with their guests, and their wild adventures.

TV Series.title: Andrew Schrock
TV Series.overview: A family man and skateboarder documents life with his family while pulling jaw-dropping stunts and other fun challenges in this action-packed series.

TV Series.title: Positively Paula
TV Series.overview: Paula Deen invites you into her home for a one-on-one experience while she cooks her favorite recipes, sharing memories and her heart.

TV Series.title: Born To Kill? Class Of Evil
TV Series.overview: Episodes profile a single killer, asking if they were born murderers and drawing comparisons with some of the most infamous serial killers in history.

TV Series.title: Grand Designs
TV Series.overview: Kevin McCloud follows Britain's most ambitious self-building projects, as intrepid individuals attempt to design and construct the home of their dreams

TV Series.title: Three Wives, One Husband
TV Series.overview: Filmmakers go inside Rockland Ranch, a Mormon community in the middle of the Utah desert where half of the men are married to multiple wives.

TV Series.title: Dog School
TV Series.overview: Go inside the world of specialized doggy daycare centers, where dogs of all breeds enjoy playful activities while their owners are at work.

TV Series.title: Flavor of Love
TV Series.overview: 20 different women line up to date rapper Flavor Flav and win his heart, but first they must compete for quality time by taking on various challenges.

TV Series.title: Wife Swap New Zealand
TV Series.overview: Sixteen Kiwi families—from eco-evangelists to devout Christians—swap lives for a week in this emotional look at modern New Zealand homes.

TV Series.title: People Like Pus
TV Series.overview: Welcome to the Skin A&E clinic where four top dermatologists treat patients for skin conditions like cysts, lipomas and skin tags.

TV Series.title: Love it or List it Vancouver
TV Series.overview: Property experts Jillian Harris and Todd Talbot go to battle to convince homeowners to either refurbish on a budget or sell for a dream home.

TV Series.title: Vegas Rat Rods
TV Series.overview: Watch as Steve Darnell and his wacky crew of car fabricators build custom, mind-blowing rat rods near Las Vegas, Nevada.

TV Series.title: Interior Design Masters with Alan Carr
TV Series.overview: Follow as ten talented interior designers transform a variety of spaces while competing for a life-changing contract with a top London hotel.

TV Series.title: Scrapyard Supercar
TV Series.overview: It’s a high-octane race to the finish as pro driver Shane Lynch and his team try to create a top-notch supercar out of everyday scrap materials.

TV Series.title: Super Password
TV Series.overview: Two teams, consisting of a celebrity guest and a contestant, guess words from one word clues given by their partners, with each "password" a clue to the "password puzzle" (the name of a person, place, or thing).

TV Series.title: Highway Thru Hell
TV Series.overview: In this series, follow along as the men of the Jamie Davis Heavy Rescue company battle the treacherous Coquihalla Highway in British Columbia.

TV Series.title: Last Stop Garage
TV Series.overview: A team of mechanics at CRB Automotive in North West River, Labrador, use backwoods ingenuity and mechanical wizardry to fix and build just about anything for anyone.

TV Series.title: Filthy House SOS
TV Series.overview: Cleaning duo, Jon and Brennan are staying over at some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes to teach the homeowners how it should be done. It's an SOS mission to give homeowners a fresh start on cleaning and equip them with the tools needed to keep up a tidy home but it's not going to be easy.

TV Series.title: Saved and Remade
TV Series.overview: A team of master crafters uses their creative vision and skill to transform loved but underutilized objects into beautiful and functional items.

TV Series.title: It's in the Game: Madden NFL
TV Series.overview: It’s one of the biggest video games of all time, a groundbreaking brand that became a worldwide phenomenon, spanning generations—but it almost never happened… Now, 36 years after the first game's release, EA SPORTS gives viewers unprecedented access to the makers of game that changed the game, and our culture too.

TV Series.title: Inside Out Homes
TV Series.overview: Zac Monro, an architect, refurbishes and renovates ordinary homes and transforms them into masterpieces.

TV Series.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
TV Series.overview: At Canadian storage auctions, bidders compete against each other for high-stakes financial gain in this fascinating modern-day treasure hunt.

TV Series.title: The Gymkhana Files
TV Series.overview: Professional rallycross driver Ken Block and his team of Hoonigans attempt to create the greatest automotive video of all time, GymkhanaTEN.

TV Series.title: World’s Toughest Race: Eco-Challenge Fiji
TV Series.overview: 66 teams descend upon Fiji to compete in the most epic global adventure race ever attempted. Bear Grylls hosts this 11-day expedition that pushes competitors to their physical and emotional limits. For the veteran teams the goal is to win – but for most, the dream is to finish and prove to themselves and the world, that they can prevail in the World’s Toughest Race.

TV Series.title: Let's Make a Deal
TV Series.overview: Audience members dress in costumes to catch host Wayne Brady’s attention, make deals for prizes or cash, and try to avoid Zonks.

TV Series.title: June Farms
TV Series.overview: Matt Baumgartner, owner of June Farms, wants to make it the premier event space in the Hudson Valley. He has his hands full every week delivering perfect bespoke weddings. With a staff of fun-loving twenty-somethings, at times more focused on their love lives than their jobs and inclement weather, this wedding season turned out to be the hardest one in June Farm’s history.

TV Series.title: Glitter and Greed: The Lisa Frank Story
TV Series.overview: A four-part documentary event that penetrates the neon-hued world of Lisa Frank Inc., a brand that defined girlhood for a generation of Americans only to seemingly disappear overnight. Behind the rainbows and psychedelic illustrations, we unravel a nostalgia-soaked, stranger-than-fiction tale that takes us into the hidden world that has been lurking at the heart of the company for decades

TV Series.title: Making the Cut
TV Series.overview: In the third season of Making the Cut, Heidi Klum and Tim Gunn welcome 10 established designers from around the world to Los Angeles, CA where they compete to become the next global fashion brand. Each week, winning looks and companion pieces will be available to buy on Amazon in the Making the Cut store, and the last designer standing will receive one million dollars to invest in their brand.

TV Series.title: Wear Whatever the F You Want
TV Series.overview: Style icons Clinton Kelly and Stacy London reunite for the first time in over a decade in a new style transformation show that celebrates individual style and self-expression. The iconic duo are throwing out society’s norms and old fashion rules, no longer telling clients what not to wear, but empowering them to discover their own personal style that authentically reflects who they want to be.

TV Series.title: Born to Kill?
TV Series.overview: "Born to Kill?" takes in-depth dives the childhoods and lives of some of the world's most notorious murderers.

TV Series.title: Blow Up
TV Series.overview: In a celebration of skill, precision, creativity and joy, Blow Up Australia transforms the humble balloon into jaw-dropping and awe-inspiring artistic creations. Prepare to suspend belief as 10 incredibly talented Australian balloon artists converge on the Blow Up studio to weave their magic. What they will achieve will be mind-blowing.

TV Series.title: Project Runway
TV Series.overview: Models and fashion icons judge the works of clothing designers in this intense reality competition series that showcases up-and-coming artists.

TV Series.title: Are You Smarter Than a Celebrity
TV Series.overview: Contestants play for the chance to win up to $100,000 by answering questions about things they learned in grade school. There’s a classroom full of celebrities they can get help from -- including Nikki Glaser, Nicole Byer, Lala Kent, Ryan Fitzpatrick and more! Can they ace grades 1 through 5 for a chance to play for the big money? Or will they flunk out along the way? It’s time to find out!

TV Series.title: The Pasta Queen
TV Series.overview: The Pasta Queen features NY Times bestselling author Nadia Caterina Munno, a descendant of an Italian pasta dynasty, who has racked up millions of followers on social. Come along as Nadia explores four regions of Italy highlighting their cuisine and ingredients. Back in her kitchen she will give step-by-step instructions on how to make Italian dishes, like a real Italian, that are just gorgeous!

TV Series.title: Extreme Cake Makers
TV Series.overview: A reality series lifting the lid on the elite bakers turning cakes into works of art. Narrated by Rufus Hound.

TV Series.title: The GOAT
TV Series.overview: Daniel Tosh welcomes 14 reality superstars into a hilarious, drama-filled new competition show where both the strong and totally clueless can survive! Each week, Bachelors, Housewives, Food Network stars, and Shahs of Sunset will face off and eliminate each other until one person is crowned reality television's Greatest of All Time.

TV Series.title: Rick Steves' Europe
TV Series.overview: The American globetrotter and author of acclaimed travel guides shares his cultural adventures and pointers as he showcases the best of Europe.

TV Series.title: Hell's Kitchen
TV Series.overview: Los concursantes de este reality se someten a las duras críticas del célebre chef Gordon Ramsay con la esperanza de dirigir uno de sus restaurantes.

TV Series.title: Fear Factor
TV Series.overview: In each pulse-racing episode, contestants from across the country battle in extreme stunts designed to challenge them both physically and mentally.

TV Series.title: JANET JACKSON.
TV Series.overview: On this week’s That Time When we’re recounting the moment when a simple wardrobe malfunction nearly ended the career of Janet Jackson.

TV Series.title: Paranormal Nightshift
TV Series.overview: Night is something we lock the door against. Since the Middle Ages, night is considered to be the time when spirits return. Our fear of the witching hours makes us bolt the windows, huddle on the couch, or go directly to bed. But not everyone is so lucky.

TV Series.title: Sam & Colby
TV Series.overview: Sam and Colby explore and document the creepiest haunted sites while maintaining their infectious humor in even the darkest of situations.

TV Series.title: Emergency
TV Series.overview: Close-up as the lead trauma services treat critically-injured patients across London

TV Series.title: Container Masters
TV Series.overview: Shipping containers are turned into beautiful homes and building projects, as the Container Master team brings their clients' unique dreams to life.

TV Series.title: Sneaky Pete
TV Series.overview: A con man (Giovanni Ribisi) on the run from a vicious gangster (Bryan Cranston) takes cover from his past by assuming the identity of his prison cellmate, Pete, "reuniting" with Pete's estranged family, a colorful, dysfunctional group that threatens to drag him into a world just as dangerous as the one he's trying to escape - and, just maybe, give him a taste of the loving family he's never had.

TV Series.title: Murder Call
TV Series.overview: A male and female detective with their own distinct styles and occasional tensions set out to close open murder cases in Sydney, Australia.

TV Series.title: Troppo
TV Series.overview: Im australischen Sumpfland verschwindet Jong Min, ein Hightechprofi aus Korea. Für die Privatdetektivin Amanda Pharell ist dies der erste eigene Fall. Sie bittet den labilen Ex-Polizisten Ted um Hilfe, der unschuldig eines Verbrechens bezichtigt wurde. Die beiden ungewöhnlichen Ermittler stoßen bei ihren Nachforschungen bald auf die Leiche des Koreaners - oder besser gesagt, einem Teil davon.

TV Series.title: Murder City
TV Series.overview: This series is an edgy British cop drama that revolves around a pair of mismatched detectives scouring London to solve complex cases.

TV Series.title: Panic
TV Series.overview: In the forgotten town of Carp, Texas, Panic is the only way out. Every summer the graduating seniors risk their lives competing in a series of challenges for the chance to win life-changing money. After the death of two players the stakes – and danger—have never been higher. This summer twenty-three players will enter the game. All of them will be changed. Only one will win. Let the games begin.

TV Series.title: The Bay
TV Series.overview: In a town cursed by a senator's spirit, wealthy residents and young socialites indulge in scandals, defying the supernatural legacy that haunts them.

TV Series.title: She-Wolves: England's Early Queens
TV Series.overview: Historian of England's medieval period Helen Castor presents an in-depth and insightful series covering England's early Queens.

TV Series.title: True Justice
TV Series.overview: An ex-special forces agent and martial arts expert joins an undercover police squad that carries out a brutal brand of law enforcement on the streets.

TV Series.title: Dickensian
TV Series.overview: This series brings together iconic characters from the novels of Charles Dickens as their lives intertwine in 19th-century London.

TV Series.title: War and Peace
TV Series.overview: In this BAFTA winning adaptation of Leo Tolstoy's timeless novel, three young people experience life, love and loss against the epic backdrop of Russia's wars with Napoleon.

TV Series.title: Being Human
TV Series.overview: A trio of twenty-something roommates in Boston try to eke out a normal existence despite being a werewolf, a ghost, and a vampire.

TV Series.title: Death Note
TV Series.overview: Light Yagami is just another bored student until he finds the Death Note, a mysterious notebook that grants the power to kill anyone he names.

TV Series.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
TV Series.overview: In a town full of secrets, a group of teenagers are stalked by a mysterious killer a year after a fatal accident on their graduation night.

TV Series.title: The Time of Our Lives
TV Series.overview: The Time of Our Lives is a drama series, set in a moody inner-city Melbourne, which follows the lives of a typical extended Australian family, in all its contemporary variations.

TV Series.title: Rush
TV Series.overview: Inside a critical incident response unit, police use cutting edge tactics and tech to defuse crises, save lives and prevent crime before it happens.

TV Series.title: Moving On
TV Series.overview: From addiction to infidelity to grief, this anthology series tackles the complex stories of people who reach a crucial turning point in their lives.

TV Series.title: The Bridge
TV Series.overview: Two detectives from the United States and Mexico work together to take down a serial killer operating on both sides of the Texas-Chihuahua border.

TV Series.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
TV Series.overview: In 1950s Australia, a doctor returns home after a 30-year absence to take over his father’s practice and his job as the town’s on-call police surgeon.

TV Series.title: Hunters
TV Series.overview: In the wake of personal tragedy, Jonah Heidelbaum joins a band of Nazi Hunters who uncover a bloody plot to start a Fourth Reich in 1977 New York City.

TV Series.title: Aristocrats
TV Series.overview: Based on a true story by Stella Tillyard, a chronicle of the turbulent lives of the Lennox sisters, daughters of the Duke of Richmond, in the eighteenth century.

TV Series.title: Pandemic
TV Series.overview: When a deadly virus strain infects densely populated Los Angeles, a CDC doctor and her team must produce a vaccine while battling a local politician.

TV Series.title: Wild West Chronicles
TV Series.overview: A legendary gunslinger and sheriff decides to become a newspaperman, traveling around the wild frontier to document the ever-changing stories.

TV Series.title: Wycliffe
TV Series.overview: Satanic rituals, explosions and shootings are just some of the intriguing murder cases that DS Wycliffe and his team tackle on their patch of rugged Cornish coast.

TV Series.title: Homecoming
TV Series.overview: A caseworker at a facility that helps soldiers transition back to civilian life leaves to start a new life, living with her mother and working as a small-town waitress.

TV Series.title: Kingdom
TV Series.overview: Alvey and Lisa are struggling to keep their gym, Navy Street, afloat. Their best hope is Alvey's son Nate, an up and coming fighter. Jay, Alvey's other son, is on the outs with his father. When Lisa's ex and former MMA champ, Ryan, shows up, complications arise. Nate has secrets of his own which may hold him back.

TV Series.title: Expats
TV Series.overview: Set against the complex tapestry of Hong Kong residents, EXPATS depicts a multifaceted group of women after a single encounter sets off a chain of life-altering events that leaves everyone navigating the intricate balance between blame and accountability.

TV Series.title: Deadwater Fell
TV Series.overview: When an outwardly perfect family is murdered by someone they knew, cracks start to appear on the surface of a supposedly happy community.

TV Series.title: MotherFatherSon
TV Series.overview: In this psycho-thriller, Max Finch is the owner of a media empire that dominates British politics and power. When his son’s self-destructive lifestyle spirals out of control, the devastating consequences threaten his family's future and their empire.

TV Series.title: Handsome Devils
TV Series.overview: Real-life stories of lovable, outwardly charming men whose inner selves hide cold-blooded killers who will stop at nothing to get what they want.

TV Series.title: Sue Thomas: F.B.Eye
TV Series.overview: Inspired by a true story, a deaf woman uses her lip-reading skills and trusty dog to help an FBI surveillance team bring bad guys to justice.

TV Series.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction
TV Series.overview: Each episode of this cult anthology series presents several stories that appear to defy logic - the supernatural, ghosts, psychic phenomena, destiny and the divine - and offers the viewer a chance to decide what is fact and what is fiction.

TV Series.title: American Playboy: The Hugh Hefner Story
TV Series.overview: [Select Subtitles available in May] A fascinating docuseries chronicling Playboy magazine’s charismatic founder, Hugh Hefner, and his impact on global culture. Told from his unique perspective with never-before-seen footage from his private archive, discover the captivating story about the man behind the bunny.

TV Series.title: The Wilds
TV Series.overview: A group of teen girls from different backgrounds must fight for survival after a plane crash strands them on a deserted island. The castaways both clash and bond as they learn more about each other, the secrets they keep, and the traumas they've all endured. There’s just one twist to this thrilling Drama - Coming of Age … these girls did not end up on this island by accident.

TV Series.title: The Luminaries
TV Series.overview: An intricate, suspenseful tale of love, murder, magic, and revenge on the West Coast of New Zealand’s South Island during the 1860s gold rush.

TV Series.title: The Underground Railroad
TV Series.overview: From Academy Award® winner Barry Jenkins and based on the Pulitzer Prize-winning novel by Colson Whitehead, "The Underground Railroad" is a new series that chronicles Cora Randall’s desperate bid for freedom in the Antebellum South. After escaping a Georgia plantation for the rumored Underground Railroad, Cora discovers no mere metaphor, but an actual railroad beneath the Southern soil.

TV Series.title: Rescue: Special Ops
TV Series.overview: An elite team of paramedics scales mountains, sails the high seas, and dances through flames to save those in need, all while juggling love and life.

TV Series.title: Hand of God
TV Series.overview: After suffering through a tragic event, a judge with questionable morals suffers a breakdown and believes he can hear God speaking to him.

TV Series.title: Patriot
TV Series.overview: Follows the turbulent life of intelligence officer John Tavner, who is tasked with going undercover to prevent Iran from going nuclear.

TV Series.title: The Lost Prince
TV Series.overview: This is the little-known story of Prince John, the youngest child of George V and Queen Mary, whose short life spanned a momentous period in history - the political build-up to the First World War. This drama tells the very human story of a unique family and an extraordinary boy.

TV Series.title: Medici: Masters of Florence
TV Series.overview: Intrigue abounds in 15th-century Renaissance Florence as the visionary Medici banking dynasty flexes its power in politics and the arts.

TV Series.title: Sherlock Holmes
TV Series.overview: Follow Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's beloved master detective, along with his assistant Dr. Watson, as they take on the criminal underbelly of London.

TV Series.title: Highway to Heaven
TV Series.overview: An earthbound probationary angel and a skeptical ex-cop wander from town to town using heavenly wisdom and otherworldly powers to guide lost souls.

TV Series.title: The Fall
TV Series.overview: The acclaimed crime series about a grim and gripping battle of wits between a brazen serial killer and a top-notch detective out to stop him.

TV Series.title: Wentworth
TV Series.overview: A woman sent to a high-security prison navigates brutal rivalries and shifting loyalties as she fights to survive and gains power behind bars.

TV Series.title: The Outpost
TV Series.overview: Years after her village is destroyed by a gang, Talon seeks vengeance against those who killed her family while embracing her destiny to survive.

TV Series.title: The Mallorca Files
TV Series.overview: Max and Miranda’s partnership has finally found its rhythm. And just in time too, because there’s no shortage of murky cases waiting to be cracked. Everything from an opera star singing his final notes in the famous Drax caves, to the dark history of the Spanish Civil War resurfacing all too literally

TV Series.title: 15/Love
TV Series.overview: The show focuses on the lives of hopeful teenage tennis players as they train at the Cascadia Tennis Academy. In this high-pressure environment, the characters struggle through adolescence and romance while trying to become the world champion tennis stars that they and others think they can be.

TV Series.title: Two Weeks to Live
TV Series.overview: Fifteen years after her dad’s murder, a 21-year-old raised as a misfit by her mom in isolation begins a mission to honor his memory and get revenge.

TV Series.title: As We See It
TV Series.overview: The series follows Jack, Harrison, and Violet, 20-something roommates on the autism spectrum, as they strive to get a job, keep a job, make friends, fall in love, and navigate a world that eludes them. With the help of their families, aide, and sometimes even each other, these roommates experience setbacks and celebrate triumphs on their own unique journeys towards independence and acceptance.

TV Series.title: Transparent
TV Series.overview: When the Pfefferman family patriarch makes a dramatic admission, the entire family's secrets start to spill out, and each of them spin in a different direction as they begin to figure out who they are going to become. Starring Jeffrey Tambor, Judith Light, Amy Landecker, Jay Duplass, and Gaby Hoffman

TV Series.title: With Love
TV Series.overview: WITH LOVE is a one-hour romantic dramedy series centered around siblings Lily and Jorge Diaz and their family, tracking their stories over the course of a year through the framework of the most heightened days of the year… the holidays. The Diaz’s will weave in and out of the lives of seemingly unrelated people as they search for love.

TV Series.title: Puberty Blues
TV Series.overview: Inseparable teenage friends Debbie and Sue explore love, freedom, and surfing amid the changing tides late of 1970s Sydney.

TV Series.title: Thermae Romae
TV Series.overview: Lucius, a Roman architect, is transported through time to modern-day Japan, where he learns about Japanese bathhouses and uses this to his gain back home.

TV Series.title: Honey and Clover
TV Series.overview: A heartwarming tale of youth, love, soul-searching, and self-discovery, intricately woven through the complex relationships between five friends at an arts college.

TV Series.title: Library War
TV Series.overview: In a dystopian future where armed forces fight over the censorship of books, a young librarian dreams of finding the man who changed her life forever.

TV Series.title: Tetsujin 28
TV Series.overview: It’s been ten years since World War II ended, and now a young boy uses his control over a giant robot to accomplish his own secret missions.

TV Series.title: Love Hina
TV Series.overview: Keitaro, Naru, and all their friends are back in an animated series based after both the specials. Keitaro's still trying to get Naru, but he isn't the only one. Of course, the other person's trying to get Naru in a different way.

TV Series.title: Bartender
TV Series.overview: Welcome to Eden Hall, where gifted mixologist Ryu Sasakura listens to his customers’ painful life stories while serving them unrivaled cocktails.

TV Series.title: Cyborg 009
TV Series.overview: Nine super-powered cyborg soldiers join forces to combat Black Ghost, the terrorist organization which they were originally created to serve.

TV Series.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
TV Series.overview: Twins Towa and Setsuna reunite after ten years of not seeing each other and discover they are the half-demon daughters of the great demon Sesshomaru.

TV Series.title: Angel Cop
TV Series.overview: In a futuristic Japan, an elite secret agent must restore justice by overthrowing a sinister conspiracy pulling the strings in the shadows.

TV Series.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
TV Series.overview: New Domino City, the playground of legendary duelist Yugi Muto, has transformed into a futuristic society where dueling has kicked into overdrive.

TV Series.title: Monsuno
TV Series.overview: Monsuno hurtled through space eons before man existed. It once brought chaos and extinction to Earth. Then, it vanished. Now, Monsuno is back.

TV Series.title: Hakugei: Legend of the Moby Dick
TV Series.overview: A courageous young man embarks on a journey to find the only person who can save his planet from the most terrifying beast in the universe-the great white whale Moby Dick-in this futuristic anime adaptation of the literary classic.

TV Series.title: Borat’s American Lockdown & Debunking Borat
TV Series.overview:
Live the real-life drama of Sacha Baron Cohen, as Borat Sagdivev, where he spends five days at the peak of the Covid-19 pandemic with two conspiracy theorists.  

Then, in Debunking Borat, see the two conspiracy theorists have their theories debunked by some of the world’s leading experts.

TV Series.title: Justice on Trial
TV Series.overview: Judge Judy Sheindlin puts the American justice system on trial in a true crime high-stakes courtroom drama, as she and her expert legal team recreate the trials from notorious cases where following the letter of the law did not necessarily feel “just.” Season 1 spans from the 1925 Scopes Monkey Trial to a case in which the convicted killer is currently on Death Row.

TV Series.title: Man with a Plan
TV Series.overview: Man With A Plan stars Matt LeBlanc in a comedy about an old-school guy confronting the modern challenges of parenting, marriage and family. Adam’s self-assured wife, Andi, has gone back to work, forcing him to deal with the startling discovery that his three school-age "little angels" are maniacs, all the while trying to run a contracting business with his troublemaker brother, Don.

TV Series.title: Star Trek: Lower Decks
TV Series.overview: In season four of STAR TREK: LOWER DECKS, an unknown force is destroying starships and threatening galactic peace.

TV Series.title: Evil By Design: Surviving Nygård
TV Series.overview: Finnish immigrant Peter Nygård quickly rises to become the darling of the Canadian fashion world. But behind the scenes at his garment company, employees endured verbal and sexual abuse and assault. This series explores the investigation and evidence.

TV Series.title: Tales of the Walking Dead
TV Series.overview: "Tales of the Walking Dead" is an episodic anthology series with one-hour standalone episodes focused on both new and established characters set in the world of the original series.

TV Series.title: Seduced: Inside the NXIVM Cult
TV Series.overview: This four-part documentary series chronicles the extraordinary and harrowing journey of India Oxenberg who was seduced into the modern-day sex-slave cult NXIVM, where she spent seven years.

TV Series.title: Men in Kilts: A Roadtrip with Sam and Graham
TV Series.overview: Actors Sam Heughan and Graham McTavish explore their homeland of Scotland, delving into its culture and history.

TV Series.title: Sweetbitter
TV Series.overview: Shortly after arriving in New York City, 22-year-old Tess lands a job at a celebrated downtown restaurant and learns to navigate the chaotically alluring, yet punishing life she has stumbled upon.

TV Series.title: Ray Donovan
TV Series.overview: Ray Donovan does the dirty work for LA’s top power players. Liev Schreiber stars as Ray, with Jon Voight as his disruptive father.

TV Series.title: The Ipcress File
TV Series.overview: As the Cold War rages, an ex-smuggler turned spy finds himself embroiled in a dangerous mission.

TV Series.title: Mary & George
TV Series.overview: The story of the Countess of Buckingham who moulded her son to seduce King James I and become his all-powerful lover, through intrigue, becoming richer, more titled and influential than England has ever seen.

TV Series.title: Kevin Can F**K Himself
TV Series.overview: Married to a husky man-child, Allison McRoberts is a stereotypical sitcom wife who finally wakes up and rebels against the injustices in her life.

TV Series.title: The Flight Attendant Murders
TV Series.overview: True Crime on C4: The murders of four flight attendants in the 70s and 80s are re-examined

TV Series.title: Monsieur Spade
TV Series.overview: Twenty years after the events of the novel "THE MALTESE FALCON", Sam Spade has retired in the small town of Bozouls in the South of France. It's 1963, the war has ended, and in a very short time, so, too, will Spade's tranquility.

TV Series.title: The Little Drummer Girl
TV Series.overview: Based on John le Carré's novel, The Little Drummer Girl is a passionate love story and a deeply immersive thriller, starring Florence Pugh, Alexander Skarsgård and Michael Shannon, and directed by Park Chan-wook.

TV Series.title: The White Queen
TV Series.overview: "The White Queen" is uniquely told through the perspective of three relentless women - Elizabeth Woodville, Margaret Beaufort and Anne Neville, in their quest for power they will scheme, manipulate and seduce their way onto the English throne.

TV Series.title: A Discovery of Witches
TV Series.overview: In the final series of A Discovery of Witches, Matthew and Diana return from their trip to 1590 to find tragedy at Sept-Tours. They must find the missing pages from the Book of Life and the Book before it's too late. Their enemies are gearing up against them, and a monster from Matthew's past who has been lying in wait will return for revenge.

TV Series.title: The Serpent Queen
TV Series.overview: A historical drama with an edge, The Serpent Queen puts a contemporary spin on the rise to power of Catherine de Medici, who, against all odds, became one of the most powerful and longest-serving rulers in French history.

TV Series.title: The North Water
TV Series.overview: Patrick Sumner, a disgraced ex-army surgeon signs up as ship's doctor on a whaling vessel.

TV Series.title: The White Princess
TV Series.overview: The story of Elizabeth of York, the White Queen's daughter, and her marriage to the Lancaster victor, Henry VII.

TV Series.title: Talamasca: The Secret Order
TV Series.overview: Guy Anatole is just a regular guy. Until he gets tapped by the spy agency of the immortal world to join its clandestine forces. We follow Guy as he navigates this new world and discovers unexpected connections to his family's past.

TV Series.title: That Dirty Black Bag
TV Series.overview: A sheriff with a troubled past has an eight-day clash with a ruthless bounty hunter.

TV Series.title: Dexter: Original Sin
TV Series.overview: Miami, 1991; when his bloodthirsty urges can't be ignored any longer, young Dexter Morgan must learn to channel his inner darkness as he transitions from student to avenging serial killer with the guidance of his father, Harry.

TV Series.title: Dublin Murders
TV Series.overview: "Dublin Murders" is an eight-part mystery series with a taproot that drops deep down into Ireland's past, foreshadows the present and brings insight to its future.

TV Series.title: Dirk Gently's Holistic Detective Agency
TV Series.overview: The vast dangers lurking in a fantasy realm find their way to Earth, becoming a threat in reality, and itâ€™s up to Dirk and the gang to stop them.

TV Series.title: Deadliest Catch
TV Series.overview: Forty-foot waves, hurricane force winds, heavy-machinery and massive icebergs are just a few reasons that no season is ever the same on the Bering Sea. Surrounded by death and injury, these brave men struggle to return alive from man’s oldest journey.

TV Series.title: Are You Afraid of the Dark?
TV Series.overview: In 6 celebrity-filled spooky stories Neve Campbell serves fear soup, Eddie Kaye Thomas captures chaos, Will Friedle escapes death, Ryan Gosling reaches through the radio, Elisha Cuthbert tells of hungry hosts and Jay Baruchel is haunted by stage fright.

TV Series.title: Rise of the Nazis
TV Series.overview: How did Germany fall into the hands of fascists? This is the inside perspective on Hitler’s journey to power. It’s told through the eyes of his inner circle, those who paved his way to power and those who tried to stop him.

TV Series.title: Wild China
TV Series.overview: With splendour, scale and romance, Wild China lifts the veil on the world's most enigmatic and magnificent country, delving into its vibrant habitats to reveal a land of unbelievable natural complexity. Journey across China from the glittering peaks of the Himalayas to the barren steppe, the sub-Arctic to the tropical islands, through deserts both searingly hot and mind-numbingly cold and see, in pioneering images, a dazzling array of mysterious, beautiful, wild and rare creatures.

TV Series.title: Farming Life in Another World
TV Series.overview: When a godlike figure gives Hiraku a chance to live again, he wishes to be healthy, to live peacefully, to speak the local language, and to spend his days on an idyllic farm.

TV Series.title: Jury Duty
TV Series.overview: Jury Duty is a documentary-style comedy series that shares the inner workings of an American jury trial through the eyes of one particular juror. The Exclusive Cast Commentary includes secrets from the jury box, told by director Jake Szymanski, Ronald Gladden, and the jurors including James Marsden, Mekki Leeper, Cassandra Blair, and Maria Russell.

TV Series.title: I Love Dick
TV Series.overview: Adapted from the lauded feminist novel, I LOVE DICK is set in a colorful academic community in Marfa, Texas. It tells the story of a struggling married couple, Chris and Sylvere, and their obsession with a charismatic professor named Dick. Told in Rashomon-style shifts of POV, I LOVE DICK charts the unraveling of a marriage, the awakening of an artist and the deification of a reluctant messiah.

TV Series.title: One Mississippi
TV Series.overview: A dark comedy, loosely inspired by Tig Notaro's life.

TV Series.title: Cuckoo
TV Series.overview: The proud father of a Midlands family grapples with the chaos following his daughter's marriage to a crazy hippie traveler named Cuckoo.

TV Series.title: Snobs
TV Series.overview: Three unlikely friends - Abby, the daughter of a wealthy, middle-class traditional family; Marian, a boy from a group of modern-day nomads known as Ferals; and Marian's almost human dog, Snobs. The series is set in the picture postcard community of Tranquil Waters on Sydney's northern beaches.

TV Series.title: The Tick
TV Series.overview: In a world where superheroes have been real for decades, an accountant with mental health issues and zero powers comes to suspect his city is owned by a global super villain long-thought dead. As he struggles to uncover the conspiracy, he falls in league with a strange blue superhero. They launch into an adventure brimming with crazed archvillains, blood-soaked vigilantes, and superhuman freakery.

TV Series.title: Trailer Park Boys: JAIL
TV Series.overview: Take three Trailer Park Boys, add one dysfunctional TV network, stir in a bunch of illicit activity and a healthy dose of profanity. Whaddya get? A combo platter of comedy entertainment that will spawn shipping containers of laughter. Welcome to Trailer Park Boys: The SwearNet Show.

TV Series.title: The Uncle Roger Show
TV Series.overview: Watch along as the king of internet reactions, champion of MSG and divorced bachelor works various jobs, roasts celebrity chefs and looks for love.

TV Series.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
TV Series.overview: A wartime sitcom about the French Resistance, with farcical events that unfold in and around a café run by René Artois.

TV Series.title: Together
TV Series.overview: Comedy series centering around two young people in the early, fragile stages of a new relationship as they deal with the intrusions of their family and friends.

TV Series.title: 6teen
TV Series.overview: This sharp and amusing mid-00s animated comedy follows the after-school lives of six 16 year-old mall-rats.

TV Series.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
TV Series.overview: Laugh along to one of television's most beloved shows, centering on a TV comedy writer, his charming wife, and goofy office colleagues.

TV Series.title: Plebs
TV Series.overview: The acclaimed British hit comedy series about three young men doing the most to stay employed, relevant, and desired by women in Ancient Rome.

TV Series.title: My Deer Friend Nokotan
TV Series.overview: On her way to school, a teen rescues another student with deer-like antlers from a power line, marking the beginning of an unforgettable adventure.

TV Series.title: The Horror of Dolores Roach
TV Series.overview: After an unjust 16-year prison sentence, Dolores Roach (Justina Machado) returns to a gentrified Washington Heights, where she reunites with an old stoner friend, Luis, who lets her live and work as a masseuse in the basement under his empanada shop. When the promise of her newfound stability is quickly threatened, “Magic Hands” Dolores is driven to shocking extremes to survive.

TV Series.title: Being Human
TV Series.overview: A ghost, a vampire, and a werewolf live together in a house-share, trying to lead normal lives despite their supernatural differences.

TV Series.title: Pure
TV Series.overview: Exploring mental health issues and embarking on a journey of self-discovery is comedy drama `Pure'. Like most 24-year-olds, Marnie is unsure of what the future holds for her. More disconcerting to Marnie, however, are the uncontrollable sexual thoughts and images that plague her mind at the most inappropriate of moments. Feeling helpless to steer her life in the direction she wants to go in and not understanding where these urges originate from, Marnie abruptly leaves her small town in Scotland for London to seek answers. Out of her depth and alone in the big city, Marnie encounters an array of equally lost souls, who all contribute to her turbulent journey of finding herself.

TV Series.title: Offspring
TV Series.overview: The story of the impossible loves of 30-something obstetrician Nina Proudman and her fabulously messy family.

TV Series.title: Hot Ones
TV Series.overview: Host Sean Evans subjects his celebrity guests to ten rounds of questions while sweating their way through ten progressively spicy chicken wings.

TV Series.title: Mount Pleasant
TV Series.overview: From one of the writers of Shameless comes this warmhearted comedy-drama about the day-to-day indignities and triumphs of an ordinary couple living in a tight-knit neighborhood in suburban Manchester. Sally Lindsay (Scott & Bailey) and Daniel Ryan (Home Fires) lead a fantastic ensemble cast in this long-running British series.

TV Series.title: The Magical Legend of the Leprechauns
TV Series.overview: A man leaves America to rest in an idyllic cottage on the enchanted Emerald Isle, only to find that leprechauns already inhabit it.

TV Series.title: Last of the Summer Wine
TV Series.overview: Unencumbered by wives, jobs, or any other responsibilities, three elderly men who never really grew up explore their world in the Yorkshire Dales. Catch up on the classic sitcom and binge hours of the boys’ youthful misadventures

TV Series.title: Fridays
TV Series.overview: Watch the best episodes from the early 80s late-night sketch comedy show Fridays, the ABC network's answer to Saturday Night Live.

TV Series.title: Gulliver's Travels
TV Series.overview: A seafaring 18th-century Englishman returns home with extraordinary tales of fantastic lands, and must prove his sanity to rescue his wife and son.

TV Series.title: The Greatest American Hero
TV Series.overview: Chosen by aliens to fight crime on Earth, a high school teacher fumbles his way through superherodom after losing the instruction manual to his suit.

TV Series.title: Tattletales
TV Series.overview: Celebrities & their spouses, playing for sections of the studio audience, try to match answers to questions about their personal lives.

TV Series.title: Chewing Gum
TV Series.overview: Follow along the journey of Tracey, a 24-year-old, religious, Beyoncé-obsessed virgin stumbling through adulthood.

TV Series.title: Z: The Beginning of Everything
TV Series.overview: "Z: The Beginning of Everything" tells the story of Zelda Sayre Fitzgerald, the brilliant, beautiful Southern Belle who became the original flapper and icon of the wild, flamboyant Jazz Age.

TV Series.title: Con Man
TV Series.overview: A decade has passed since Wray Nerely (Alan Tudyk) was an actor on the cult sci-fi show, Spectrum. Now, unlike his best friend and former co-star Jack Moore (Nathan Fillion), Wray's career has stalled and he's left navigating the convention circuit.

TV Series.title: The Goode Family
TV Series.overview: The Goodes live by WWAGD—What Would Al Gore Do? Watch as their vegan, recycling, hybrid-driving antics continue to get them into unlikely shenanigans.

TV Series.title: The Pradeeps of Pittsburgh
TV Series.overview: The Pradeeps attempt to prove their innocence to a pair of investigating government agents by recounting their initial life in America after moving from India. Though each family member has a different perspective on the events, they weave together a story of humor, heartbreak, and the often-complicated pursuit of their respective American Dreams.

TV Series.title: Monsters
TV Series.overview: In this horror anthology series, a family of monsters gathers around the television each week to enjoy a new spooky story about deadly creatures.

TV Series.title: A League of Their Own
TV Series.overview: In 1943, Carson Shaw travels to Chicago to try out for the All-American Girls Professional Baseball League.  There, she meets other women who also dream of playing pro baseball and makes connections that open up her world. Rockford local Max Chapman also comes to the tryouts but is turned away.  With the support of her best friend Clance, she must forge a new path to pursue her dream.

TV Series.title: Car 54, Where Are You?
TV Series.overview: Be it perseverance or dumb luck, two lovable 1960’s NYPD partners somehow manage to crack cases despite their knack for acting on wrong assumptions.

TV Series.title: My Favorite Martian
TV Series.overview: After his spaceship crash lands in Los Angeles, a human-looking martian finds himself befriended by a reporter who takes him under his wing.

TV Series.title: Jean-Claude Van Johnson
TV Series.overview: What if I told you that Jean-Claude Van Damme - yes, THAT Jean-Claude Van Damme - was, in fact, a secret agent? That his entire film career was built solely as a front for his black ops? Would you believe me? No? Well then that’s egg on your face because that’s what this show is about.

TV Series.title: Florida Girls
TV Series.overview: After their only ambitious friend moves away to follow her dreams, four young women living in Small Town, Florida begin to re-examine their lives.

TV Series.title: Car Crash TV
TV Series.overview: Aprende cómo no debes conducir observando los choques más increíbles, ridículos e impactantes que han capturado las cámaras de auto en todo el mundo.

TV Series.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
TV Series.overview: After being flushed down a toilet, 15-year-old Yuuri is transported to an alternate world where he must learn to rule as the new Demon King.

TV Series.title: #1 Happy Family USA
TV Series.overview: From creator Ramy Youssef comes #1 Happy Family USA, an adult-animated series following the maniacally upbeat Husseins - the most patriotic, most peaceful, and most definitely-not-suspicious Muslim family in post-9/11 "Amreeka." With satire and absurdity, it redefines finding humor in hardship as they navigate the early 2000s under the watchful eyes of their terrified neighbors.

TV Series.title: The Donna Reed Show
TV Series.overview: This classic comedy ran for eight seasons, and tells the story of homemaker Donna, as she balances family life while helping her community.

TV Series.title: Corner Gas Animated
TV Series.overview: The adventures of small town folk. Catch up with Brent and the Dog River gang. Canada's #1 comedy brand is now bigger, bolder, and breaking the laws of physics. Small-town Saskatchewan has never been so - animated.

TV Series.title: Benidorm
TV Series.overview: A British comedy series that follows holidaymakers at the Solana Resort in Benidorm.

TV Series.title: Rowan & Martin's Laugh-In
TV Series.overview: Join comedy duo Dan Rowan and Dick Martin in their classic sketch comedy series, which takes cues from vaudeville and rapid-fire satire.

TV Series.title: Naruto
TV Series.overview: 12 years ago, the Nine-Tailed Fox claimed many lives before its spirit was contained with a baby boy who has now grown to become a ninja-in-training.

TV Series.title: Robin Hood
TV Series.overview: With new allies and old enemies, Robin Hood returns for a third series full of thrilling adventures, as Robin and his gang continue to outwit the dastardly sheriff and his forces. As the series begins, the outlaws are in disarray. Marian is dead and a grief-stricken Robin has split up the gang to launch a solo mission to avenge her and kill Gisborne. Will Robin Hood be able to overcome his loss and rally once more against the tyrannical reign of the Sheriff, Gisborne and Prince John?

TV Series.title: Red Oaks
TV Series.overview: In the summer of 1985, 20-year-old David Meyers takes a job as a tennis pro at Red Oaks Country Club in suburban New Jersey, as his parents, girlfriend, and co-workers pull him toward a future he's increasingly unsure he wants.

TV Series.title: The Girls Next Door
TV Series.overview: Go inside the Playboy Mansion and meet Holly, Kendra, and Bridget, Hugh Hefner’s girlfriends who fill their days with hilarious and sexy adventures.

TV Series.title: Bluestone 42
TV Series.overview: This comedy drama about a British bomb disposal detachment details the camaraderie and bonds shared between the soldiers in the unit as they risk their lives defusing bombs. Among the soldiers in the unit are Captain Nick Medhurst, the wisecracking leader of the team; Nick's eager second in command, Corporal Christian "Millsy" Mills; Corporal Lynda Bird, who just wants to be one of the guys; and Lance Corporal Simon Lansley whose one job is to protect Nick but has bigger ambitions - to become an officer.

TV Series.title: Family Affair
TV Series.overview: An American classic sitcom about Bill, an engineer, who must share his NYC apartment with three unexpected children and his valet, Mr. French.

TV Series.title: Petticoat Junction
TV Series.overview: This series follows the comical misadventures at the family-run Shady Rest Hotel, located in the charming farming community of Hooterville.

TV Series.title: The Carol Burnett Show
TV Series.overview: The iconic and critically acclaimed comedy series starring Carol Burnett and her solid cast in hilarious musical and comedy sketches.

TV Series.title: The Whitest Kids U' Know
TV Series.overview: A five-man comedy troupe boldly pushes the envelope in this series featuring sketches that range from delightfully subversive to downright absurd.

TV Series.title: Heartbeat
TV Series.overview: This drama series evokes the mood of the swinging 60s in a peaceful countryside setting. Based on the Constable books by Nicholas Rhea, Heartbeat combines humour, drama and compelling characters.

TV Series.title: Swarm
TV Series.overview: Murder. Sex. Music. This is not a work of fiction.

TV Series.title: Four More Shots Please!
TV Series.overview: Four unapologetically flawed women live, love, blunder and discover what really makes them tick through friendship and tequila in Millenial Mumbai.

TV Series.title: Vicious
TV Series.overview: An aging gay couple live to entertain their friends and make fun of each other whenever possible, making the most of their loving 50 years together.

TV Series.title: The Second Best Hospital in the Galaxy
TV Series.overview: In Season One of The Second Best Hospital in the Galaxy, doctors Sleech and Klak take on a highly dangerous and potentially groundbreaking case and, in doing so, put existence itself in jeopardy. Although considering their dismal personal lives, oblivion might be an improvement.

TV Series.title: Red vs. Blue
TV Series.overview: After the Halo event of 2552, a civil war among the humans begins. Two armies on opposite sides of a canyon, the Reds and Blues, fight on the most worthless piece of real estate in the galaxy.

TV Series.title: Strictly Sexual The Series
TV Series.overview: Based on the hit independent film of the same name, this smart, introspective look at sex and love explores dating in the modern world, the balance of career and romance and the challenges of friendship and keeping things strictly sexual.

TV Series.title: Clean Slate
TV Series.overview: From Producer Norman Lear comes a heartfelt comedy that follows Harry (George Wallace), an old-school car wash owner in Alabama who has a lot of soul searching to do when the child he thought was a son returns as a proud, trans woman, Desiree (Laverne Cox). Her homecoming brings together a hilarious cast of friends and neighbors, as Desiree and Harry try to get it right the second time around.

TV Series.title: Wipeout
TV Series.overview: Epic falls, cruel spills and big money await 20 ordinary Aussies as they go head-to-head in the world's most outrageous obstacle course.

TV Series.title: The Family Man
TV Series.overview: Srikant Tiwari is a middle-class man who also serves as a world-class spy; he tries to balance his familial responsibilities with those at the highly secretive special cell of the National Intelligence Agency.

TV Series.title: Def Comedy Jam
TV Series.overview: Some of the modern era’s biggest comedy icons got their start on this groundbreaking HBO stand-up series spotlighting African-American performers.

TV Series.title: Family Law
TV Series.overview: Abigail Bianchi (Jewel Staite) is a high-paid personal injury lawyer and her own worst enemy. After her husband kicks her out because of her drinking, she goes on a bender that gets her law license suspended. To practice law again, a senior attorney must agree to mentor her for a year. Enter Harry Svensson (Victor Garber), who runs a family law practice—and happens to be her estranged father.

TV Series.title: Étoile
TV Series.overview: In an ambitious gambit to save their storied institutions, two world-renowned ballet companies in New York City and Paris swap their most talented stars. From the Executive Producers of The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel comes a bold new series celebrating the beauty, humor, and unpredictability of a life devoted to the arts, both on stage and off.

TV Series.title: Versailles
TV Series.overview: Set in a world of power, betrayal, lust, and war, this series focuses on the reign of King Louis XIV and the development of the Palace of Versailles.

TV Series.title: Murdered at First Sight
TV Series.overview: "Murdered at First Sight" is a true crime series that tells the shocking stories of people who were killed by someone they had never met.

TV Series.title: The Pinkertons
TV Series.overview: The Pinkertons TV Series is a one hour detective series set in the wild west of 1865. It draws from the real cases of Pinkerton'sNational Detective Agency founder Allan Pinkerton, his son, William, and America's first female detective, Kate Warne, as they solved crimes and brought justice to the wild frontier.

TV Series.title: Dr. Seuss Baking Challenge
TV Series.overview: Host Tamera Mowry-Housley welcomes 9 teams of pastry chefs and cake artists to the City of Seuss, where they will compete for honorary citizenship, the key to the city, and $50,000. From The Cat in the Hat, to Green Eggs and Ham, The Lorax, Horton Hears a Who, each episode will bring to life the world of Dr. Seuss in the sweetest way possible.

TV Series.title: Beyond Black Beauty
TV Series.overview: In season one,15-year-old equestrian Jolie Dumont's privileged European life implodes when her mother inexplicably leaves her father and drags Jolie to her family's urban ranch in Baltimore. There, a rebellious horse named Beauty inspires Jolie with her raw talent. These two lost souls bond as Jolie embraces her family's rodeo legacy, kickstarts her Olympic training, and even meets her first love.

TV Series.title: Moonshine
TV Series.overview: Adult half-siblings from the dysfunctional Finley-Cullen family battle to take control of the family business, which is a ramshackle summer resort that goes by the name of The Moonshine.

TV Series.title: Underground Marvels
TV Series.overview: Experts explore mysteries of abandoned subterranean phenomena around the world, sharing their impressive stories, unique origins and the secrets they still keep hidden underground.

TV Series.title: Adult Material
TV Series.overview: An actress's journey through the world of adult film sheds light on work life and power dynamics in Britain's porn industry in the age of webcams.

TV Series.title: The Listener
TV Series.overview: After discovering he has telepathic powers, a young paramedic uses his gift to help people in crisis and aid in criminal investigations.

TV Series.title: Mayday
TV Series.overview: Using gripping reenactments, incident records, and interviews, this series examines legendary aviation disasters to find out what went wrong and why.

TV Series.title: Hanna
TV Series.overview: A young girl with extraordinary skills attempts to evade the relentless pursuit of an off-book CIA agent and tries to unearth the truth behind who she is.

TV Series.title: Father Brown
TV Series.overview: Based on the stories of G.K. Chesterton, a clergyman-turned-amateur detective uses faith and knowledge to solve mysteries in the English countryside.

TV Series.title: Tales from the Loop
TV Series.overview: Inspired by the wondrous paintings of Simon Stålenhag, Tales from the Loop explores the mind-bending adventures of the people who live above the Loop, a machine built to unlock and explore the mysteries of the universe – making things previously relegated to science fiction, possible.

TV Series.title: Night Sky
TV Series.overview: Irene and Franklin York, a retired couple, have a secret: a Chamber buried in their backyard that miraculously leads to a strange, deserted planet. When an enigmatic young man arrives, the Yorks’ quiet existence is upended and the mysterious Chamber they thought they knew so well turns out to be much more than they could have ever imagined. Starring Sissy Spacek and JK Simmons.

TV Series.title: Shiny Happy People
TV Series.overview: A limited docuseries exposing the truth beneath the wholesome Americana surface of reality tv’s favorite mega-family, The Duggars, and the radical organization behind them: The Institute in Basic Life Principles. As details of the family and their scandals unfold, we realize they’re part of an insidious, much larger threat already in motion, with democracy itself in peril.

TV Series.title: Super Mario World
TV Series.overview: King Koopa is on the loose, and he's ready to battle the Super Mario Bros. using a powerful new weapon: his own children!

TV Series.title: Departure
TV Series.overview: In this high-octane drama, unravel the mystery of Flight 716, a passenger plane that vanishes over the Atlantic, igniting a web of conspiracy.

TV Series.title: The Care Bears
TV Series.overview: Classic animated children's series featuring a group of magical peace-loving bears.

TV Series.title: Outer Range
TV Series.overview: Outer Range centers on Royal Abbott (Josh Brolin), a rancher fighting for his land and family, who discovers a dark void at the edge of Wyoming's wilderness. The mystery surrounding the void pulls two families into an epic confrontation for the control of time itself.

TV Series.title: Mr. D
TV Series.overview: Under-qualified and unprepared, a gym teacher finds himself out of his element when he lands a job teaching social studies at a prestigious academy.

TV Series.title: Shocking Emergency Calls
TV Series.overview: Each dramatic episode in this docuseries reveals the shocking stories behind the harrowing and heroic calls made to emergency operators.

TV Series.title: The Peripheral
TV Series.overview: THE PERIPHERAL centers on Flynne Fisher, a woman trying to hold together the pieces of her broken family in a forgotten corner of tomorrow’s America in which technology has started to subtly alter society.

TV Series.title: Upload
TV Series.overview: From the Emmy-winning Greg Daniels (The Office, Parks & Rec) comes a hilarious new sci-fi comedy. In the future people can upload their consciousness to a luxurious digital afterlife. When party boy Nathan gets uploaded to a virtual resort he meets the down-to-earth Nora who starts as his customer service “angel”, but becomes so much more as she helps him find friendship, love and purpose.

TV Series.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
TV Series.overview: The classic sitcom follows the Clampett family, who became rich overnight and must acclimate to a lifestyle that doesn't fit with their country ways.

TV Series.title: Dance Moms
TV Series.overview: Popular reality series following the tough love teaching by a dance instructor-choreographer of talented tweens and her occasional parental run-ins.

TV Series.title: The Rifleman
TV Series.overview: In the New Mexico Territory, a Civil War vet raises a son, tends to his ranch, and wields his trusty rifle to help enforce the laws of the wild west.

TV Series.title: Kitchen Nightmares
TV Series.overview: World-famous chef Gordon Ramsay gives struggling restaurants across the United States a week of his time, advice and a fighting chance to succeed.

TV Series.title: The Temptations
TV Series.overview: The story of how one of Motown's most successful vocal acts battled prejudice, betrayal, drug abuse and more to become R&B and soul music royalty.

TV Series.title: The Chornobyl Disaster
TV Series.overview: Through archival footage and exclusive expert interviews, uncover the shocking events and critical moments that led up to the 1986 Chernobyl Disaster.

TV Series.title: Sense and Sensibility
TV Series.overview: The Jane Austen classic portrays two sisters, one pragmatic and the other overly emotional, who fall in love with men promised to others.

TV Series.title: Modern Love
TV Series.overview: An exploration of love in its many forms, including sexual, romantic, familial and platonic; based on articles from the `Modern Love' section of the New York Times newspaper.

TV Series.title: Monarch of the Glen
TV Series.overview: Archie Macdonald left the family home in Scotland's Highlands nearly ten years ago and had no desire to go back. When news of a family crisis reaches him, however, he reluctantly heads up to crumbling Glenbogle Castle.

TV Series.title: Killer in Plain Sight
TV Series.overview: A whodunit true crime series of cold-blooded murder. Detectives assess countless suspects and filter lies from the truth in order to crack the cases.

TV Series.title: American Rust
TV Series.overview: A police chief in a southwest Pennsylvania town is forced to decide what he's willing to do to protect the son of the woman he loves after he's accused of murder.

TV Series.title: Return to Lonesome Dove
TV Series.overview: In this follow-up to the beloved miniseries, a Texas Ranger drives a herd of mustangs northward, embarking on an epic journey through the Old West.

TV Series.title: Batman: Caped Crusader
TV Series.overview: Welcome to Gotham City, where criminals run rampant and law-abiding citizens live in a constant state of fear. Forged in the fire of tragedy, wealthy socialite Bruce Wayne becomes something both more and less than human—the BATMAN. His one-man crusade for justice attracts unexpected allies within the GCPD and City Hall, but his heroic actions spawn deadly, unforeseen ramifications.

TV Series.title: The Child Snatcher: Manhunt
TV Series.overview: For almost a decade, Robert Black's serial child killings made him one of Britain’s most wanted. But detectives had no idea who their suspect was.

TV Series.title: Guess How Much I Love You
TV Series.overview: A beloved, award-winning animated series about a father hare and his son who live in a watercolor landscape of forests, rivers and warm life lessons.

TV Series.title: Bed of Roses
TV Series.overview: After the death of her husband a mother and daughter's lives change for the worst as they struggle to make ends meet.

TV Series.title: The Kennedys
TV Series.overview: Two sons marching to the beat of their egomaniacal father make even more powerful enemies on their rise to the top of the American political system.

TV Series.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
TV Series.overview: Dedicated experts apply cutting-edge forensic science to several crime scenes to offer a detailed account of what happened and who did it.

TV Series.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
TV Series.overview: Nominated for 16 Emmy® Awards including Outstanding Drama Series – Meet the Smiths: two lonely strangers, John and Jane, who have given up their lives and identities to be thrown together as partners – both in espionage and in marriage.

TV Series.title: Dino Dana
TV Series.overview: Dana is a nine-year-old girl who loves dinosaurs and spends all of her time learning about them. One day, she gains the ability to imagine dinosaurs into real life.

TV Series.title: Leverage: Redemption
TV Series.overview: The Hitter, the Hacker, the Grifter and the Thief are together again, this time with help from a new tech genius and corporate fixer, to take on a new kind of villain. From the man who created an opioid crisis from the comfort of his boardroom to the shadowy security firm that helps hide dangerous secrets for a price - when someone needs help, they provide… Leverage.

TV Series.title: Earnhardt
TV Series.overview: This 4-part documentary series explores the legendary racing career and complex family dynamics of NASCAR superstar, Dale Earnhardt.

TV Series.title: A Place to Call Home
TV Series.overview: After surviving a concentration camp while her husband is presumed dead, a nurse returns to postwar Australia and clashes with a wealthy matriarch.

TV Series.title: The IT Crowd
TV Series.overview: In the eternal I.T. vs. corporate clash, two basement-dwelling dweebs battle office chaos as their ambitious, tech-clueless manager meddles nonstop.

TV Series.title: Motorheads
TV Series.overview: Motorheads is about first love, first heartbreak, and turning the key in your first car. Set in a once-thriving rust-belt town that’s now searching for a glimmer of hope, the series is an adrenaline-filled story of a group of outsiders who form an unlikely friendship over a mutual love of street racing, while navigating the hierarchy and rules of high school.

TV Series.title: Just Add Magic
TV Series.overview: Three best friends discover a magical cookbook that helps them uncover mysteries that span generations.

TV Series.title: Them
TV Series.overview: It’s 1991, and LAPD Homicide Detective DAWN REEVE is assigned to a new case: the gruesome murder of a foster home mother that has left even the most hardened detectives shaken. Navigating a tumultuous time in Los Angeles, with a city on the razor’s edge of chaos, Dawn is determined to stop the killer. But as she draws closer to the truth, something ominous and malevolent grips her and her family…

TV Series.title: Cruel Intentions
TV Series.overview: Cruel Intentions follows the elite students of Manchester College, where ruthless step-siblings, Caroline and Lucien, will do anything to stay on top of the cutthroat social hierarchy. After a brutal hazing incident threatens all of Greek Life, they’ll do whatever is necessary to preserve their power and reputation, even if that means seducing the daughter of the Vice President.

TV Series.title: Taken
TV Series.overview: While dealing with a personal tragedy that shakes his world, CIA agent Bryan Mills fights to overcome the incident and exact revenge.

TV Series.title: Price Is Right : À vous de jouer
30 Rock
TV Series.overview: One of the most acclaimed comedy series of all time, set behind the scenes at a late-night variety show, where head writer Liz Lemon must deal with an arrogant boss, self-obsessed celebs, and a sensitive writing staff - without losing her mind.

TV Series.title: Fleabag
TV Series.overview: Meet FLEABAG. She's not talking to all of us; she's talking to YOU. So why don't you pop your top off and come right in?A hilarious and poignant window into the mind of a dry-witted, sexual, angry, porn-watching, grief-riddled woman, trying to make sense of the world.

TV Series.title: Sausage Party: Foodtopia
TV Series.overview: After killing off all of humanity, Food attempts to create their own utopia.

TV Series.title: Paranormal Revenge
TV Series.overview: The chilling real-life stories of vendettas enacted from beyond the grave. Paranormal experts investigate these terrifying acts of revenge to uncover who is responsible and why.

TV Series.title: Vampire Knight
TV Series.overview: At Cross Academy, Guardians Yuki Cross and Zero Kiryu protect the Day Class from the academy’s dark secret - the Night Class is full of vampires!

TV Series.title: Rogue
TV Series.overview: A Corrupt general sends Ethan Kelly to Chicago to infiltrate the firm of one of the city's most notorious attorneys and power brokers, Marty Abrams. It soon becomes apparent the Marty's dealings extend from the boardroom into the dangerous world of one of Chicago's most feared gangs.

TV Series.title: Stingray
TV Series.overview: Join the crew of the high-tech submarine Stingray as they explore the ocean's depths and defend the world from underwater threats.

TV Series.title: Almost Paradise
TV Series.overview: When life-threatening hypertension forces US DEA agent Alex Walker into early retirement, he decides to move to a tranquil deserted beach he remembered visiting in the Philippines many years ago. Against doctor’s orders, Alex finds himself drawn into cases where he uses his skills as a longtime operative to put away the bad guys.

TV Series.title: Overcompensating
TV Series.overview: Created by Benito Skinner, Overcompensating is a college-set ensemble comedy about the chaotic journey of Benny (Skinner), a closeted former football player and homecoming king, as he becomes fast friends with Carmen, an outsider on a mission to fit in at all costs. Deeply funny and personal, the show explores the lengths to which we all overcompensate while finding out who we really are.

TV Series.title: Black Comedy
TV Series.overview: A sketch comedy show from the funniest Blackfellas in Australia. It is irreverent, politically incorrect and goes where no other series can go.

TV Series.title: Blue Ridge
TV Series.overview: Sheriff Justin Wise fights to protect Blue Ridge from criminal forces while his life as a parent unravels after the town’s police station burns down.

TV Series.title: Bosch: Legacy
TV Series.overview: Harry Bosch, retired homicide detective turned Private Investigator, fights to work cases without the authority his former job provided. Attorney Honey “Money” Chandler, having survived an attempted murder, struggles to maintain her faith in the justice system. And Maddie Bosch discovers the possibilities and challenges of being a rookie patrol cop on the streets of Los Angeles.

TV Series.title: Helluva Boss
TV Series.overview: This adult animated comedy follows the misadventures, hijinks, and relationships of the Immediate Murder Professionals (or I.M.P. for short)-- a band of demon assassins from Hell who kill people on Earth for a living.

TV Series.title: The Runarounds
TV Series.overview: The Runarounds (from the creator of Outer Banks) follows a group of recent high school graduates who form a band in the hopes of escaping the mundane futures that are laid out before them. As the band pursues their big break and near impossible dream over the course of a summer, they fall in love and into trouble along the way.

TV Series.title: Harlan Coben's Lazarus
TV Series.overview: Forensic psychiatrist Dr Joel ‘Laz’ Lazarus is forced to confront long-buried demons after his father Dr L dies in suspicious circumstances. At first assured his dad’s death is a suicide, Laz is soon sucked into a world of murderous conspiracy, and a race to find the killer, by strange visions of people he knows to be dead.

TV Series.title: Sprung
