TV Series.overview: From the acclaimed comedy creator Greg Garcia, an unlikely group of former inmates band together and use their criminal expertise for good after being released from prison due to the pandemic.

TV Series.title: Cocaine Quarterback: Signal-Caller for the Cartel
TV Series.overview: Cocaine Quarterback: Signal-Caller for the Cartel tells the unbelievable true tale of convicted drug trafficker Owen Hanson's rise from USC college football champion to smuggling for the world's most dangerous cartel.

TV Series.title: Bosch
TV Series.overview: LAPD homicide detective Harry Bosch is on trial for the shooting of a suspect serial murderer. When the bones of a missing 13-year old boy are discovered on a local hillside though, Bosch’s own professional woes cannot compete with his need to find justice for this young victim. Based on the bestselling novels of Michael Connelly.

TV Series.title: One Night in Idaho: The College Murders
TV Series.overview: In the middle of the night on November 13th, 2022, four University students were brutally murdered in an off-campus house in the quiet college town of Moscow, Idaho. With exclusive and intimate access to figures closest to the victims, One Night in Idaho: The College Murders explores the emotional twists and turns of this American tragedy and its continued fallout.

TV Series.title: The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel
TV Series.overview: In 1958 New York, Midge Maisel’s life is on track– husband, kids, and elegant Yom Kippur dinners in their Upper West Side apartment. But when her life takes a surprise turn, she has to quickly decide what else she’s good at – and going from housewife to stand-up comic is a wild choice to everyone but her. The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel is written and directed by Amy Sherman-Palladino (Gilmore Girls).

TV Series.title: Pop Culture Jeopardy!
TV Series.overview: Hosted by Colin Jost, eighty-one teams of three compete in the first ever Pop Culture Jeopardy! tournament for the grand prize of $300,000 and ultimate bragging rights.

TV Series.title: On Call
TV Series.overview: On Call is an adrenalized procedural that puts us inside the squad car and on the streets with Long Beach Police. Through training officer Traci Harmon, and rookie Alex Diaz the series examines how the complexities of the job affects the human condition. Harmon will be enlightened by a kid from the streets, while Diaz will learn that policing isn’t black and white - it requires shades of grey.

TV Series.title: Lethal Weapon
TV Series.overview: LETHAL WEAPON, a TV reboot of the classic film franchise of the same name, features two mismatched police detectives working together to solve crimes in and around Los Angeles. Damon Wayans plays Roger Murtaugh, an uptight Los Angeles detective, husband, and father who has just returned to work after suffering a major heart attack. He is partnered with Martin Riggs (Clayne Crawford), a former Navy Seal struggling with a major personal loss and who is willing to break the rules and take personal risks to get the bad guys. Working together has its challenges, as Captain Brooks Avery (Kevin Rahm) will attest to, but somehow they find a way to make it work.

TV Series.title: The Book of Negroes
TV Series.overview: Abducted from her village in West Africa, eleven-year-old Aminata Diallo is forced into a slave coffle and must endure a horrific ocean crossing.  She is brought to a South Carolina plantation where she makes herself useful by using midwifery skills learned at her mother's side, all the while keeping the attentions of her jealous slave master, Robinson Appleby, at bay.

TV Series.title: The Stinky & Dirty Show
TV Series.overview: The adventures of best friends and unlikely heroes, Stinky the garbage truck and Dirty the backhoe loader, a dynamic and hilarious duo of resourcefulness that learn when things don't go as expected, asking "what if" can lead to success. Based on books by Jim and Kate McMullan. Written and developed by Guy Toubes.

TV Series.title: If You Give a Mouse a Cookie
TV Series.overview: Mouse and his favourite human, Oliver, set out on a series of thrilling adventures as one thing always leads to another.

TV Series.title: Abyss
TV Series.overview: After meeting an untimely demise in separate incidents, Cha Min and Go Se-yeon discover they’ve come back to life in new bodies they don’t recognize.

TV Series.title: Crime and Punishment
TV Series.overview: Dealing with difficult, disturbing cases this landmark documentary series delves into the UK criminal justice system - a system under intense pressure due to an escalation of cases and diminishing resources. Highlighting the work of police, probation, prison and parole, this eye-opening investigation unearths the challenges and dangers faced daily by justice professionals.
Archival video and new interviews examine Mexican politics in 1994, a year marked by the rise of the EZLN and the assassination of Luis Donaldo Colosio.

TV Series.title: Impact
TV Series.overview: During a 10,000-year meteor shower, a rogue asteroid smashes into the moon and causes disastrous electromagnetic anomalies of weightlessness on Earth.

TV Series.title: Asia
TV Series.overview: Sir David Attenborough presents Asia, a seven-part series covering the length and breadth of our planet's largest and richest continent, revealing its most remarkable landscapes and animals, and stories featuring dramatic, previously unseen behavior.

TV Series.title: Thin Ice
TV Series.overview: A treaty over Arctic oil is jeopardized when the crew of a Swedish ship is taken hostage. Officials struggle to save the crew and secure the treaty at all costs.

TV Series.title: The Agent
TV Series.overview: Cutthroat and super-competitive, the life of an NFL agent is hectic and hard. Catch the trials and tribulations of America's biggest sporting obsession.

TV Series.title: Lost For Words
TV Series.overview: With a staggering 43% of Australian adults missing the necessary literacy skills needed for everyday life, Lost For Words is an uplifting series that shines a light on Australia's low literacy rates and showcases how easy it is for people to fall through the cracks.

TV Series.title: Dinotopia
TV Series.overview: An airplane crash leaves two half brothers stranded on a secret lost island where humans and intelligent talking dinosaurs peacefully coexist.

TV Series.title: Darkness
TV Series.overview: "Darkness" takes reality TV's survival genre to new levels of mental and physical challenges. Inspired by sensory-deprivation training used by NASA and military forces, the series records the limits to which survivalists push themselves while trapped inside caves, abandoned mines and underground convolutions for up to six days. Attempting to exit complete darkness, they work as a team but struggle to combine their diverse skill sets as the effects of prolonged light deprivation take hold. To keep the experience as immersive as possible, participants are outfitted with custom-designed camera equipment, enabling them to document their own journey without any exposure to light.

TV Series.title: Dark Shadows
TV Series.overview: Freed from his grave after 200 years, a tormented vampire returns home to protect his loved ones in this classic gothic daytime TV series.

TV Series.title: The Dain Curse
TV Series.overview: While investigating a diamond theft, a hardboiled detective meets a mysterious woman who’s convinced she’s been stricken with an ancient family curse.

TV Series.title: A Matter of Justice
TV Series.overview: The true story of a young Marine’s mother portrays her war against the daughter-in-law whom she suspects murdered her son, and her fight for justice.

TV Series.title: A Woman Named Jackie
TV Series.overview: Biopic charting the life of Jacqueline Kennedy Onassis from before she became first lady through her second marriage after JFK's assassination.

TV Series.title: Liz: The Elizabeth Taylor Story
TV Series.overview: The story of Elizabeth Taylor's life, from her early rise to stardom in Los Angeles during the 1940s, through her many love affairs and divorces.

TV Series.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
TV Series.overview: Seven women fight drug dealers.

TV Series.title: After Braveheart
TV Series.overview: The epic events portrayed in the Hollywood movie Braveheart were only the beginning of the Scottish army's 14th century push to drive out the English.

TV Series.title: Found
TV Series.overview: Recovery specialist Gabi Moseley stops at nothing to solve forgotten missing person cases while hiding a secret. Catch new episodes first on NBC.

TV Series.title: Secrets
TV Series.overview: On the surface, Ariel and Greg seem to be the perfect couple. But when Greg goes missing, Ariel’s world is turned upside down and secrets come out.

TV Series.title: World War II: Race to Victory
TV Series.overview: Experience World War II through the voices of those who lived it. Veterans and civilians share raw, first-hand memories that bring history's darkest conflict to life.

TV Series.title: The Far Pavilions
TV Series.overview: An epic tale of passion, treachery, and intrigue, set in colonial India. An Englishman is torn between two cultures, fighting for the Indian princess he loves in a story rich in historical detail and spectacular scenery: Himalayan peaks, the palaces of Bhithor, and a lavish Hindu wedding.

TV Series.title: Gunpowder, Treason & Plot
TV Series.overview: Expect deceit, lust and betrayal, in this calculating historical drama, leading up to the notorious gunpowder plot of 1605. Tensions rise when Mary Queen of Scots is hailed the catholic Queen, threatening the protestant Queen of England, Elizabeth I. When Mary's son succeeds to the English throne, the rivalry becomes deadly. Starring Michael Fassbender, this brutal retelling is a must watch!

TV Series.title: Hitler: The Rise of Evil
TV Series.overview: Robert Carlyle stars as the German dictator during his rise to power in this television miniseries. After spending years as a frustrated artist in Vienna, Adolf Hitler enlists in the German army during the First World War. Embittered by Germany's defeat, Hitler begins his gradual rise to power in the ranks of the newly-formed National Socialist Party.

TV Series.title: Jesus of Nazareth
TV Series.overview: From the Nativity to the Crucifixion and Resurrection, the life of Jesus is presented with stunning depth, gravity and emotion.

TV Series.title: Classic Albums
TV Series.overview: Carly Simon reveals the challenges behind No Secrets - the classic album that made her a global star and included the enigmatic song You're So Vain.

TV Series.title: Untold Stories of the ER
TV Series.overview: Dramatizations of real-life medical emergencies offer a glimpse into the frenetic, high pressure and truly gruesome business of saving lives.

TV Series.title: Halo: The Fall of Reach
TV Series.overview: Halo: The Fall of Reach follows the backstory of the shaping and creation of Spartan 117, The Master Chief.

TV Series.title: Halo 4: Forward Unto Dawn
TV Series.overview: UNSC Cadet Thomas Lasky must conquer his inner fears and join forces with super-soldier John-117 to take down a massive faction of the Covenant.

Movies.title: Kase-san and Morning Glories
Movies.overview: Soon after meeting, Yamada and Kase began to date! But dating isn’t as easy as it looks, and they must weather the storms all couples eventually face. Will their relationship continue to bloom as college entrance exams threaten to keep them apart?

Movies.title: Becoming Evil: Serial Killers of the Old West
Movies.overview: American serial killers are hardly a phenomenon confined to the 20th and 21st centuries. The Old West was a well-known time of violent lawlessness.

Throughout their adventures, they trigger small accidents that sometimes grow into major disasters, but (almost) always end on a happy note. In short, Roger and Fatou spend their time saving the island from their own mistakes and blunders.

Movies.title: L.O.L. Surprise! Winter Disco

Movies.title: The Snowy Day
Movies.overview: Based on the award-winning book by Ezra Jack Keats. Peter sets out on a magical walk to help his Nana with the Mac'N'cheese for their traditional Christmas Eve dinner. Along the way he marvels at the wonders of a snowy day and a friend helps him build a snowman. The big kids won't let him join in their wintery fun. His Nana inspires a snowball fight that brings the entire neighborhood together. A snowy day mishap almost makes Peter forget how much fun he’s had. The whole community, along with Peter’s family and friends, come together to help Peter realize what makes a holiday special is sharing, caring, and being together.

Movies.title: Flash Gordon Conquers the Universe
Movies.overview: Flash Gordon and his crew travel to planet Mongo seeking an antidote for the Purple Death. Ming the Merciless does his best to stop them.

Movies.title: Arthur Hailey's Detective
Movies.overview: Based on the bestseller by Arthur Hailey, a Catholic priest-turned-investigator for the police agrees to hear a convicted serial killer's confession.

Movies.title: Snow Queen

Movies.title: Iliza Shlesinger: A Different Animal

Movies.title: Mayberry Man

He hilariously embraces the challenges of getting older and touches on generational clashes and Latino superstitions. Bold and personal, Lopez delivers his comedic voice to stories that capture both the humor and heart of his journey one last time.

Movies.title: Kathleen Madigan: Hunting Bigfoot

Movies.title: Crusaders: Ex Jehovah's Witnesses Speak Out

Movies.title: Let's Meet Again on Christmas Eve
Movies.overview: Years after parting ways, college sweethearts are reunited when they're both hired to help bring together a Christmas Eve wedding.

Movies.title: Black Like Me
Movies.overview: True story of a White reporter who darkens his skin during the 1960s’ civil rights-era to feel the reality of racist American hate toward Black men.

Movies.title: Hibiscus & Ruthless

A comedy from the Writer and Director of Three Wise Cousins.

Movies.overview: The small guy with his mustache, his bowler hat and his bamboo cane is world-famous. However, who is the man behind this figure.

This inspiring and entertaining film chronicles Jobs' early days as a college dropout to his rise as the co-founder of Apple Computer Inc. and forced departure from the company. More than a decade later, Jobs returns and single-handedly sets a course that will turn the once-tiny startup into one of the world's most valuable companies. His epic journey blazes a trail that changes technology – and the world – forever. JOBS is a riveting story of a true American visionary, a man who let nothing stand in the way of greatness. Co-starring Dermot Mulroney, Josh Gad, J. K. Simmons and Matthew Modine.

Movies.title: Stuart: A Life Backwards
Movies.overview: A poignant, tragic true story that traces in reverse the events that shaped a homeless man's life.

Movies.title: Witness Unprotected
Movies.overview: A divorcee struggling to send her daughter to college takes a lucrative, but dangerous private investigator job and becomes prime suspect in a murder.

Movies.title: Pearl 2
Movies.overview: As Travis tries to move forward and pursue a life of sobriety, he soon realizes that some things from the past will not always remain there.

Movies.title: Giving Thanks

Movies.title: Thick Trip

Movies.title: Once Upon a Time in Detroit

Movies.title: The Fists of Vengeance

Movies.title: Negative
Movies.overview: Life changes in a flash when an amateur photographer snaps a photo of a former British spy, on the run from the drug cartel she double-crossed.

Movies.overview: Un perro poco confiable pero astuto frustra a dos ladrones torpes que intentan ingresar a la casa de sus dueños durante las vacaciones de Navidad.

Movies.overview: Un príncipe europeo llega a Nueva York para un evento real de beneficencia anual y se enamora de una chef en apuros que contrata a última hora.

Movies.title: Bill Engvall: Just Sell Him for Parts
Movies.overview: The multi-platinum recording artist performs his 2015 stand-up special before a live audiance at Rockford Illinois’ Coronado Performing Arts Center.

Despite her outgoing nature, Sabitha carries wounds from the death of her mother years before, while her father is a hapless recovering drug addict with a certain ragged charm. In an act of mean-spirited rebellion, Sabitha fosters a pseudo-relationship between Johanna and her father through a series of forged emails, never dreaming of the potential harm. However, Johanna is not a demure cut-out, but rather a woman for whom the phrase "still waters run deep" could have been coined, and the young girl's cruel prank provokes Johanna to indulge in something long missing from her life: the dream of a future and a home of her own.

Clyde immediately senses a kindred spirit in Bonnie. Initially she ignores him, but he rescues her from a shoplifting charge and offers her a ride in a stolen van. Soon the two have taken guns from her father's home and go off on a bloody crime spree.

One Piece Film: Z

This grief-crazed harbinger of doom is hell bent on destroying the New World – and all the pirates in it!

Fences were broken down while a radical movement were pushing to declare the ventu...

Movies.overview: Pick of the Day' - The Guardian, The Times, The Sun, The Observer, The Independent. Finally available outside of the UK and Ireland Scotland, 1982. The stars of Big Gold Dream had either split up or taken the Big Gold Road south to major label success.

Movies.title: Christina Aguilera: Stripped - Live in the U.K.

Starting to wonder if she was the unique survivor of an unexplained disaster, Leila discovers four other teenagers: Dodji, Yvan, Camille and Terry. When the coronavirus pandemic begins, the protagonists are faced with the opportunity of setting their lives straight. They realise that they had not been aware of the illness of their souls they had been suffering from. The spectre of pandemic which is a bodily illness becomes a chance to change their approach to life. We are presented with four different attitudes and we learn whether and how four different people take advantage of the window of opportunity that opens up during this special time. With Boris at the front, Veronica must try to ward off spiritual numbness and defend herself from the increasingly forceful advances of her beau’s draft-dodging cousin. Winner of the Palme d’Or at the 1958 Cannes Film Festival, THE CRANES ARE FLYING is a superbly crafted drama with impassioned performances and viscerally emotional, gravity-defying cinematography by Kalatozov’s regular collaborator Sergei Urusevsky.

Movies.title: Our Club
Movies.overview: In 2008 Portsmouth FC was on top of the world; FA Cup winners and welcoming AC Milan to Fratton Park, but behind the scenes things were unravelling. Five years on and Portsmouth found themselves on the brink of going out of business. With more owners than points at one point in the 2009-10 season, Pompey, as they are known across the football (soccer) world, were a club on the brink of oblivion. This film shares the remarkable story of how Pompey were saved, told by the people who loved them most: the fans. With an eclectic real-life cast of true heroes and villains, the club’s dramatic fall and rise from the ashes as the UK’s biggest community owned football club is lovingly documented, with exclusive and extensive behind-the-scenes footage. Interviews with the key protagonists in this riches to rags tale, bring a previously unseen perspective to a perennial story in the modern-day sports world of high-rolling owners, whose ambition is fuelled by ever-increasing debt, until the day the cash dries up. That’s when chickens come home to roost, but they reckoned without Pompey’s fans. Portsmouth is an island city and its people are resourceful and loyal. Never more so than in times of distress. After all, as a former manager of the club Alan Ball once said: ‘People go to war from this city’. Narrated by renowned sports broadcaster and lifelong Pompey fan Ian Darke, this film will appeal to not only to fans of the club, but also sports fans everywhere. Directed by Barnaby Fox, this is a feel-good movie for all those who love a true David & Goliath story. Simply put, when the little guys have resilience, determination and, above all, a plan, anything is possible. This is OUR CLUB.

Movies.title: CIA vs KGB: Battleground Berlin
Movies.overview: Berlin was the symbol of the Cold War for 50 years. Here, thousands of KGB and CIA agents observed each other, cogs in the biggest information war in history.

Movies.title: Depp vs Heard: The Verdict
Movies.overview: A trial that has divided fans and sent social and broadcast media into a frenzy. Two of the largest actors of modern-day go head to head in the court of law and public opinion. A grueling 5 weeks. 50 million dollars on the line and a defamation case that will leave only one of them victorious.Everything is on the line in this battle of the century. This is Depp vs Heard: All On The Line

Movies.title: The Divided Island
Movies.overview: Exploring Greek and Turkish division in Cyprus, this doc reveals untold stories and intricate histories still reverberating on the island today.

Movies.title: The Dalai Lama: Scientist
Movies.overview: A rare glimpse at the mysterious spiritual leader of Tibet, revealing surprising characteristics of the political and religious figure.

Movies.title: Piece by Piece
Movies.overview: Creatively animated in Lego form, this inspirational documentary explores the life of Pharrell Williams from struggling student to music industry icon.

Movies.title: Elizabeth I: Queen Without a King
Movies.overview: Queen Elizabeth was surrounded by enemies scheming to steal her crown or take her life. Knowing that life would have been easier had she been born a man, the unlikely Elizabeth would become the son that Henry VIII always wanted, but never expected.

Movies.title: Princess Margaret: Queen of Mustique
Movies.overview: Scandalous affairs, X-rated party games, a rumored rock star lover and even an alleged bank robbery. Queen Elizabeth's sister Princess Margaret loved the Caribbean Island of Mustique. But her time there was mired in controversy. With archive footage, insider testimony and expert interviews this documentary reveals what the original royal party girl really got up to on her Caribbean hideaway.

Movies.title: The Last Days of Princess Diana
Movies.overview: A review of the independence and determination demonstrated by the beloved royal, and how tragedy sadly ended her much-watched next moves.

Movies.title: No No: A Dockumentary
Movies.overview: Explore the iconoclastic life of Dock Ellis: baseball player, civil rights activist, and the only pitcher to throw a no-hitter while high on LSD.

Movies.title: Goodbye Lady Di
Movies.overview: Historians recount the story of Diana Spencer, the woman who was more regal than the Royals, and how she defined a generation despite her mistreatment by the royal establishment.

Movies.title: The Green Park
Movies.overview: The story of a glamorous kosher hotel, opened in 1943 on the British Riviera.

Movies.title: Greta Thunberg: The Voice of the Future
Movies.overview: When all hope is lost an unlikely voice of emerges from the darkness– Greta Thunberg. This is the incredible true story of how the actions of one Swedish teenager went on to inspire a global movement that has pushed the fight for real action against climate change further than ever before. No one is too small to make a difference and never before has that been clearer.

Movies.title: Captive: The Sex Slave Girl
Movies.overview: The astounding story of Tanya Kach, who made headlines when she revealed she had been living in captivity for 10 years, a stone's throw from her home.

Movies.title: BookWars
Movies.overview: Chronicles the remarkable lives, loves and unique life perspectives of booksellers living and working on the gritty streets of New York City.

Movies.title: Bruce Lee: The Way of the Warrior
Movies.overview: Experience the enduring legend of the Hollywood icon and martial arts pioneer through the eyes of co-stars, longtime friends, and family members.

Movies.title: Heaven
Movies.overview: In Diane Keaton's directorial debut, she analyzes how Hollywood has portrayed the afterlife through a series of clips, interviews, and more.

Movies.title: Thin Lizzy: Rocker on the Loose
Movies.overview: Phil Lynott was Ireland's first rock and roll international superstar. His hard man image helped him stand out to the world as one of the most influential rockers of the 1970's. Explore Phil's life and career as he paths the way in the rock giants Thin Lizzy.

Movies.title: Invisible Essence: The Little Prince
Movies.overview: Invisible Essence explores the global legacy of The Little Prince 75 years after its publication. The film introduces a modern day Little Prince - a seven-year-old blind Pakistani Canadian boy who absorbs The Little Prince for the first time - and captures engaging conversations with an incredible range of individuals such as Mark Osborne (Director of the animated film “The Little Prince"), Rupi Kaur (Poet, New York Times Bestselling Author), and Olivier and François d'Agay (the great nephew and nephew of Antoine de Saint-Exupéry). Although a fable, Antoine de Saint-Exupéry’s transcendent story suggests an ethical philosophy about life in its own way, a code of respect for humanity.

Movies.title: Filiberto
Movies.overview: The deeds of a professional musician who abandons his trumpet and family to live the clandestine life of an armed revolutionary for Puerto Rican independence. Filiberto Ojeda Ríos epic life has been compared to that of Nelson Mandela, Malcom X, and Ché Guevara.

Movies.title: The All-Americans
Movies.overview: The country’s most beloved cooking champions and their families are brought together in a humorous, heart-warming culinary showdown.

Movies.title: Whitney Houston: We Will Always Love You
Movies.overview: Whitney Houston was one of the greatest singers of all time and holds a spot in the Guinness World Records for the most awarded female artist of all time! This documentary brings you the life & times of the legend, up to her untimely death in 2012.

Movies.title: The Dictators: Hitler
Movies.overview: POWER. CONTROL. TERROR. The centre points of any dictatorship. In this episode we look at the man responsible for the death of over 20 million people and the architect of the Holocaust, one of history’s most brutal dictators; Adolf Hitler.

Movies.title: The Greatest Night in Pop
Movies.overview: On a January night in 1985, music's biggest stars gathered to record "We Are the World." This documentary goes behind the scenes of the historic event.

Movies.title: Actors of Sound
Movies.overview: From footsteps to bone cracks, Foley artists bring films to life with their imaginative sound effects, but as digital technology goes full speed ahead in 21st century moviemaking, can Hollywood's low tech Foley artist survive in this high tech age? In the documentary film Actors of Sound, the viewer is transported into the dark, cluttered prop rooms where Foley artists make their magic. Exciting and sometimes hilarious footage features world renowned Foley artists manipulating props to create sounds, showcasing their truly unique creative process. Through interviews with Foley artists,Re-recording Mixers and Supervising Sound Editors, Actors of Sound examines every facet of this craft, illuminating the impact technology is having on Foley.

Movies.title: Postcards from Babylon - Evangelicals  in the Shadow of Christian Nationalism
Movies.overview: A meditation on the present state of Christianity in North America in the face of an increasing hyper-partisan and nationalistic political culture.

Movies.title: Just Eat It: A Food Waste Story
Movies.overview: A shocking look at our food-obsessed society raises the issue of food waste, as activists try to survive by only eating discarded food for six months.

Movies.title: Prince: Purple Reign
Movies.overview: His influence is unparalleled, and his legacy will live on through his inspirational music. In this fascinating documentary, we take an in depth look into the life and times of one of music's greatest performers...Prince.

Movies.title: The Last 600 Meters: The Battles of Najaf and Fallujah
Abducted by Aliens: UFO Encounters of the 4th Kind
Movies.overview: Are we being taken by beings from beyond Earth? For centuries, people have reported memories of being taken against their will by alien entities.

Movies.title: Dead of Night
Movies.overview: Three horror anthology tales featuring: a vintage car traveling back to 1926, a mansion owner stalked by vampires, and a dead son haunting his mother.

Movies.title: Curse of the Werehuahua
Movies.overview: A bite from a radioactive chihuahua triggers a curse that sends Dustin and his best friend on the run for their lives from monster hunter Van Helsing.

Movies.title: Wolfwood
Movies.overview: Haunted by her childhood trauma, Ferrall hid memories of that terrifying Wolfwood night and her father's death even from herself. Now she has discovered a pattern of evil stalking Wolfwood, and to face her guilt she will take her revenge.

Movies.title: Lizard Boy
Movies.overview: A geneticist creates a reptilian-human hybrid, which holds extraordinary abilities and poses challenges to the community around it.

Movies.title: Queen Crab
Movies.overview: When a scientist’s young daughter feeds a growth hormone to a crab, the wily crustacean grows to monstrous proportions and terrorizes the townsfolk.

Movies.title: Alien Convergence
Movies.overview: When flying reptilian creatures wreak havoc all over the world, the survivors’ only hope of stopping them is a new, state-of-the-art fighter jet.

Movies.title: The Avengers
Movies.overview: A scientist who develops the means to control large-scale weather uses his discovery to wreak evil. Emma Peele and John Steed must stop the villian.

Movies.title: Monster Force Zero
Movies.overview: Armed with their new superpowers, a band of Sci-Fi cosplay pals enter the multiverse to defend Earth against alien forces bent on its destruction.

Movies.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
Movies.overview: When a Category 7 hurricane pummels New York, the surging flood waters bring thousands of sharks. To make matters worse, tornadoes soon dot the horizon. As Sharknadoes tear through the city, no vehicle, building, or national monument is safe.

Movies.title: The House of the Seven Gables
Movies.overview: Clifford's father, Gerald, decides that the family's mansion must be sold to clear their debts.

Movies.title: Billy Rose's Jumbo
Movies.overview: Jimmy Durante, Doris Day and Martha Raye star in this big-screen portrayal of Rogers and Hart's Broadway musical about an all-out effort to save a struggling circus--Billy Rose's Jumbo. Pop Wonder's (Durante) gambling debts have put his circus in danger of default--an event completely unforeseen by Lulu (Martha Raye) the fortuneteller--and the circus has to sell its beloved elephant, Jumbo.

Movies.title: The Tao of Steve
Movies.overview: Despite having a way with women, an overweight kindergarten teacher meets someone who isn't quite as responsive to his charming technique.

Movies.title: Highway to Havasu
Movies.overview: Dylan, a brokenhearted high school senior from Bend, Oregon, is kidnapped by his two friends in a stolen RV as they embark on an epic road trip adventure to Lake Havasu, Arizona, for their last spring break together.

Movies.title: The Diana Story: Part I: The Young Princess
Movies.overview: In the summer of 1980 a shy young girl arrives at Balmoral Castle, two years later that girl becomes a royal Princess. At just 20 years old Lady Diana Spencer married HRH Prince Charles to become HRH Princess Of Wales.

Movies.title: First Girl I Loved
Movies.overview: Seventeen-year-old Anne just fell in love with Sasha, the most popular girl at her LA public high school. But when Anne tells her best friend Clifton - who has always harbored a secret crush - he does his best to get in the way.

Movies.title: A Date with Judy
Movies.overview: The escapades of two teenagers from different backgrounds cause constant turmoil for their families.

Movies.title: It’s a Girl!
Movies.overview: This film looks into the growing number of female babies killed, left, or selectively aborted in India and China and the effects these actions bring.

Movies.title: Nightmare Wedding
Movies.overview: A woman's past indiscretion with her fiancé’s mentally unstable best friend comes back to haunt her when he becomes their best man.

Movies.title: Shadowland
Movies.overview: Laura, a sleeping vampire, is awoken by construction work that digs deep underground. Unable to remember who she is, she has to try to make sense of the world around her, whilst being tracked by a vampire hunter.

Movies.title: The Evil Dead
Movies.overview: Five friends go up to a cabin in the woods where they find unspeakable evil lurking in the forest. They find the Necronomicon and the taped translation of the text. Once the tape is played, the evil is released. One by one, the teens become deadly zombies. With only one remaining, it is up to him to survive the night and battle the evil dead. Classic 1981 horror written and directed by Sam Raimi.

Movies.title: Restraint
Movies.overview: A mentally ill woman who's been suppressing her violent impulses for years unravels after she moves in with and marries and a controlling older man.

Movies.title: War of the Satellites
Movies.overview: As the world prepares to launch the first manned satellite into orbit, aliens issue a dire warning to stop or else suffer total annihilation.

Movies.title: The Letters
Movies.overview: A drama that explores the life of Mother Teresa through letters she wrote to her longtime friend and spiritual advisor, Father Celeste van Exem over a nearly 50-year period.

Movies.title: Passenger 57
Movies.overview: A crackerjack security expert, John Cutter, finds himself on the same plane as a British master criminal who's temporarily in police custody. His henchmen have hitched a lift too and when they free him it's up to Cutter to save the day. Full of action and suspense.

Movies.title: Christmas Keepsake
Movies.overview: A father and his daughter find a Christmas time capsule buried in their backyard and set out to find its original owner.

Movies.title: The Farmer and the Belle: Saving Santaland
Movies.overview: The hometown of a famous model facing the loss of its beloved annual Santaland festival plays host to a Christmas miracle and an unexpected romance.

Movies.title: The Edelweiss Pirates
Movies.overview: Based on an untold story, this stunning drama follows a group of young Germans  the "Edelweiss Pirates"   battling the Gestapo and Hitler Youth in 1944. Incredible realism, gruelling interrogation scenes and a glimpse into the real meaning of courage.

Movies.title: Hollywood Safari
Movies.overview: It's a jungle out there when a deadly lion attacks a teenage boy deep in the woods. After jumping out of a truck on the way to a movie set, Kensho a trained mountain lion, is mistaken for the killer lion. Kensho wanders off into the woods leaving an unsuspecting team of animal trainers to arrive at the location only to find that she has escaped.

Movies.title: Looking Up
Movies.overview: In the midst of an emergency in space, an astronaut reflects on his unconventional relationship with his father, who pushed him to follow his dreams.

Movies.title: Nomads
Movies.overview: An exploration of immigrant life in America, cultural uprooting and the nostalgia for home through a filmmaker’s project about subway suicides.

Movies.title: Sister
Movies.overview: The topics of youths and prescribed psychotropic drugs are handled with heart and care when a man is forced to take care of his troubled teen sister.

Movies.title: Reunion
Movies.overview: Follows six former classmates who meet up on the eve of their high school reunion, as they reminisce and confront long-standing differences.

Movies.title: Leon's Fantasy Cut
Movies.overview: Sharing the same cramped Brooklyn studio they grew up in, two bickering first-generation Ukrainian-American brothers reconcile dreams with reality.

Movies.title: Bleed American
Movies.overview: After their mother gets hospitalized due to alcohol abuse, Larson takes on the role of a parental figure to his brother L.J. and sister Lex.

Movies.title: Take Me Out
Movies.overview: A Chicago teenager struggles to find his path through life while clashing with his domineering father and charismatic older brother.

Movies.title: Delaware Shore
Movies.overview: An escapee from a concentration camp during the Holocaust finds solace on a secluded beach in Delaware while raising her abandoned grandchildren.

Movies.title: Two Lives in Pittsburgh
Movies.overview: A blue-collar man and his dying mother reappraise their self-perceptions when the 8-year-old boy they’re raising starts leaning into his femininity.

Movies.title: The Broken Ones
Movies.overview: Based on a true story of one womanäó»s struggle to cope with the loss of her father in the 9/11 attacks, this intense, romantic drama carefully delves into the struggles of depression as two troubled strangers meet and help each other overcome personal fears and tragedies. Written and Produced by Lead Actress Cece King (Marveläó»s Jessica Jones, The Good Fight), and featuring Margaret Colin (Independence Day, Unfaithful), Constance Schulman (Orange is the New Black) & James Russo (Django Unchained).

Movies.title: I Love You
Movies.overview: The prodigal son allegory is played out in the real-life story of a young man whose talent and ambition are squandered by a string of bad decisions.

Movies.title: Somebody's Mother
Movies.overview: A young woman grapples with motherhood in the aftermath of a tragedy, while her sister struggles with her own inability to care for her child.

Movies.title: Mum's List
Movies.overview: To prepare her husband for raising their sons without her, a woman with breast cancer spends her final days creating a list of life lessons.

Movies.title: Care
Movies.overview: Life for a single mom of two girls struggling to pay the bills comes crashing down when her own mother suffers a debilitating stroke and dementia.

Movies.title: The Ox
Movies.overview: A man confesses to killing his master’s ox to feed his starving wife and infant daughter yet receives a brutal jail sentence from a conniving deputy.

Movies.title: Wastelands
Movies.overview: After being deployed to Iraq as mercenaries, two brothers return home to Chile where one commits suicide and the other is left to scatter the ashes.

Movies.title: Fighting the Odds: The Marilyn Gambrell Story
Movies.overview: The inspiring true story of a parole officer who creates a first-of-its-kind high school program to help students with parents in the prison system.

Movies.title: A Song Still Inside
Movies.overview: A husband who is frustrated by his status as a stay-at-home dad gives into jealousy and makes a drastic decision that endangers his entire family.

Movies.title: Chasing Rabbits
Movies.overview: Penny's mother abandoned her daughter to join a cult when Penny was young. Now in her 30's, Penny's father has gone missing. Has the cult kidnapped him? Penny decides to infiltrate the cult, posing as a new member, to save her father before it's too late.

Movies.title: A Little Piece of Heaven
Movies.overview: Seeking a Christmas companion for his disabled sister, a young man uses unconventional methods to bring kids from a children's home to their farm.

Movies.title: The Neighbor
Movies.overview: Shunsuke, orphaned as a child, is a pessimistic young man. One day, drawn to a mysterious song next door, he meets Setsu, an older woman.

Movies.title: Lonely Boy
Movies.overview: While seeking answers to a past he cannot remember, a schizophrenic must find the strength to control his mental illness as he tries to build relationships with those he pushed away. Winner of multiple festival awards.

Movies.title: Miles Between Us
Movies.overview: More than a decade after his divorce, Luke and his estranged, now-teen daughter Gabby decide to make up for lost time on a cross-country road trip.

Movies.title: Angelfish
Movies.overview: Set in the Bronx in 1993, this is the story of a high school dropout who falls for a young woman who’s dealing with complicated family issues.

Movies.title: More Than Family
Movies.overview: A college student with a baby and marriage on the way goes to find her absent biological dad, which happens to coincide with her fiancé disappearing.

Movies.title: Duckweed
Movies.overview: A young man steps into the past to see his father's life and bring the two closer together by seeing events that led the family to where it is today.

Movies.title: Behind the Mask
Movies.overview: A workaholic doctor with a strained family life forms a life-affirming bond with one of his patients with autism after the doctor has a heart attack.

Movies.title: Flint Tale
Movies.overview: After losing her scholarship, a young woman struggles to regain hope for her future as she and her family face internal turmoil and a water crisis.

Movies.title: The Zombie Club
Movies.overview: After a mistake in a laboratory, six teens find themselves in a race against the clock to find a cure for mutant frogs.

Movies.title: Beaten
Movies.overview: Robson Green and Saira Todd star in a powerful love story exploring the roots of domestic violence.

Movies.title: Monumental
Movies.overview: Two men embark on a journey across the USA to honor one's mother and take on whatever the road brings them.

Movies.title: Buried Treasure
Movies.overview: When his estranged daughter dies, an older man finds his parenting skills stretched to the limit by the willful granddaughter he never knew existed.

Movies.title: The Legend of Kate Kensington
Movies.overview: A grieving widow goes missing after the invasion of Pearl Harbor in 1941. In the present, a clairvoyant girl starts seeing her apparition.

Movies.title: Take Two
Movies.overview: Based on true events, a narcissistic Hollywood producer loses everything and heads for the hills in Wyoming where his life is altered forever.

Movies.title: Our Sons
Movies.overview: Two mothers from different backgrounds help each other face their feelings, as one’s son dies of AIDS, and the other’s, his lover, deals with loss.

Movies.title: It's a Life Worth Living
Movies.overview: A man haunted by a bad start in life struggles with drug addiction and relationships but, in his darkest hour, God and his friends show him the way.

Movies.title: Bug
Movies.overview: Una muchacha quiere deshacer el supuesto agravio de que su abuelo, un sheriff retirado, quizá cometió y encubrió un asesinato racial hace años.

Movies.title: Most Wonderful Time
Movies.overview: Bria’s farewell to her childhood home means gathering her high school best friends for a reunion and revisiting a romance with the one who got away.

Movies.title: Lyfe's Journey
Movies.overview: A man makes a mistake that changes his life forever. With help, he begins a journey of forgiveness in the hope it will bring him back to his family.

Movies.title: The Author, The Star and The Keeper
Movies.overview: From the beginning of time, The Author (Bruce Marchiano), has written a prodigal son story for an estranged son The Star (Simon Jon Provan), who returns to his childhood town to rekindle his relationship with his ailing father The Keeper (David Rupprecht).

Movies.title: Christmas Time
Movies.overview: A physics teacher who detests Christmas has an enchanted meeting with Santa that helps him overcome his trauma and embrace the holiday spirit.

Movies.title: Painful Secrets
Movies.overview: Seemingly typical teenager Dawn Cottrell (Kimberlee Peterson) deals with her anxieties about school, friends and her dysfunctional family in a very dangerous way - cutting herself. Sean Young stars as Dawn's self-involved mother, and Rhea Perlman offers a stirring performance as the caring therapist who attempts to guide Dawn down the road to recovery.

Movies.title: Rosebud Lane
Movies.overview: When a Hollywood filmmaker sets out to connect with his estranged young son, the consequences leave a small mountain town completely shattered.

Movies.title: Hobo Heyseus
Movies.overview: A penniless drifter breaks down in a small town and has to exchange his words and deeds of wisdom in exchange for help, but all doesn’t go smoothly.

Movies.title: Nothing Like The Sun
Movies.overview: Based on a true story, a lesbian estranged from her family finds shelter and forbidden love in the restrictive suburbs of 1950's middle America.

Movies.title: Hondo
Movies.overview: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

Movies.title: Rancho Grande
Movies.overview: A ranch foreman steps in to help the late rancher’s three zany and difficult grandchildren who are giving him a hard time in protecting the land.

Movies.title: Gaucho Serenade
Movies.overview: A case of mistaken identity sends ex-rodeo stars on a rip-roaring trek, as they help a small boy evade gangsters who framed his father for a crime.

Movies.title: The Burning of Atlanta
Movies.overview: Residents of Atlanta in 1864 watch society collapse in the Civil War as a Confederate General burns down military supplies and incinerates the city.

Movies.title: Mad at the Moon
Movies.overview: A Wild West woman trapped in a marriage to her lover’s half brother begins lapsing into boredom until the full moon rises and exposes his dark secret.

Movies.title: Wild Bill Hickok: Swift Justice
Movies.overview: The quiet life a former outlaw carved out for himself as a lawman in a sleepy town begins to unravel following a heated dispute over a gambling debt.

Movies.title: Whelm
Movies.overview: Set during the Great Depression, this is the story of Midwest brothers caught in the crossfires of a famed robber and a young criminal.

Movies.title: The Lonesome Trail
Movies.overview: When a cattle baron starts using trail hands to terrorize homesteaders in a small mining town, a preacher comes to the rescue. With a Bible, not a gun, this man is able to sway the homesteaders into standing their ground for their rights to free land. The homesteaders are rallied by preacher Carson to hold their position and not be frightened away by the constant barrage of raids on their families. Mike McCray, the cattle baron, doesn't stand for the resistance; he claps back and causes vast amounts of damage to the preacher’s family and homesteaders. Frustrated with the outcome, one of the preacher’s own family members turns against him and sides with the McCray clan.

Movies.title: Luz: The Flower of Evil
Movies.overview: A cult leader becomes the target of raging reprisals from his flock, as well as his three daughters, after bringing a false prophet into the fold.

Movies.title: Lasso
Movies.overview: A tour group visits a small town rodeo festival. All seems to be going well until they aren't allowed to leave, and are picked off by evil cowboys.

Movies.title: The Winning of Barbara Worth
Movies.overview: While building an irrigation system for a Southwestern desert community, an engineer vies with a local cowboy for the affections of a rancher's daughter.

Movies.title: Yellowneck
Movies.overview: Cinco desertores confederados huyen de la guerra y cruzan los traicioneros Everglades en un peligroso viaje hacia la libertad.

Movies.title: The Cowboy and the Indians
Movies.overview: Gene Autry stars as a rancher trying to stop the cruel swindle of a cheating Navajo agent who is starving the tribe while blaming them for violence.

Movies.title: The Painted Hills
Movies.overview: When her gold prospector owner is knocked off by his greedy partner, loyal Rough Collie Lassie takes it upon herself to bring the killer to justice.

Movies.title: Once Upon a Time in Tombstone
Movies.overview: The Earp Brothers, The Clanton Brothers, Doc Holliday, and Johnny Ringo collide on the road to infamy, in the town that saw a gunfight for the ages.

Movies.title: Ridin' on a Rainbow
Movies.overview: A bank robbery leads a rancher and his sidekick with money invested into the showboat that’s just arrived in town to retrieve their stolen money.

Movies.title: The Unholy Four
Movies.overview: After being broken out of prison by bank robbers, an amnesiac gets caught in a local feud when he travels to his hometown with three other convicts.

Movies.title: Crazy Horse and Custer: The Untold Story
Movies.overview: General Custer faces off against the legendary Lakota leader Crazy Horse as tensions rise between Native Americans and the U.S. military.

Movies.title: Cowboys Don't Cry
Movies.overview: In this family drama, Josh is a veteran rodeo cowboy who must care for his young son Shane after the death of his wife Lucy. The two move to the ranch left to them by Shane's grandfather, but Josh can't hold a job, and Shane is in the throes of adolescent angst. Lindsay, their neighbor and a veterinarian, tends to Shane's injured horse and the emotional wounds of the father and son.

Movies.title: Gene Autry and the Mounties
Movies.overview: A Montana marshal goes on a manhunt in the wilderness to recover U.S. gold stolen by Canadian bank robbers plotting to overthrow their government.

Movies.title: Mule Train
Movies.overview: When natural cement is discovered by two prospectors, one is murdered during a claim jump attempt. Marshal Gene Autry befriends the lone prospector and tries to help him promote his cement discovery.

Movies.title: Beyond the Purple Hills
Movies.overview: Gene Autry becomes the new Sheriff after bank robbers kill the former sheriff. When Judge Beaumont is murdered, evidence points to the judge's wild son. Believing the young man, Gene tries to help.

Movies.title: Blue Montana Skies
Movies.overview: A cattleman’s mission to a northern outpost to catch fur smugglers becomes doubly interesting when he finds a dude ranch owned by a beautiful woman.

Movies.title: Apache Country
Movies.overview: When a bad guy tries to control Native Americans by getting them drunk, cavalry scout Autry must break up a ring which uses raids to cover up crimes.

Movies.title: Harry Tracy, Desperado
Movies.overview: The last survivor of the Wild Bunch pulls off a string of robberies before making his way West in search of the judge's daughter who stole his heart.

Movies.title: Chervonyi
Movies.overview: Based on a true story, a commander is jailed in Josef Stalin’s Gulag in 1947. The prisoners then plot the first uprising and escape in Soviet history.

Movies.title: The Confederate
Movies.overview: Georgia, 1864. Desperate to escape an arranged marriage to her brutal neighbor, Willa Randall disguises herself as a boy and joins the Confederate Cavalry.

Movies.title: A Fistful of Lead
Movies.overview: Four of the Wild West’s most infamous outlaws celebrate too soon after pulling the biggest gold heist in frontier history. Who will double-cross them?

Movies.title: Rebel in Town
Movies.overview: A botched robbery in a small town by an ex-Confederate and his sons leads one son to return to face the vengeful father of a boy accidentally killed.

Movies.title: Sheriff of Tombstone
Movies.overview: In Tombstone, Roy is mistaken for a gunslinger hired by the mayor to seize control. As he plans to expose the plot, the real gunslinger arrives.

Movies.title: Home on the Prairie
Movies.overview: Livestock inspectors (and a friendly elephant) uncover the truth about a rancher’s cattle that appear to have hoof and mouth disease.

Movies.title: Public Cowboy No. 1
Movies.overview: When a high-tech gang of cattle thieves comes to town, a luddite sheriff’s deputy must quickly learn how to outwit their modern innovations.

Movies.title: Silver Canyon
Movies.overview: During the Civil War, the cavalry sends the singing cowboy to round up raiders, who are interfering with supply lines and plotting to ravage a town.

Movies.title: The Executioner of God
Movies.overview: This spaghetti western follows a former gunman-turned-priest, who seeks vengeance on three bandits masquerading as law-abiding citizens.

Movies.title: Twilight on the Rio Grande
Movies.overview: Gene Autry's investigation of the murder of his partner, leads him to Mexico, where he becomes involved with the beautiful singer whose father has also been killed, and finds a jewelry smuggling ring.

Movies.title: The Legend of Wolf Mountain
Movies.overview: Three children are about to find out if the legend about a sacred land is real after being kidnapped and taken into the forest by escaped convicts.

Movies.title: High Moon

Movies.title: No Name and Dynamite

Movies.title: Gunslinger
Movies.overview: A gunman is hired by a land-grabbing saloonkeeper to kill the female marshal who is trying to maintain law and order in an outlaw-stricken Texas town.

Movies.overview: In the harsh, unforgiving landscape of the Outback, Charlie Burns is presented with an impossible choice: to save one brother, he must kill another.

Movies.title: Before They Vanish

Movies.title: Walking Thunder
Movies.overview: In the 1850s, a young boy and his family on their way west become stranded in the Rockies.

Movies.title: The Christmas Pitch
Movies.overview: Becca and William, two executives at a marketing firm, are sent to William's hometown of Kringle Lake to rediscover the spirit of Christmas.

Movies.title: Most Guys Are Losers

Movies.title: The Competition
Movies.overview: A woman inspires millions with her blog that promotes a method to avoid cheating until she meets a man who challenges her to prove her theory wrong.

Movies.overview: A young man takes a Hollywood acting class, led by an eccentric coach, and meets a wacky crew of hopefuls, including a woman who stirs his heart.

Movies.title: You Can't Say No
Movies.overview: Days before signing divorce papers, a couple give their relationship one final shot by playing a game – no matter what they ask of each other, they can’t say no.

Movies.title: Parents for Christmas
Movies.overview: Two orphaned girls with only one wish—to find a family—take a trip to a local farm during Christmas, which just might be the answer to their prayers.

Movies.title: Mr. Jealousy
Movies.overview: An insecure young writer goes to obsessive lengths to find out if his girlfriend’s ex, a famous novelist, still has romantic feelings for her.

Movies.title: Children of the Bride
Movies.overview: What could be Margret’s last chance at love sours after revealing to her grown kids that their future stepfather is uncomfortably close to their age.

Movies.title: Prince of Bel Air
Movies.overview: A womanizing bachelor in LA keeps company with the housewives whose pools he cleans, until he falls for an artist, with whom he can’t make a splash.

Movies.title: A Simple Wedding
Movies.overview: Cultures clash and families collide when an Iranian-American woman finds love with an eccentric bohemian artist

Movies.title: Fourplay
Movies.overview: An innocent Sunday brunch between two couples turns into a confessional of friendship, marriage and secrets that will forever change their lives.

Movies.title: Treasure Lies
Movies.overview: Follows the hilarious and heartwarming journey of the perfect boy next door who is determined to win the heart of a girl outside his economic league.

Movies.title: Love Is Love Is Love

A married couple finds an unconventional way to transcend long distance through technology. A long-married couple try to reignite their honeymoon-phase through a spontaneous sailing trip. A woman who recently lost her mother gathers her mother's friends to share memories.

Movies.title: The Good Catholic
Movies.overview: "Daniel (Zachary Spicer) is a young, idealistic priest who loves his work more than anything. While he struggles to find balance between the dueling philosophies of his mentors, Father Victor (Danny Glover), an old school, no nonsense traditionalist, and Father Ollie (John C.McGinley), a chainsmoking, carb addicted Franciscan, Daniel’s passion for his calling never waivers. And then he meets Jane. After a chance encounter during a late night confession, the complicated and mysterious Jane (Wrenn Schmidt), starts to open up Daniel’s world to an entirely different set of possibilities. And problems. As new bonds form and old ones are tested, Daniel must decide what his true calling really is — and whether or not he has the courage to answer it."

Movies.title: Pretty Crazy
Movies.overview: Worried that his past will ruin a potential future with a beautiful lady, a young man quickly learns that dating as a millennial can be… pretty crazy!

Movies.title: Chasing the One
Movies.overview: Podcast host Samantha has an aversion to romance but is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. Samantha falls for charming Jake, who calls in with a problem she is determined to solve.

Movies.title: A Town Called Love

But when she butts heads with the mayor's son Riley on a mission to scout out a town called Love, she decides to impersonate Jenna to teach him a lesson. On a mission to debunk the myths of the town for a place in Jenna's new book, can Emma find love in a town called Love?

Movies.title: The Video Guys
Movies.overview: The Video Guys know just how to capture even the most stressful weddings, but this time their client  bride happens to be one of their ex-wives.

Movies.title: Never on Sunday

Movies.title: The Wedding Contest

As they compete for the lucrative gig, Taylor and Ben playfully sabotage each other's efforts but are growing closer together than either of them realise.

Movies.title: Chronesthesia
Movies.overview: When emotionally isolated barista Dan Duncombe starts receiving strange messages on the inside of his bedroom window, he is forced to become involved with the lives of the people around him - and he soon discovers a web of relationships that unites them all. By helping them connect with each other, he comes to understand how he connected is with each of them.

Movies.title: Friends in Law
Movies.overview: An orthodox south Indian woman travels to Bangkok and spends 10 days with her gay son’s partner, which gives her a new perspective on life.

Movies.title: All About Christmas Eve
Movies.overview: Una organizadora de fiestas de Nueva York debe elegir entre un trabajo de Nochebuena para avanzar en su carrera o unas vacaciones con su novio.

Movies.title: The Dinner Party
Movies.overview: A romantic dinner for two, hosted by an obsessed woman for her object of desire, goes awry when her long-lost brother and his date crash the party.

Movies.title: The Cougar Queen
Movies.overview: A single and successful talk show host who doesn't want any romantic attachments develops an attraction to a co-worker.

Movies.title: The Sunlit Night
Movies.overview: Frances, an aspiring and struggling painter, meets eccentric locals and Yasha, a fellow New Yorker, while working on a barn in Norway.

Movies.title: Love, So Divine
Movies.overview: A soon-to-be priest meets his mentor's fiery, American-educated niece, who forces him to question his commitment to priesthood.

Movies.title: Girl on a Bicycle
Movies.overview: An Italian bus driver working the tourist circuit in Paris becomes obsessed with meeting an enchanting woman who he has seen riding a bike.

Movies.title: Love by Design
Movies.overview: Brooke makes a 30th birthday wish on her childhood vision board. When her dreams come true, she learns that love doesn’t always go according to plan.

Movies.title: Lovely & Amazing
Movies.overview: Self-esteem and insecurity lie at the heart of this comedy about the relationship between a mother and her three confused adult daughters.

Movies.title: Lolo
Movies.overview: The course of true love has never run smoothly for Parisian Violette, a 40 year old workaholic whose romantic life is continually challenged by possessive teenage son, Lolo. Enjoying a long holiday in Biarritz, fashion exec Violette is surprised to find herself falling for fellow divorcee Jean-Rene, a clueless but highly persistent local computer programmer. When Jean-Rene announces he’s due to move to Paris for a work opportunity, the unlikely relationship is given a chance to continue. However he must first attempt to win the trust and respect of troublesome 19 year old Lolo, a challenge that the endearingly naïve Jean-Rene is not at all prepared for. When Lolo returns to live with Violette, and his playful schemes evolve into more serious set-ups, Jean-Rene is faced with a decision; is he willing to compete with Lolo’s obsession to remain Violette’s one and only favourite?

Movies.title: Committed
Movies.overview: On the magical Mediterranean isle of Cyprus, chance causes a soulful encounter between a runaway bride and a man being pressured to propose marriage.

Movies.title: Never Too Late
Movies.overview: Four Vietnam War veterans, who once escaped a POW camp, now feel the same need to escape the retirement home they live in together and dislike.

Movies.title: If the Shoe Fits
Movies.overview: A dressing-room assistant wins the attention of a high-end designer when she disguises herself as a supermodel in this modern Cinderella story.

Movies.title: Mozart and the Whale
Movies.overview: A heartfelt romantic drama starring Josh Hartnett and Radha Mitchell. New York taxi driver Donald has Asperger's syndrome. Proficient with numbers but shy around people, Donald organises a autism support group. Isabelle, who is direct to a fault and practical, but easily upset by any perceived insult, joins the group. The two fall in love, but their condition threatens their relationship.

Movies.title: The Gaelic Curse
Movies.overview: A hapless L.A. man travels to Ireland to join a fellow victim of an ancient curse so that they may break it, as they fall in love with local women.

Movies.title: Gray Matters

Movies.title: Accidental Love
Movies.overview: An original political satire about a naive small town waitress who accidentally gets a nail buried in her head, causing erratic and outrageous behavior that leads her to Washington DC. There she falls for a dashing, but clueless, Congressman who searches for the courage to save her.

Movies.title: The Chateau Meroux
Movies.overview: When a woman inherits a Napa Valley winery, she must compete with a ruthless neighbor to save the business, while she finds herself falling in love.

Movies.title: Seeing Other People
Movies.overview: A couple experiments with premarital flings to ease tension, but juggling multiple partners to strengthen their marriage proves harder than expected.

Movies.title: Ghosted

Movies.title: My Girlfriend's Boyfriend
Movies.overview: Jesse (Alyssa Milano, Charmed) is a sassy, intelligent woman who has yet to find the "right guy"-until she bumps into Ethan (Christopher Gorham, Ugly Betty), a writer pushed to the edge of despair after having another novel rejected by publishers. For Jesse, the encounter offers more than a chance to inspire the artist in Ethan again. It also opens a new, romantic chapter for her. Could Ethan be the one for her? Or could it be Troy (Michael Landes, Possession), the guy she meets only moments after Ethan? A confident and successful advertising executive who certainly isn't hurting for money, Troy makes almost every moment elegant and romantic. He's perfect-just like Ethan. What's a girl to do?

Movies.title: Santa Girl

Movies.title: My Blind Brother

Movies.title: Christmas with Jerks
Movies.overview: Hiding out at her sister’s place for the holidays, a former child star is dismayed to discover that she’ll be sharing the house with a hunky stuntman.

Movies.title: A Date with Miss Fortune
Movies.overview: A struggling writer's luck changes when he meets a superstitious Portuguese beauty. Now he just has to prove they have a future together.

Movies.title: A Beauty & the Beast Christmas
Movies.overview: An influencer fakes a romance with a viral bad boy to boost her following, but as sparks fly, their pretend love starts to feel all too real.

Movies.title: Time Freak
