Movies.title: Mythica Stormbound
Movies.overview: Years after Szorlok's devastation and the Red Thorns' victory, a new evil will threaten the world, and new heroes will rise to fight it.

Movies.title: The Dark Kingdom
Movies.overview: To save their kingdom from a dark lord’s army, a band of warriors travels through time to fight monsters in a forbidden land and rescue their king.

Movies.title: Mythica: A Quest for Heroes
Movies.overview: With dreams of becoming a wizard, Marek meets a priestess and assembles a team of adventurers in an epic journey to help save her sister from an ogre.

Movies.title: Along with the Gods: The Two Worlds
Movies.overview: After dying unexpectedly, a man is taken to the afterlife, where he must pass seven trials and prove he lived a noble life in order to reincarnate.

Movies.title: Suspiria
Movies.overview: A darkness swirls at the center of a world-renowned dance company, one that will engulf the troupe's artistic director (Swinton), an ambitious young dancer (Johnson), and a grieving psychotherapist (Ebersdorf). Some will succumb to the nightmare. Others will finally wake up.

Movies.title: Riverworld
Movies.overview: A fallen astronaut reborn a slave on a strange planet leads his fellow humans who lived throughout time in a revolt against their unknown overlords.

Movies.title: Proximity
Movies.overview: A young NASA JPL scientist is abducted by extraterrestrials. When no one believes his story, he becomes obsessed with finding proof.

Movies.title: 55 Steps
Movies.overview: 55 Steps is based on the inspiring true story of Eleanor Riese, a mental illness patient herself, who brings a class action suit to give competent mental patients the right to have a say in their medication while they're in a hospital, and Colette Hughes, the lawyer appointed to her case.

Movies.title: Villa Amore
Movies.overview: Liara finds love when she impulsively takes on a one-Euro fixer upper in Italy.

Movies.title: War of the Buttons
Movies.overview: Academy Award winner David Puttnam produces this classic tale of childhood rivalry and friendship. It starts as a game--until the stakes rise. Before it ends, this innocent child's play could become deadly. Based on the book LaGuerre des Boutons by Louis Pergaud.

Movies.title: Clockmaker
Movies.overview: Three teens find a time machine belonging to the weird old man living upstairs, push the wrong button, and must go back in time to repair time itself.

Movies.title: Pets
Movies.overview: Siblings, whose family farm is in the red, find a stash of stolen gold and are captured by bungling bank robbers. Can their furry friends save them?

Movies.title: A Greyhound of a Girl
Movies.overview: Mary is an 11 year old girl who is passionate about her grandmother’s cooking. When her grandmother falls ill, she and her family must confront loss.

Movies.title: A Piece of Cake
Movies.overview: After 200 years in hiding, Elfie and the Elfkins learn to bake and help Chef Theo save his bakery, reviving their tradition of aiding humans.

Movies.title: The Adventures of Peanut and Pig
Movies.overview: When their floating island paradise begins to sink, an unlikely team of rival monkeys, a scientist bunny, and a jolly pig must unite to save the day.

Movies.title: The Key to Christmas
Movies.overview: When a rebel elf reverses time at the North Pole and turns Santa Claus into a teenager, it’s up to a little girl with a magic key to save Christmas.

Movies.title: The Christmas Apron
Movies.overview: It's nearly Christmas, and the seven children in Millie's family can't wait for Grandma to arrive with her special Christmas apron, newly pressed and filled with generations of holiday memories. According to tradition, each grandchild will carefully write down the gift he or she wants most in the world, and then slip that wish into the apron's frilled pocket.

Movies.title: Dogtown 3
Movies.overview: Dim-witted Bob Wags is the new mayor of Dogtown. Bob visits everybody in town to find out how he can best serve them as Mayor. After hearing everyone out Bob realizes it will not be easy to satisfy everyone. Meanwhile his rival, Barney Lockjaw is spreading false stories about Bob. Will Bob win his town's heart while thwarting his rival's devious plans?

Movies.title: Toby Goes to Camp
Movies.overview: Baby tiger Toby and his canine companion Lana are off to have fun at summer camp, where they meet new friends in this animal adventure.

Movies.title: The Perfect Trap
Movies.overview: Two boys find a magic mirror that creates identical versions of them to go to school and do chores, but soon they must take their identities back.

Movies.title: The World Famous Kid Detective
Movies.overview: Stanley must stop a vicious crime wave while keeping himself and his little sister from falling into the clutches of his arch nemesis social worker.

Movies.title: Space Explorers
Movies.overview: Earth’s creatures are counting on two space explorers in a race against time to save lives, all while learning valuable lessons along the way.

Movies.title: A Christmas Star
Movies.overview: A woman born under a Christmas star believes in miracles, and finds she need one to keep a conniving developer from ruining her peaceful village.

Movies.title: Howard Lovecraft & The Kingdom Of Madness
Movies.overview: Lovecraft leads his father, Winfield, Uncle Randolph, and a university professor on an expedition to Antarctica, to prevent the awakening of Cthulhu.

Movies.title: I Think My Babysitter is an Alien
Movies.overview: A famous astronaut brings a piece of an asteroid home to his children, who begin to suspect that their new neighbours are actually aliens.

Movies.title: Super Furball
Movies.overview: A bite from her pet guinea pig turns Emilia into a 4-foot-tall furry superhero who uses her newfound ability to save a school of endangered herring.

Movies.title: Pet Shop
Movies.overview: Disguised aliens set up a pet shop in a dusty Arizona town, hoping to lure local children with their adorable extraterrestrial critters.

Movies.title: The Lost Lion Kingdom
Movies.overview: It’s the roar heard throughout the universe when two childhood friends go into outer space to save all the lions in a lost lion kingdom.

Movies.title: SamSam
Movies.overview: A kid who seems to have it all—great friends, a loving family and even his own flying saucer—is still waiting on one thing: actual superpowers.

Movies.title: Toby's Big Adventure
Movies.overview: After becoming separated from his caretakers, curious and rambunctious baby tiger Toby is joined by a dog named Lana on a journey into the wilderness.

Movies.title: Kid Cop
Movies.overview: Determined to emulate his police officer dad who died on duty, an 11-year-old boy gets in over his head trying to solve a big local robbery case.

Movies.title: Pirates of the Plain
Movies.overview: Bobby is an eight-year-old boy growing up in the rural Midwest with his mother and grandfather. With few friends and not much to do besides his chores, Bobby entertains himself by retreating into a world of fantasy. After a freak storm Bobby discovers that reality has caught up with his imagination.

Movies.title: The Gold Retrievers
Movies.overview: A boy, his loyal dog and a brave young girl are on the hunt for some buried treasure, but a couple of greedy crooks are after the same fortune.

Movies.title: Jim Button and the Wild 13
Movies.overview: To protect Morrowland from a notorious pirate gang, Jim Button and his best friend make Emma airworthy and set off on a dangerous journey.

Movies.title: Beyond Beyond
Movies.overview: After being separated from his family in the Feather Kingdom, a rabbit embarks on the adventure of a lifetime to find his family and his way home.

Movies.title: Pinocchio and the Emperor of the Night
Movies.overview: Pinocchio and his friends, a glow worm and a marionette, are searching for a magic music box. However, so are the evil Scalawag and the Emperor of the Night. With James Earl Jones and Edward Asner.

Movies.title: Pirates Down the Street
Movies.overview: A coastal town gets a new family of boisterous, rum-drinking pirates, but just as they are settling in a rival pirate comes ready to sell them out.

Movies.title: Pixies
Movies.overview: Joe Beck (Bill Paxton) has lost the love of his life, Michelle Meyers (Alexa Vega), thanks to a Pixie's curse. To figure out how to get his girl back, Joe must learn more about the mysterious Pixies to undo a bad deed from long ago.

Movies.title: The Mighty Kong
Movies.overview: A film director and an actress travel to an island to make a movie and bring a giant ape to New York City, in this musical take on the 1933 classic.

Movies.title: The Inventor
Movies.overview: Inventor Leonardo da Vinci and Princess Marguerite embark on a whimsical adventure, crafting flying machines and exploring life's mysteries together.

Movies.title: Gotta Catch Santa Claus
Movies.overview: Every kid knows that Santa Claus isn't real. That's baby stuff, right? Well not to 12-year-old Trevor. Join him on a mission to catch Santa in this adventure filled special!

Movies.title: The Little Unicorn
Movies.overview: Polly's favorite mare dies giving birth to a miraculous baby unicorn that she sets out to rescue when a village delinquent steals it for its magic.

Movies.title: Princess Emmy
Movies.overview: One little girl in the Kingdom of Kandis is put to the ultimate test to keep her best friends and her secret gift of being able to speak to horses.

Movies.title: Two Buddies and a Badger
Movies.overview: A zany animated musical adventure about what happens when two rowdy old friends take a badger along for the road trip of a lifetime.

Movies.title: Jurassic Tale
Movies.overview: After a baby T. rex hatches from a prehistoric egg found in a nearby cave, siblings Emma and Brian must outsmart an evil scientist who wants the dinosaur for his own nefarious purposes.

Movies.title: Princess and the Pony
Movies.overview: A sheltered young princess is sent to live with relatives in America, where she befriends a pony held captive by a shady carnival owner.

Movies.title: Santa and the Three Bears
Movies.overview: When a park ranger tells two bear cubs about Christmas and Santa Claus, they want to skip hibernation to celebrate, but their mother doesn't believe in Saint Nick and wants them to sleep.

Movies.title: Mandie and the Forgotten Christmas
Movies.overview: When Mandie is thrust into Miss Heathwood's School for Girls, she struggles to grasp the school's new rules. As Mandie tries to stay out of hot water with Miss Heathwood and discover what the headmistress seems to have against Christmas, she stumbles upon a mystery in the school's forbidden attic. Uncovering the truth may lead to unlocking the memories of a long-forgotten Christmas.

Movies.title: The Great Bear
Movies.overview: Jonathan spends his vacations alone with his grandfather on the edge of a forest populated by mythical animals. This year his kid sister Sophie joins. When she disappears, he has to venture into the heart of the forest to rescue her.

Movies.title: Boonie Bears: Homeward Journey
Movies.overview: It’s up to two brave bears to band together and speak out against a powerful logger who intends to chop down all the trees in their forest.

Movies.title: A Christmas Carol
Movies.overview: Dickens’ classic tale is honored by a Victorian family’s toy theatre company, which captures the imaginations and hearts of children and adults.

Movies.title: Tappy Toes
Movies.overview: A young penguin unexpectedly finds a pair of tap shoes in an old steamer trunk and soon becomes the only penguin who can tap dance.

Movies.title: The Adventures of Snow White and Rose Red
Movies.overview: While roaming the forest near their cottage, Snow White and Rose Red learn the woods are magical and begin to cross paths with characters they've only read about in their fairy tale book! As they embark on their adventures, the girls learn the importance of sisterhood, friendship, and kindness, and that life can be far from ordinary, if you just believe in a little magic.

Movies.title: Call of the Wild
Movies.overview: This adventure drama tells the story of a young girl in Montana who rescues a hurt wolf, but attracts an evil stranger’s attention in the process.

Movies.title: Dog City: The Movie
Movies.overview: After his uncle dies, Ace inherits a saloon in the tough streets of Dog City, but things get ruff when Ace refuses to pay off the local crime boss.

Movies.title: The Steam Engines of Oz
Movies.overview: To keep the gears of Emerald City turning, a young mechanic named Victoria embarks on a magical adventure to help the Tin Man find his heart.

Movies.title: Leo Da Vinci: Mission Mona Lisa
Movies.overview: Set in Italy during the Renaissance, young inventor Leo Da Vinci sets out to find a sunken treasure with his friend Lorenzo and the girl he loves.

Movies.title: Slugterra: Eastern Caverns
Movies.overview: Eli, the Shane Gang, and their new friend Junjie enter the strange and beautiful Eastern Caverns and find an evil emperor’s dark and dangerous world.

Movies.title: My Giraffe
Movies.overview: Patterson is best friends with his neighbor, Raf the giraffe. The pair are inseparable until Patterson starts school and realizes that Raf can't come with him. Unbeknownst to his teacher, Patterson hatches a brilliant plan to bring Raf to school and enjoy the company of his new friends. Based on a nursery rhyme, My Giraffe is a funny story about the value of friendship and the love of learning.

Movies.title: My Pet Dinosaur
Movies.overview: A boy’s lovable pet, created by a botched experiment, grows larger and more mischievous as the boy and his pals try to keep the military police away.

Movies.title: Space Dogs: Tropical Adventure
Movies.overview: Cuando un misterioso y poderoso remolino aparece en el océano, Belka y Strelka deberán nuevamente demostrar heroísmo para salvar el planeta.

Movies.title: Snowtime!
Movies.overview: When winter break comes to a small village, an 11-year-old boy and girl lead opposing teams of kids and engage in a long and epic snowball fight.

Movies.title: A Doggone Christmas
Movies.overview: Un perrito telepático se escapa de la CIA que lo quiere usar como arma secreta y llega a brazos de dos hermanitos a tiempo para Navidad.

Movies.title: Jungle Shuffle
Movies.overview: Deep in the Mexican rainforest, two young coatis fall in love, but when one gets exiled by the king, he must rescue the princess and prove his worth.

Movies.title: A Doggone Adventure
Movies.overview: A group of junior detectives help a dog to figure out where his telepathic powers come from and it escalates into a world of UFOs and secret agents.

Movies.title: Believe
Movies.overview: Manchester United’s fabled real-life soccer coach, Sir Matt Busby, comes out of retirement when a gifted young athlete and his teammates need a hero.

Movies.title: Magic Island
Movies.overview: Jack, a 13-year old who discovers a fantastic new world that lies beyond the pages of a magical book about pirates! Before you can say "shiver me timbers", Jack is whisked into the book itself...and a world of adventure!

Movies.title: Amanda and the Fox
Movies.overview: When a young girl begs her dad for a dog, to no avail, she adopts a stray fox and tries to keep it as a pet, but trouble follows in their tracks.

Movies.title: Wonderstruck
Movies.overview: Ben and Rose are children from two different eras who secretly wish their lives were different. Ben longs for the father he has never known, while Rose dreams of a mysterious actress whose life she chronicles in a scrapbook. When Ben discovers a puzzling clue in his home and Rose reads an enticing headline in the newspaper, both children set out on quests that unfold with mesmerizing symmetry.

Movies.title: Turkles
Movies.overview: A group of curious kids from fictitious "Camp Loggerhead" embark on an adventure to solve the mystery of the missing sea turtle eggs. Led by two determined 13-year-olds, the clever campers must overcome dangerous obstacles, gather evidence, earn the trust of their parents, and ultimately catch the clueless poachers.

Movies.title: SlugTerra: Return of the Elementals
Movies.overview: A new member joins Eli and the Shane Gang! Junjie, master of the slugslinging art of Slug Fu, arrives just in time to help them face an evil alliance.

Movies.title: Under The Sea
Movies.overview: JoJo and her Mom have just moved from a big city reef to Bubbletown a small, friendly village beneath the sea. They have arrived just in time for Mother's Day! JoJo's new friends help her find the perfect gift for Mom, making it the best Mother's Day under the sea ever!

Movies.title: Long Way North
Movies.overview: A young 19th-century Russian aristocrat embarks on an epic quest to find her grandfather at the North Pole and save her family’s reputation.

Movies.title: Mandie and the Cherokee Treasure
Movies.overview: Reunited with her estranged mother, Mandie embarks on a family quest to find rumored gold in a dangerous cave and make good on an old promise.

Movies.title: The Adventures of Jurassic Pet 2: The Lost Secret
Movies.overview: A teenage girl and her pal must protect a baby T. Rex who escaped into their world while stopping an evil plot threatening the whole town.

Movies.title: Pup Star: World Tour
Movies.overview: Pup Star is back and bigger than ever as the hit singing pup competition goes global. After achieving international stardom Tiny joins the inaugural Pup Star World Tour as a celebrity judge. As they travel the world each judge chooses their favourite contestant to compete for the new title of global pup star champion.

Movies.title: Storybook
Movies.overview: An eight-year-old boy is transported by a magical book, which takes him to an enchanted land where he must battle a wicked queen.

Movies.title: Bone Alone
Movies.overview: When his family leaves him alone on Christmas Eve, a dog tries to prevent burglars from stealing his family’s presents in this fun family comedy.

Movies.title: Sherlock: Undercover Dog
Movies.overview: A 10-year-old boy goes to Catalina to spend the summer with his toy-maker dad and meets a talking dog who needs his help to crack an important case.

Movies.title: Louis & Luca: Mission to the Moon
Movies.overview: Representing Norway, Louis builds a rocket and sets off on an international race to the moon alongside a brilliant inventor and a nervous hedgehog.

Movies.title: Turu, the Wacky Hen
Movies.overview: A misfit hen who can't lay eggs comes to discover she can talk, sing and dance and takes her talents on the road as a world famous circus act.

Movies.title: Bobby the Hedgehog
Movies.overview: A mischievous hedgehog and a chubby pigeon travel to the big city, where they must calm the nervous humans by being their cute, cuddly selves.

Movies.title: Nessie & Me
Movies.overview: Un chico de 9 años deberá convencer a todos de que sí existe la linda criatura mítica del lago para salvar al pueblo de un codicioso magnate.

Movies.title: The Sneak Over
Movies.overview: A misfit fifth grader who finds camaraderie with a group of film geeks must locate his dad’s limited-edition VHS or risk being grounded forever.

Movies.title: Ghost Squad
Movies.overview: Charlie, Alex and Nick weren't the most popular kids around after they formed "The Elite Monster Unit," chasing notorious mythical legends and ghosts!

Movies.title: Wind Dancer
Movies.overview: When a young girl is injured by a riding accident, she overcomes her injury with the help of her family and her beloved horse.

Movies.title: Quackerz
Movies.overview: Though natural foes, Mandarin and Canadian ducks must learn how to come together when a human villain arrives at their island and threatens them all.

Movies.title: Emmet Otter's Jug-Band Christmas
Movies.overview: Down-on-their-luck since Pa’s death, Ma and son Emmet both secretly enter a talent show with their eyes on a cash prize to make Christmas special.

Movies.title: Dear Dracula
Movies.overview: Dracula has a great opportunity to try his brand new skills at the neighborhood Halloween party, where he realizes that self-confidence is enough to make him as scary as he ever was.

Movies.title: Sonic Christmas Blast
Movies.overview: Santa Claus has made an announcement - he is retiring and has picked the perfect successor - "Robotnikclaus"!  Sonic and his sister resolve to persuade Santa to return and set Christmas straight.  When the two track down the Santa who made the announcement, they discover he is just a phony robot and the real Santa Claus is being held prisoner.

Movies.title: Monkey King: Hero Is Back
Movies.overview: A young boy escapes the monstrous army attacking his tiny village and encounters a legendary hero with the power to save his people.

Movies.title: Popular Theory
Movies.overview: Eager to win the state science fair, a tween genius and a fellow outcast invent a popularity chemical that turns their school hierarchy upside down.

Movies.title: Fantastic Journey to Oz
Movies.overview: A special girl arrives in a magical land that is being overtaken by an evil ruler. Before she can return home, she helps her new friends in need.

Movies.title: Cool Dog
Movies.overview: Un perro genial, no dispuesto a dejar ir a su familia humana, embarca un viaje a través del país para llegar a Nueva York y buscarlos.

Movies.title: Space Pups
Movies.overview: Two young children and their parents help a trio of aliens who have been transformed into friendly dogs escape the clutches of a local UFO hunter.

Movies.title: The Adventures of Ociee Nash
Movies.overview: Set in 1898, a motherless nine-year-old is sent to live with her aunt in North Carolina where she crosses paths with famous historical figures.

Movies.title: Rabbit School: Guardians of the Golden Egg
Movies.overview: A young shoplifting rabbit winds up in an Easter bunny school and sets out on a quest to protect the coveted Golden Egg from a family of scheming foxes.

Movies.title: The Fairy King
Movies.overview: When children discover fairies trapped inside a mine, they try to free them and save their father’s life, but fearful locals have their own agenda.

Movies.title: Dolphin Kick
Movies.overview: After a young boy connects with a dolphin, he does everything in his power to help the adorable creature find its lost ocean family.

Movies.title: A Horse Story
Movies.overview: When a tween-ager learns that her colt can talk, she helps him decide what kind of horse he wants to be when he grows up and finds her own path, too.

Movies.title: The Dog Who Saved Halloween
Movies.overview: After a family moves into a new house, their mysterious neighbor’s home has strange lights coming from it, and their talking dog is on the case!

Movies.title: To the Beat!
Movies.overview: Twin teen dancers Mia and Mackie become competitors when offered the chance of a lifetime to try out for their favorite pop star’s new music video.

Movies.title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland
Movies.overview: As in Lewis Carroll’s classic, Alice falls down a rabbit hole, into a magical dream world, populated by surreal characters and bewildering adventures.

Movies.title: The Secret Garden
Movies.overview: Following the tragic death of her parents, a teenager explores the mysterious Misselthwaite Factory, where she discovers an unusual world.

Movies.title: The BFG
Movies.overview: Awakening one night to find a 25-foot giant outside her window, Sophie is taken on the adventure of a lifetime as he brings her to a faraway land.

Movies.title: Cricket & Antoinette
Movies.overview: In this update of the Aesop fable, a hardworking ant tries to warn her cricket neighbors about the dangers of winter to come, and falls for a rock star who convinces her to sing.

Movies.title: Dog Gone
Movies.overview: It’s a battle between man’s best friend and America’s most wanted when a clever boy and a dog take on a crew of diamond thieves.

Movies.title: Sox: A Family's Best Friend
Movies.overview: An adorable talking dog may be the answer to a newly blended family's problems—if they can keep a local dog catcher from getting his paws on the pup.

Movies.title: TimeCrafters: The Treasure of Pirate's Cove
Movies.overview: Time-traveling pirates searching for treasure end up in the present day and do battle with unlikely foes: kids with the latest in hi-tech gadgetry.

Movies.title: Storm Boy
Movies.overview: The inspiring story of a boy cut off from the world as he lives with his father on a coastline and forms a powerful bond with a young pelican.

Movies.title: The Dog Who Saved the Holidays
Movies.overview: Un perro valiente y su hermana cachorra trabajan juntos para evitar que dos ladrones irrumpan en la casa de sus dueños y causen estragos.

Movies.title: Bunyan and Babe
Movies.overview: Travis falls through a magical portal which transports him to the world of American hero Paul Bunyan and his big, blue, talking ox, Babe!

Movies.title: The Incredible Story of the Giant Pear
Movies.overview: At the beach, an elephant and his feline friend find a message in a bottle and set out for adventure on a mysterious island to bring their mayor home.

Movies.title: Golden Winter
Movies.overview: A boy and a litter of rescued Golden Retrievers team up to stop a daring bank robbery before Christmas, proving heroes can come in any form.

Movies.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! The Movie
Movies.overview: It’s up to young Yugi to gather the courage and utilize his game skills to defeat Kaiba, his powerful rival, as well as a sinister Egyptian mummy.

Movies.title: The Boxcar Children: Surprise Island
Movies.overview: While vacationing on their grandfather’s private island, Henry, Jessie, Violet, and Benny meet a curious young man and go on unexpected adventures.

Movies.title: The Stolen Princess
Movies.overview: A wandering artist who dreams of becoming a knight must rescue his love, a beautiful princess, when she's kidnapped by an evil sorcerer.

Movies.title: Two Tails
Movies.overview: When their friends are abducted by aliens, a determined beaver and a restless cat embark on a dangerous rescue mission to outer space.

Movies.title: Merry Little Batman
Movies.overview: This Christmas, Damian Wayne wants to be a superhero like his dad – the one and only Batman. When Damian is left home alone while Batman takes on Gotham's worst supervillains on Christmas Eve, he stumbles upon a villainous plot to steal Christmas and leaps at the chance to save the day.

Movies.title: Here Comes Peter Cottontail
Movies.overview: When the Easter Bunny retires, he chooses Peter Cottontail as his successor. However, January Q. Irontail desires the role for a much crueler purpose.

Movies.title: Cinderella and the Secret Prince
Movies.overview: During the Royal Ball, Cinderella discovers that the apparent prince is a fake, and she must save the real one, whom a bad witch turned into a mouse.

Movies.title: The House of Magic
Movies.overview: Thunder is a young cat who has been abandoned by his family. Alone and lost, he finds refuge in a mysterious house that belongs to a retired magician. Thunder feels at home in this haunted house, filled with strange characters who are a lot of fun.

Movies.title: Miracle Dogs
Movies.overview: Based on true events, Josh learns about love, loss, and optimism when he looks for homes for abandoned puppies with healing effects on humans.

Movies.title: Dinosaur Island
Movies.overview: A boy and girl find themselves stranded in a wondrous lost world, where they encounter tribal natives, dinosaurs, and a life long-forgotten.

Movies.title: A Tooth Fairy Tale
Movies.overview: A rebellious tooth fairy, a cuddly troll, and a brilliant goblin scientist unite to save their magical worlds from menacing spiders.

Movies.title: Kung Food
Movies.overview: Super Bao, an innocent steamed stuffed bun, dreams of becoming a great hero. Now he must battle the evil Pirate King to save the world of foods.

Movies.title: The Dog Who Saved Summer
Movies.overview: When Zeus accidentally destroys an important party, he gets sent to obedience school while a trio of bumbling burglars are planning a heist.

Movies.title: Arthur and the Revenge of Maltazard
Movies.overview: After receiving an urgent plea for assistance from Princess Selenia, Arthur rushes to her aid to help stop the villainous Emperor Maltazard.

Movies.title: Maya the Bee: The Golden Orb
Movies.overview: When Maya, a headstrong little bee, and her best friend Willi, rescue an ant princess they suddenly find themselves thrust into an epic bug battle.

Movies.title: The Retrievers
Movies.overview: When the Lowrys' newly adopted stray golden retriever gives birth, they give away her litter and, in the process, learn what it means to be a family.

Movies.title: Maya the Bee: The Honey Games
Movies.overview: Following an unproductive harvest season, it’s up to Maya and her brave friends to save their hive by competing in a series of games.

Movies.title: Camp Cool Kids
Movies.overview: Two brothers at summer camp have to face-off during the annual games contests, except one is on the bullying team and the other is with the “dweebs.”

Movies.title: Dolphin Boy
Movies.overview: Raised by dolphins, a little boy is banished to dry land, where he sets out on a journey to solve the mystery of his true identity.

Movies.title: Maya the Bee Movie
Movies.overview: A bubbly little bumblebee rebels against the rules of the hive to make all kinds of friends—from violin-playing grasshoppers to a hornet named Sting.

Movies.title: The School of the Magical Animals
Movies.overview: When her family moves, Ida transfers to a new school where the students are given magical animal companions and learn about the power of friendship.

Movies.title: MVP: Most Valuable Primate
Movies.overview: Jack, a chimpanzee who recently escaped from an experimental lab, finds his way onto the ice at a junior hockey practice. Steven and his teammates realize the chimp has a natural talent for the game and he officially joins the team. As they win game after game, Jack becomes a minor celebrity, attracting the attention of a mad scientist.

Movies.title: SeeFood
Movies.overview: When a bamboo shark learns humans are stealing eggs from his reef, he bravely leaves the ocean on a mission to get them back.

Movies.title: Ooops! Noah Is Gone...
Movies.overview: Featuring the voices of Martin Sheen and Amy Grant, comes the untold story of Noah's Ark. Get ready for an epic adventure with Nestrians Dave and Finny, a clumsy species who attempt to sneak onto the Ark but accidentally get left behind!

Movies.title: Khumba
Movies.overview: After being rejected by his herd, a half-striped zebra must find his own path towards self-acceptance and save all the animals of the Great Karoo.

Movies.title: The Wolf and the Lion
Movies.overview: Ripped away from the girl who rescued them, two cubs, a wolf, and a lion, embark on a treacherous journey across the wilderness to be reunited.

Movies.title: Flaming Ears
Movies.overview: This pop sci-fi lesbian extravaganza set in the year 2700 in the fictional burned-out city of Asche follows the tangled lives of three women. Truly underground and shot on Super 8, "Flaming Ears" is original for its playful disruption of narrative conventions, its witty approach to film genre, and its punk visual splendor.

Movies.title: Mee-Shee: The Water Giant

Then, keep rockin' in a second musical adventure, as you help Dora and Boots bring Baby Bongo over Troll Bridge and past snapping crocodiles to perform in his first show ever at the top of Music Show Mountain! Movies.title: Blessed Assurance: The Life and Music of Fanny Crosby

Praise Him!," "Safe in the Arms of Jesus," "Rescue the Perishing," "He Hideth My Soul," "Near the Cross,"and"Tell Me the Story of Jesus." Beautifully scored with a full chorus by Janet Maish Thomas, the arranger portrays the –blind poetess of song,” who penned over 8,000 of America's most beloved hymns. D. With help from some cool gadgets and two former spy kids, Rebecca and Cecil join

Movies.title: Katy Perry: Getting Intimate
Movies.overview: Get an in-depth look into the world of pop star Katy Perry with unseen backstage footage and interviews with John Mayer, Russell Brand and more.

Movies.title: John Waite - The Hard Way

Movies.title: Underground Inc: The Rise and Fall of Alternative Rock

Movies.title: Classic Albums: Peter Gabriel - So

Movies.title: The Decline of Western Civilization Part III

Movies.title: Anabolic Life
Movies.overview: Anabolic Life is about a young man who desperately struggles with his own body-image. Regardless of his steady job, beautiful fiance, and new home, Adam hates what he sees in the mirror. Battling demons and delusions, his emotional and psychological struggle continues on a downward spiral. He decides that building muscle is his only solution. After researching quick muscle-building tips, Adam stumbles across how to make and use Fina. Next thing you know, he's shooting home-made steroids. Then he develops a needle-related infection and ends up in the hospital. Unfortunately, almost losing his life doesn't end his amateur steroid use. Instead, he encounters a dealer at the gym who takes him under his wing. Adam proceeds down a twisted path of self-destruction and is about to lose everything, including himself. But... will he come to terms with his illness? Will he have the strength to fight back?

What continues to feed the competitive fires inside multi-time champions like Chad Reed or Ryan Dungey? How is it that Kurt Caselli is comfortable going over 100mph on two wheels through the unchartered desert? Is it competitive drive or pure natural talent that allows Taddy Blazusiak to decimate his competition? How does Taylor Robert navigate his way through a dream-like, Jurrasic-sized motocross track built within a vineyard? This year we dug deep to find what pushes the top riders to keep elevating this amazing sport we love. Welcome to the next level of evolution of the most progressive motocross film series of all time, Moto 4: The Movie.

Movies.title: The Turn of the Screw

Movies.title: The Haunting of Julia Fields

Movies.title: The Ancestral

Movies.title: Haunted
Movies.overview: When an aspiring author house-sits for his sister while she is out of town, he discovers something more terrifying than any story he could ever write.

Movies.title: Planet of Dinosaurs

Movies.title: Edie & Thea: A Very Long Engagement

Movies.title: New York Doll

Herzl organized and led a political movement that led to the establishment of the state of Israel.

Movies.title: Bob and the Monster

Movies.title: Rihanna - Inselkind, Popstar, Nationalheldin

Follow the most tremendous Aussies on their long road to success becoming Australia's first ProTour cycling team.

Movies.title: Will Smith: The Prince of Hollywood
Movies.overview: Follow the compelling journey of Smith from relatively obscurity as a late-80s rapper to his rise to superstardom while never losing the will to win.

Movies.title: The Gilligan Manifesto

Movies.title: 42 Grams

Movies.title: It's Not Yet Dark

Movies.title: Tom Cruise: An Eternal Youth

Movies.title: Willard: The Hermit of Gully Lake

Movies.title: The Image Revolution

Movies.title: Believe: The Eddie Izzard Story

Movies.title: The Rise of Jordan Peterson

Movies.title: Rich Mullins: A Ragamuffin's Legacy

Movies.title: Boris Karloff: The Man Behind the Monster

Movies.title: The Girl Who Became Three Boys

Over the course of several months, Gemma invented and impersonated three different boys, 'Aaron', 'Luke' and 'Connor' and under these three separate guises went on to seduce two teenage girls.

Movies.title: My Name Is Fleming, Ian Fleming
Movies.overview: The man who invented James Bond: The story of Ian Fleming, real-life spy, ladies' man and sportsman, who was there at the birth of MI-5 and the CIA, and gave the world one of its most enduring and iconic heroes: Bond. James Bond.

Movies.title: Call Me Lucky

Movies.title: Master of Dark Shadows

Movies.title: Gilbert

Movies.title: Harry & Meghan: A Modern Royal Romance

Movies.title: Urartu: The Forgotten Kingdom

Movies.title: Tupac Vs.

Movies.title: Notorious B.I.G.: Bigger Than Life

Movies.title: Pizza Shop: An Italian-American Dream

This is the incredible story of how one determined middle aged man of almost 50 years old beat the odds, only to be cut down in tragic circumstances. This is the story behind Joey Dunlop, told by those that were there.

Movies.title: Prince Philip: An Extraordinary Life

The film is guided by David Bowie’s own narration and is the first officially sanctioned film on the artist.

Movies.title: My Best Fiend

Movies.title: Hannibal Hopkins & Sir Anthony

Movies.title: William and Kate: A Year On

Movies.title: Manson: Music from an Unsound Mind

Movies.title: Brian Eno 1971–1977: The Man Who Fell To Earth

Movies.title: John Wayne - America at All Costs
Movies.overview: A look at a man who climbed Hollywood’s ladder, one rung at a time, follows him to the top, where he was the most popular American actor of his era.

Movies.title: Kurt Cobain: About a Son
Movies.overview: Recorded interviews and impressionistic visuals tell the story of the life of Nirvana frontman Kurt Cobain, who ended his life in 1994 at age 27.

Movies.title: Is This El Chapo?
Movies.overview: This documentary probes the truth behind the 2014 arrest of Joaquin "El Chapo" Guzman, the world's most notorious drug lord.

Movies.title: Gatsby in Connecticut: The Untold Story
Movies.overview: Meet the party-throwing Gold Coast millionaire and muse of F. Scott Fitzgerald who allegedly inspired the protagonist of his classic novel.

Movies.title: Oh, Dior!
Movies.overview: Celebrate the 70th year of the haute couture brand that has continued to be a force in luxury fashion long after the death of its pioneering founder.

Movies.title: Eddie Murphy: Laugh 'Til it Hurts
Movies.overview: The untold story of the challenges the prolific actor, comedian, and standup faced while on his road to superstardom some six decades ago.

Movies.title: Bob Fosse: It's Showtime!
Movies.overview: A look at the extraordinary life and career of the influential director, choreographer, and cinematographer known for his self-destructive nature.

Movies.title: Charles Bronson: The Spirit of Masculinity
Movies.overview: A retrospective of the enigmatic, stone-faced star, before Hollywood typecast him as a lone killer, reveals a versatile actor worthy of a second look.

Movies.title: Freedom on the Range
Movies.overview: From brave lawmen to rugged ranchers and cowboys, discover five untold stories of African Americans' cultural significance in America’s Old West.

Movies.title: The Secret Diary of the Holocaust
Movies.overview: Documentary telling the tale of a 14-year-old Polish girl, Rutka Laskier, who was murdered at Auschwitz in 1943, whose diary was found under the floorboards of her home in 2005.

Movies.title: Steve McQueen: Desert Racer
Movies.overview: This documentary reveals a film icon's secret love for desert racing and the creation of the 'Desert Racer,' with interviews and rare footage.

Movies.overview: Overlooked by history, Pauli Murray was a legal trailblazer whose ideas influenced RBG’s fight for gender equality and Thurgood Marshall’s civil rights arguments. This is a portrait of their impact as a non-binary Black luminary: lawyer, activist, poet, and priest who transformed our world.

Movies.title: Benedict Arnold: Hero Betrayed

Movies.title: Elon Musk: The Real Life Iron Man
Movies.overview: Get to know the visionary who changed how the general population thinks about electric cars, the Hyperloop, colonizing Mars, and so much more.

Movies.title: Queen Elizabeth II: The Diamond Celebration
Movies.overview: An insightful documentary taking a deeper look at the generations-long reign of Queen Elizabeth II as told through insider interviews and archival footage.

Movies.title: Chasing Happiness

From humble roots as pastor’s sons in New Jersey, through their meteoric rise to fame, the Jonas Brothers’ bond was unshakeable-until a surprising and painful breakup led Joe, Kevin and Nick down very different paths. With deeply personal interviews, previously unreleased footage and exclusive music, this is the Jonas Brothers as never seen before.

Movies.title: Our Nixon

Movies.title: Tupac Shakur: Before I Wake

Movies.title: Princes of the Palace - The Royal British Family
Movies.overview: Explore the unique personalities and fascinating lives of the princes of the British Royal Family in this chronicle that spans the generations.

Movies.title: Magnus

Movies.title: Rita Hayworth - Zu viel vom Leben

Movies.title: Mully

Movies.title: Prince Philip: The Man Behind the Throne

Movies.title: The Terry Kath Experience

Movies.title: Marilyn Monroe Declassified

Movies.title: Bruce Lee: The Legend

Movies.title: Mother Teresa: No Greater Love

Movies.title: Ghoulies IV

Movies.title: Sugarbaby

Movies.title: Who Will Save The Roses?

German with English subtitles.

Movies.title: Tanks for Stalin

Cutlers new film THE SEPTEMBER ISSUE does for fashion what he did for politics in THE

Movies.title: All the Wild Horses

Movies.title: Black Sabbath - Up Close and Personal
Movies.overview: A critical review of the heavy metal music pioneers draws on archival concert film and footage from television and radio libraries around the world

Movies.title: Fighters of WWII: Spitfire, Mustang, and Messerschmitt
Movies.overview: Rare and authentic footage details what made the Spitfire, P-51 Mustang and Messerschmitt Bf 109 such exceptional fighters during World War II.

Movies.title: Silent Twin: Without My Shadow
Movies.overview: True story of identical twins June and Jennifer Gibbons, who from age of three spoke only to each other in a secret language. At the age of 19, after a six-week spree of arson and theft, they were committed to Britain's top security hospital for criminally insane. With her twin dead, June is preparing for her release from prison.

Movies.title: Unbranded
Movies.overview: Four young cowboys hatch an outrageous plot to adopt, train, and ride a string of wild mustangs 3,000 miles from Mexico to Canada through the wildest terrain of the American West. The trip becomes an epic journey of self-discovery, testing friendships, and iconic landscapes that includes runaway horses, a sassy donkey, perilous mountain passes, rodeos, sickness, injury, and death.

Movies.title: High Tech Airport
Movies.overview: With 66 million passengers coming through it each year, Roissy-Charles-De-Gaulle airport is Europe's second largest and busiest hub. Every day, up to 1800 aircraft land and take off in record time. This film provides a fascinating glimpse into how Roissy-Charles-De-Gaulle airport is able to welcome over 230,000 passengers a day with as little turbulence as possible.

Movies.title: Redeeming Uncle Tom: The Josiah Henson Story
Movies.overview: Redeeming Uncle Tom, narrated by acclaimed actor Danny Glover, is a ground-breaking documentary that will restore a hero of the abolitionist movement to his rightful place in history. Josiah Henson overcame incredible odds and brutal oppression to escape from slavery. His life inspired Uncle Tom’s Cabin, the classic novel which has been recognized as one of the sparks that ignited the Civil War.

Movies.title: A Noble Lie: Oklahoma City 1995
Movies.overview: Peels back answers long ignored and censored by mainstream media and the U.S. government about the 1995 Oklahoma City bombing and it's perpetrators.

Movies.title: Fame Kills: Princess Diana
Movies.overview: On Saturday, August 30th, 1997, Diana Princess of Wales leaves Sardinia on a private jet. She arrives in Paris with film producer Dodi Fayed, stopping there en route to London, having spent the preceding nine days together on board Fayed's yacht on the Italian and French Riviera. At 12:20 pm, Diana and Dodi departed from the Ritz Paris hotel rear entrance, heading for Dodi's father's apartment in Rue Arsène Houssaye. By doing this, they avoid a swarm of over thirty photographers waiting in front of the hotel. Three minutes later, after being chased by the paparazzi, the driver loses control of the vehicle and the car crashes. Diana's life was complicated, and it ended tragically. The fame and public admiration, although well intentioned is what ultimately killed her.

Movies.title: Pumping Iron
Movies.overview: Arnold Schwarzenegger and Lou Ferrigno face off in a no-holds-barred competition for the title of Mr. Olympia in this critically-acclaimed film.

Movies.title: Roswell Top Secret
Movies.overview: A documentary that attempts to sort out fact vs. the many fictions of what’s known as the Roswell incident involving a mysterious flying object.

Movies.title: Long Gone Wild
Movies.overview: Animal activists at the Whale Sanctuary Project work to end the captivity of killer whales at marine theme parks and save the endangered species.

Movies.title: The Billion Dollar Hotel
Movies.overview: An exploration of the high life in the Burj Al Arab Hotel, located in Dubai, as lived by the hotel staff and guests as its 15th anniversary nears..

Movies.title: A Dying King: The Shah of Iran
Movies.overview: The story of the last Shah of Iran, exiled during the Iranian Revolution of 1979, and how his illness and eventual death impacted world politics.

Movies.title: Operation Anaconda: The Battle of Roberts' Ridge
Movies.overview: This doc follows the U.S. Army Rangers, as they fight to rescue a patrol unit in a dangerous battle at Takur Ghar, a mountain ridge in Afghanistan.

Movies.title: Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.: A Historical Perspective
Movies.overview: The trailblazing beliefs and civil rights fights of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. come into focus with rare archival film and photos of an American hero.

Movies.title: An American Tragedy

Movies.title: Secrets of the Mega Resort

Movies.title: I Have Never Forgotten You: The Life & Legacy of Simon Wiesenthal

Movies.title: Mary J. Blige's My Life

Movies.title: Prince: Sign 'o' the Times

Movies.title: Anjelah Johnson: The Homecoming Show

Movies.title: Caroline Flack: Her Life and Death
Movies.overview: A tribute to one of Britain's biggest TV stars, telling the story of Caroline Flack's life, and the impact that fame, mental health issues, press and social media had on her. This revealing documentary explores the impact that fame, mental health issues, press and social media had on Caroline Flack's life, as her friends and family come to terms with their loss.

Movies.title: The Night of the Long Knives

Movies.title: Tear the Roof Off: The Untold Story of Parliament Funkadelic
Movies.overview: Parliament and Funkadelic were the far-out creations of genius George Clinton in their 1970s heyday until excess, greed, and discord took a huge toll.

Movies.title: Discovering Bigfoot

Movies.title: Time Warp Vol. 1: Midnight Madness
Movies.overview: Terrific documentary made for midnight movie buffs, with clips and interviews from films ‘Foxy Brown’ and ‘The Big Lebowski’ to ‘This Is Spinal Tap.’

Movies.title: Lonestar: Stevie Ray Vaughan 1984-1989

Movies.title: Century of Queen Mother - 100 Years in 100 Minutes: A Celebration
Movies.overview: A look at the impressive 100 years lived by the Queen Mother as a constant revered figure in British life and an impactful global leader.

Movies.title: Solar System: The Secrets of the Universe

Movies.title: Nazi Death Marches

Movies.title: The Evidence For Heaven
Movies.overview: Documentary about those with near-death experience who have returned to mortal life with stories of the afterlife and testimony about heaven.

Movies.title: Freddie

Movies.title: Sinatra in Palm Springs

Movies.title: Smoke & Ribbons a DocQmentary

Movies.title: Chris Brown: Welcome to My Life

Movies.title: The Man Who Cracked the Nazi Code: The Story of Alan Turing

On this pivotal moment in history when the outcome of the Second World War was at stake, much has been recounted, analyzed and examined and yet, the D-Day landings were only possible thanks to a socially-awkward, antimilitarist mathematician named Alan Turing and his field was the most fundamental branch of mathematics: logic.

Movies.title: Untrapped: The Story of Lil Baby

Told through previously unseen footage and set to a soundtrack of his biggest hits.

The verdict is in, justice is being served, and this is only the beginning of the reckoning.

Movies.title: Sunset Strip

Movies.title: Song of the South: Duane Allman and the Rise of the Allman Brothers Band

Movies.title: ABBA: 50 Years Since Eurovision

Movies.title: Trump: The Art of the Insult

Movies.title: The Bad Kids

Movies.title: Skin: A History of Nudity in the Movies
Movies.overview: A definitive documentary on the history of nudity in the movies, beginning with the silent movie era through present day, examining the changes in morality that led to the use of nudity in films while emphasizing the political, sociological and artistic changes that shaped this rich history. Skin delves into the gender bias concerning nudity in motion pictures and will follow the revolution that has pushed for gender equality in feature films today. A deep discussion of pre-code Hollywood and its amoral roots, the censorship that “cleaned up” Hollywood and how the MPAA was formed leads into a discussion of how nudity changed cinematic culture through the decades. It culminates in a discussion of “what are nude scenes like in the age of the #METOO movement?”

Movies.title: Is Genesis History? Mountains After the Flood

With the days of leaving your "keys in a bowl" long gone - and virtually every major town or city in the UK boasting a swingers club - what kinds of people attend and why?

Movies.title: Sahara - From Void To Rock

Almásy who later gained world-wide fame as the historical figure on whom the Hollywood movie 'The English Patient' was based on, had undertaken several expeditions to various blank spots on the Sahara's map.

Movies.title: Room for Rent
