Movies.title: The Greasy Strangler
Movies.overview: Big Ronnie and his son Big Brayden run Big Ronnie's Disco Walking Tour, the best and only disco walking tour in Los Angeles. During one tour both men take a fancy to Janet, a curvy, curly redhead who takes a shine to a disbelieving Brayden. The two begin a whirlwind courtship much to Ronnie's dismay.

Movies.title: 14 Cameras
Movies.overview: A family rents a beautiful summer home, only to discover that their oddball landlord is broadcasting the most private moments of their lives online.

Movies.title: 13 Cameras
Movies.overview: Newlyweds Ryan and Claire are thrilled to move into their new home but soon realize that their grim and salacious landlord has been spying on them.

Movies.title: American Carnage
Movies.overview: When the Governor issues an order to arrest the children of undocumented immigrants, they’re offered a chance to have their charges dropped by volunteering to provide care to the elderly. Once inside the facility, however, they discover that the Governor and the facility's supervisor have cooked up a horrifyingly depraved conspiracy that endangers the young and the old.

Movies.title: Dawning of the Dead
Movies.overview: While a virus that causes the dead to reanimate brings the world to its knees, a group of survivors must fight their way through a horde of biologically transformed undead in order to escape and help save the world.

Movies.title: The Alpha Test
Movies.overview: After suffering at the hands of its entitled suburban family masters, a robot servant finally blows its fuse and starts a violent A.I. revolution.

Movies.title: My Best Friend's Exorcism
Movies.overview: In this darkly comedic horror-thriller set in 1988, teen best friends Abby (Elsie Fisher) and Gretchen (Amiah Miller) grapple with an otherworldly demon that takes up residence in Gretchen’s body.

Movies.title: Bad Moon
Movies.overview: By day, Ted Harrison is a successful photojournalist visiting family in the Pacific Northwest. By night, he transforms into a horrific half-human.

Movies.title: Split Second
Movies.overview: In a future London where rising sea levels have submerged most of the city, a burned-out cop’s murder investigation points to a non-human culprit.

Movies.title: Chasing the Devil
Movies.overview: Patrick McCord teams up with a team of paranormal investigators to look into his sister's suicide. The team's work leads them to find an unexplainable entity, and it's out for blood. In the end only this disturbing footage survives which likely endangers the viewer, marking them as the next victim of this powerful and evil force. Be careful what you chase - you just might end up catching it.

Movies.title: Maniac Cop
Movies.overview: When a killer dressed in a police uniform begins murdering innocent people on the streets of New York City, a young cop becomes the chief suspect.

Movies.title: The Unhealer
Movies.overview: A spiritual healing gone wrong turns a relentlessly bullied teenager into a super-powered killing machine just as his tormentors do the unthinkable.

Movies.title: The Monkey's Paw
Movies.overview: Jake is given a mystical monkey's paw that grants three wishes, but things go terribly wrong when he brings his friend back from the dead.

Movies.title: Watchers
Movies.overview: A boy takes in a stray dog, later discovering that it is an ultra-intelligent runaway being stalked by a dangerous creature from the same genetic research lab.

Movies.title: Sleep Tight
Movies.overview: A doorman with a fetish for gaslighting his residents targets the building’s cheeriest tenant, determined to ruin her life by any means necessary.

Movies.title: Red Flags
Movies.overview: Christine French becomes deeply in love with a man only to discover that he may be a serial killer. She must look closer at the man she calls husband, but will what she finds destroy her white picket fence?

Movies.title: Sleepaway Camp
Movies.overview: Following the death of her family, Angela is sent to a camp for the summer. After her arrival, brutal accidents begin to kill the other campers.

Movies.title: Demon Eye
Movies.overview: In her father's countryside home, a young woman discovers an amulet that will grant her greatest wish, but in return, unlocks two deadly demons.

Movies.title: Seoul Station
Movies.overview: The animated prequel to the box office record-breaker "Train to Busan" and the latest from director Yeon Sang-ho, "Seoul Station" follows a man sleeping in a train station who becomes a catalyst for the pandemonium in downtown Seoul: a zombie apocalypse. The rapidly-spreading infection propels an authentic family drama, drawing mordant parallels to real-world social horrors.

Movies.title: Creature from Black Lake
Movies.overview: Two graduate students travel to the Louisiana swamps in the hopes of documenting a Bigfoot-like creature that is terrorizing the locals.

Movies.title: The Stuff
Movies.overview: Nobody can say what’s in a popular new dessert, but the tasty goo is causing a sensation—and having horrifying, zombie-like effects on consumers.

Movies.title: Mortuary
Movies.overview: Christie Parson suspects her father’s recent drowning was no accident but, as she gets closer to the truth, she discovers a darker secret.

Movies.title: Murder of Innocence
Movies.overview: Laurie Wasserman seemingly has everything a girl could want. Unfortunately she has a slim grasp on reality, becoming increasingly disturbed each day.

Movies.title: The Magnetic Monster
Movies.overview: A cult-favorite of the ‘50s schlock sci-fi era that takes on nuclear radiation in a realistic way as a magnetic substance threatens to destroy Earth.

Movies.title: The Stepfather
Movies.overview: After murdering his entire family, a man remarries a widow with a teenage daughter in another town and prepares to do the same thing all over again.

Movies.title: Terror by Night
Movies.overview: A Holmes lo contratan para evitar el robo de un enorme diamante durante un viaje en tren. En el trayecto, hay un asesinato y la piedra desaparece.

Movies.title: Black as Night
Movies.overview: A resourceful teenage girl driven by revenge, alongside her trusted friends, spends her summer battling vampires terrorizing her city of New Orleans. Part of the Welcome to the Blumhouse collection.

Movies.title: Waxwork
Movies.overview: Several friends are invited to a wax museum after hours, where they discover that the wax figures are alive — and ready for them to join the exhibit.

Movies.title: Deus Irae
Movies.overview: Father Javier lives a fractured existence: on one side, he assists families who claim to have witnessed miracles, and on the other he is part of a trio of excommunicated priests who hunt the possessed down to exorcize them under their own terms: with Bibles, fire and shotguns.

Movies.title: Anna
Movies.overview: After stealing a possessed doll, Jacob and Shawn are trapped and forced to do its bidding as it wants women to kill...

Movies.title: The Harvesting
Movies.overview: A young family from the city travels to Amish Country where a malevolent presence threatens to tear them apart by exposing their dark secrets.

Movies.title: The Sleep Experiment
Movies.overview: Two detectives look into a disastrous secret military experiment where five prisoners were kept awake for thirty days in a sealed gas chamber.

Movies.title: The Day
Movies.overview: In a post-apocalyptic future, a small group of survivors make a desperate, final stand against a horde of cannibals over 24 hours.

Movies.title: Evil Bong
Movies.overview: A vintage bong transports all who hit from it to Bong World, an alternate realm where deadly, exotic strippers kill stoners with pleasure.

Movies.title: Goodnight Mommy
Movies.overview: Young twin brothers vow to protect each other when their mother comes home with her face obscured by bandages, which makes them question her identity.

Movies.title: Hollows Grove
Movies.overview: A young filmmaker takes on a deadly project when he follows a ghost hunters on an investigation of an abandoned orphanage rumored to be haunted.

Movies.title: Behind the Trees
Movies.overview: Amy and her boyfriend Jay escape Los Angeles on a much-needed romantic getaway to the beautiful forests of North India. But when they stumble upon the haunting exorcism of an innocent girl and secretly bring her back to their resort, paradise is quickly turned upside down. As night falls, a horrific discovery about the child blurs the line between their reality and the local folklore of the woods.

Movies.title: Cropsey
Movies.overview: Realizing the urban legend of their youth has actually come true; two filmmakers delve into the mystery surrounding five missing children and the real-life boogeyman linked to their disappearances.

Movies.title: Swallowed
Movies.overview: Two friends must survive a night of drugs, bugs and unrequited hugs in this body horror from Carter Smith (The Ruins).

Movies.title: Nick Knight
Movies.overview: When a dead body drained of blood shows up at the museum and an ancient Mayan goblet is missing, Nick Knight knows that his former master and nemesis, Lacroix, is to blame.

Movies.title: Gehenna: Where Death Lives
Movies.overview: When developers look for a location on Saipan, they stumble into a forgotten, subterranean bunker from WWII, where an evil force lies in wait.

Movies.title: You Can't Run Forever
Movies.overview: As Eddie and Miranda drive through a remote area, they unwittingly cross paths with a disturbed sociopath, Wade whose sole mission is to sow chaos. Wade fixates on Eddie, leaving Miranda momentarily free to escape, but he quickly turns his relentless focus on her. Wade proves to be an ever-present threat, staying one step ahead and relentlessly pursuing anyone who dares to aid her.

Movies.title: Adopting Terror
Movies.overview: When the Broadbent’s adopt a baby girl, they couldn't be more thrilled. Until the child’s biological father takes violent steps to get her back.

Movies.title: Blood Monkey
Movies.overview: A renowned but mad professor leads a group of American students to Africa to investigate a tribe of killer chimpanzees rumored to be the missing link.

Movies.title: La Casa
Movies.overview: Based on a true story, a cop working in Chile during its 1980s political upheaval gets trapped in a cursed house by evil and hateful spirits at work.

Movies.title: Nekrotronic
Movies.overview: After uncovering an omen of the Antichrist’s rise, an exorcist recruits assassins to kill any of Satan's minions capable of becoming his vessel.

Movies.title: Attack of the Killer Donuts
Movies.overview: A chemical accident turns ordinary donuts into bloodthirsty killers. Now it's up to three friends to save their sleepy town.

Movies.title: Animal
Movies.overview: A vicious, bloodthirsty predator traps a group of friends (Keke Palmer, Jeremy Sumpter, Elizabeth Gillies) in an isolated cabin.

Movies.title: Love Hurts
Movies.overview: Six strangers are invited to a dinner party by a charming and enigmatic host, lured by the promise of substantial financial reward if they last the whole evening. However, all is not what it seems.

Movies.title: C.H.U.D.
Movies.overview: A photographer and his girlfriend become aware of a conspiracy involving a corrupt official and cannibalistic monsters, who dwell in NYC’s sewers.

Movies.title: Warlock
Movies.overview: A 17th century witch hunter follows an evil being into the 20th century, where a young woman assists him in the capture of the wicked entity.

Movies.title: Finders Keepers
Movies.overview: A divorced mother's life is thrown into turmoil when her daughter becomes obsessed with an evil doll left behind by their home's previous occupants.

Movies.title: Butchers Book Three: Bonesaw
Movies.overview: A sheriff finds herself in a race against time to catch a vicious killer who slaughters people for meat as he targets three women as his next victims.

Movies.title: Confine
Movies.overview: Confine, a taut psychological thriller, stars Daisy Lowe in her first lead role as the troubled former model Pippa, who hasn’t dared leave her London apartment in four years. Pippa’s refuge is violently invaded when an armed thief, Kayleigh (Eliza Bennett), breaks in and takes Pippa hostage. Alfie Allen (Game of Thrones), plays Kayleigh’s increasingly hapless partner-in-crime who soon realises he is way out of his depth.

Movies.title: Elvira: Mistress of the Dark
Movies.overview: With dreams of performing in Las Vegas, a buxom former TV hostess finds herself in trouble when she travels to a small town to claim her inheritance.

Movies.title: Galaxy of Terror
Movies.overview: Neurotic astronauts (Edward Albert, Erin Moran, Ray Walston) face a giant worm and other monsters on a distant planet.

Movies.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Movie
Movies.overview: From the makers of the cult classic TV series comes this irreverent spoof about a mad scientist who plans to take over the world by subjecting the human race to the worst movie ever made.

Movies.title: Abduction
Movies.overview: A SWAT team member with both amnesia and a kidnapped daughter works with a hitman whose wife was abducted to find the culprits behind the crimes.

Movies.title: The Amityville Playhouse
Movies.overview: After the death of her parents, a young woman inherits an old theater in the town of Amityville, where she  uncovers an ancient evil hiding within.

Movies.title: Bigfoot: Grip of the Monster
Movies.overview: Twenty years after writing about a terrifying Bigfoot encounter, a bestselling author returns to the scene of the incident in Maine’s northern woods.

Movies.title: Transylvania 6-5000
Movies.overview: Two skeptical tabloid newsmen are forced to report from Transylvania, and land in a comical world of werewolves, mummies, monsters, and vampires.

Movies.title: Willow Creek
Movies.overview: When a young couple camps out in the heart of Bigfoot country to catch the elusive beast, all that remains of the venture is their camera footage.

Movies.title: The Remains
Movies.overview: After a family moves into an old Victorian home, they discover a chest in the attic containing antiques tainted by a malevolent spirit. As the antiques slowly possess each family member, the spirit grows stronger, hellbent on kidnapping the children.

Movies.title: Blood Fest
Movies.overview: Fans flock to a festival celebrating the most iconic horror movies, only to discover that the charismatic showman behind the event has a diabolical agenda. As festival goers start dying off, three teenagers must battle through various madmen to survive.

Movies.title: Redcon-1
Movies.overview: War has evolved to saving all of mankind when a squad of special force soldiers enter a quarantine zone to rescue a scientist with a vaccine.

Movies.title: Vampires Suck
Movies.overview: An irreverent satire about a teenage girl who's torn between two supernatural suitors. Becca isn't the only high-school student having a hard time with boys; her friends are all desperate to find a date for the prom, and as the big night draws near, the rampant tension draws out the animals in everyone.

Movies.title: Repo! The Genetic Opera
Movies.overview: In 2056, an epidemic of organ failures devastates the planet and those who cannot afford their treatments are hunted by villainous Repo Men.

Movies.title: Teeth
Movies.overview: During a traumatic assault, a repressed teen finds out her vagina has protective teeth and uses this discovery as a source of empowerment and revenge.

Movies.title: Trucks
Movies.overview: It’s man against machine in this Stephen King-penned joy ride in which a small truck stop town is conquered by a mob of homicidal autonomous trucks.

Movies.title: Exorcist Vengeance
Movies.overview: A no-nonsense troubled priest takes an assignment from the Vatican to expel a killer demon from a house full of incorrigible and deadly suspects.

Movies.title: Kill Game
Movies.overview: Haunted by a prank-gone-wrong, the privileged and popular of Grace Harbor face a mysterious serial killer seeking revenge. Who's laughing now?

Movies.title: Dogman
Movies.overview: When pets begin dying, then wild animals, and human victims follow, a farm couple and a Native American trace a deadly bacteria to a strange killer.

Movies.title: The Stakelander
Movies.overview: HIs family murdered and his village destroyed by the Brotherhood, Martin retreats into the American badlands to find his former vampire hunter mentor.

Movies.title: Drawn Into the Night
Movies.overview: Un policía encubierto se hace pasar por estudiante después de que varias chicas desaparecen. Ahora ella está en una lucha por su vida.

Movies.title: Shark Attack 3: Megalodon
Movies.overview: Marine researchers discover a colossal shark tooth off the Mexican coast and realize the most menacing beast that ever ruled the ocean is still alive.

Movies.title: House of Fears
Movies.overview: A few hours of spooky fun sneaking into a haunted house become a nightmare as six friends are trapped inside with no way out -- and they aren't alone.

Movies.title: From the Dark
Movies.overview: When a young couple gets stranded on a country road, they seek shelter in an abandoned ramshackle farmhouse where a nocturnal creature awaits.

Movies.title: The Girl Who Cried Her Eyes Out
Movies.overview: When a group of friends sneak into a state park to party, a dare brings them face to face with a legendary disturbed spirit who's out for revenge.

Movies.title: While the Children Sleep
Movies.overview: When a wealthy California couple hires a new nanny, she seems too good to be true — that is, until their friends and neighbors begin dying one by one.

Movies.title: Megalodon: The Frenzy
Movies.overview: After surviving a megalodon attack, a ship's crew are once again imperiled as a frenzy of five of the giant creatures torments the open ocean.

Movies.title: The Cradle Will Fall
Movies.overview: Una fiscal investiga el suicidio de una mujer embarazada en un hospital y descubre una compleja red de engaños y un médico asesino.

Movies.title: Hellbound: Hellraiser II
Movies.overview: This brutal sequel follows Kristy, as she is brought to an institution. The facilities won't keep her safe from the return of a certain demon.

Movies.title: Unnatural
Movies.overview: A group of unsuspecting cabin dwellers get trapped in a horrifying game of cat and mouse when a genetically-modified creature escapes into the wild.

Movies.title: The Howling
Movies.overview: After a near-fatal clash with a serial killer, a newswoman retreats to a mountain resort where residents may guard the secret of a mythical monster.

Movies.title: Jeruzalem
Movies.overview: While visiting the ancient walls of the Holy City, two American young women and an anthropology student must survive a biblical apocalypse.

Movies.title: The Girl Who Got Away
Movies.overview: A killer who has ended the lives of four young girls escapes from prison to go after the fifth victim, who got away from her years earlier.

Movies.title: Cell
Movies.overview: Based on the Stephen King thriller, a graphic novelist desperately searches for his son when a cell phone signal turns ordinary people into killers.

Movies.title: Init!ation
Movies.overview: A murder during pledge week ignites a spree of sinister social media messages and a race against time to stop a killer before he strikes again.

Movies.title: What Lurks Beneath
Movies.overview: As the USS Titan crew faces World War III, a mysterious naked stowaway in a torpedo tube reveals a far greater danger beyond Russia.

Movies.title: Stake Land
Movies.overview: After the U.S.A endures a bloodsucking plague, a vampire hunter takes a Midwestern survivor of an attack on a bold quest for peace from the undead.

Movies.title: The Retreat
Movies.overview: A weekend among gay friends at an isolated woodland cabin turns into a fight to the death against a band of homophobes who hunt and torture for sport.

Movies.title: The Sword and the Sorcerer
Movies.overview: A mercenary with a three-bladed sword rediscovers the dangerous future of his royal heritage when he is recruited to help a princess save her land.

Movies.title: Ticks
Movies.overview: A group of troubled teenagers are led by social workers on a California wilderness retreat where they encounter a horde of bloodthirsty mutated ticks.

Movies.title: The Changed
Movies.overview: A group of ordinary people band together in a suburban community to battle the imposters who have replaced their families, friends and neighbors.

Movies.title: Dominion: Prequel to The Exorcist
Movies.overview: Years before Father Lankester Merrin exorcized Pazuzu from Regan MacNeil's soul, he first encounters the King of the Evil Wind Demons in East Africa.

Movies.title: Lake Mungo
Movies.overview: A family mourns the death of its 16-year-old daughter, Alice. Upon discovering her secret double life, a series of clues lead them to Lake Mungo.

Movies.title: Goodnight Mommy
Movies.overview: When twin brothers arrive home to find their mother's demeanour altered and her face covered in surgical bandages, they begin to suspect the woman beneath the gauze is not who she says she is.

Movies.title: Where the Scary Things Are
Movies.overview: In this teen horror tale, Ayla and her friends discover a human monster and use it to shoot popular viral videos—but soon Ayla uses the beast to take revenge on her enemies.

Movies.title: Saturn 3
Movies.overview: Lovers who dwell on a space station amidst Saturn’s asteroid fields are invaded by an ambitious technocrat from Earth and his giant, evil robot.

Movies.title: Amityville: The Awakening
Movies.overview: In order to save money for medical expenses, a single mother moves her three children into a notoriously haunted house, unaware of its bloody history.

Movies.title: The Wild Man of the Navidad
Movies.overview: From the creator of The Texas Chainsaw Massacre, this vintage horror tells the chilling story of a rural Texas town terrified by a mysterious beast.

Movies.title: Exeter
Movies.overview: During an all-night party at an abandoned asylum, a group of teens dabble in the occult and unleash an evil spirit that turns them against each other.

Movies.title: Candyman: Day of the Dead
Movies.overview: A distant, living relative of the terrifying urban legend known as Candyman tries to stop his string of brutal murders once and for all.

Movies.title: Death of Me
Movies.overview: The terror starts after a vacationing couple wakes up from a night they don’t remember and finds clues in a video that shows one murdering the other.

Movies.title: FearDotCom
Movies.overview: A detective and a health researcher try to solve a series of murders in which the victims all logged into a website run by an anonymous sadist.

Movies.title: Slugs
Movies.overview: A sleepy Midwestern community is terrorized by mutated slug-like creatures that crave flesh. Can these slimy monsters be stopped?

Movies.title: Bad Nun: Deadly Vows
Movies.overview: Soon after Catherine moves her family into the local converted church, a nun begins appearing at night and terrorizes them in pursuit of their souls.

Movies.title: Killer Legends
Movies.overview: Filmmakers Joshua Zeman and Rachel Mills embark on a dark journey as they investigate four of our most terrifying urban legends and the true crimes that may have inspired them.

Movies.title: Snow Falls
Movies.overview: Five teenagers head to a remote cabin to party, but a winter storm leaves them stranded, with their sanity slipping as time passes.

Movies.title: Alien Invasion
Movies.overview: A journalist and a ranger venture into a dangerous forest to track an extraterrestrial life-form in an abandoned military barrack.

Movies.title: Unhinged
Movies.overview: Four American best friends decide to take the back roads traveling to a wedding in England. On the way, things take a deadly turn.

Movies.title: The Ritual: Black Nun
Movies.overview: A pregnant British woman living an expat life in Cambodia must defeat an ancient and evil curse to save her unborn baby—or die trying.

Movies.title: Jekyll and Hyde
Movies.overview: When Dr. Henry Jekyll is accused of a gruesome murder, his close friend’s investigation leads to a shocking discovery inside the killer’s mind.

Movies.title: Curse of Crom: The Legend of Halloween
Movies.overview: When high schoolers accidentally release an ancient Irish entity into their hometown, they have until midnight on Halloween to stop it.

Movies.title: Haunt
Movies.overview: On Halloween, friends stumble upon a haunted house, leading to a deadly night, as they discover some horrors aren't mere nightmares.

Movies.title: The Descent
Movies.overview: A spelunking trip turns to horror when a cave collapse entombs a group of friends in darkness, making them prey to the flesh-eating creatures below.

Movies.title: I Spit on Your Grave
Movies.overview: After surviving a brutal rape, a woman takes the law into her own hands by seeking revenge against her attackers in this remake of the cult classic.

Movies.title: Boogeyman 2
Movies.overview: A young woman with a life-long and phobic loathing of the boogeyman checks herself into a mental health clinic in the hope of finally facing her fears.

Movies.title: The Jazz Singer
Movies.overview: A young, Jewish man defies tradition and risks everything to pursue his goal of becoming a star, falling for the one woman who believes in him.

Movies.title: Catching Faith 2: The Homecoming
Movies.overview: Everything seems to be going wrong for the Taylor family right now. Just as Alexa is starting work at her dream job, she's overwhelmed by caring for her mother suffering from Alzheimer's disease. Her son, Beau, has just lost his professional football career to an injury and her daughter, Ravyn, needs help planning her last-minute wedding. Only with the support of friends and the guiding grace of their faith can the Taylors find the strength to cope with the tidal wave of drama and tragedy that is rolling over their lives.

Movies.title: Sugarhouse
Movies.overview: Abandoned by their outlaw father, Maisie and her headstrong sister turn to their troubled brother for help-unwittingly setting off a chain of events that unearth long-buried family secrets hidden within the sugarhouse.

Movies.title: Catching Faith
Movies.overview: After a high school football star gets caught drinking, he and his family are at a crossroads in their faith. They must rely on God for guidance.

Movies.title: Alien Outpost
Movies.overview: In this pulse-pounding thriller, an elite unit of soldiers is charged with protecting a strategic outpost while under siege from an alien invasion.

Movies.title: The Neon Demon
Movies.overview: When aspiring model Jesse (Elle Fanning) moves to Los Angeles, her youth and vitality are devoured by a group of beauty-obsessed women who will use any means necessary to get what she has. From the visionary director Nicolas Winding Refn (Drive), THE NEON DEMON is a visceral, stylish and wickedly original feast for the eyes.

Movies.title: Bye Bye Barry
Movies.overview: When NFL superstar Barry Sanders vanished at the height of his career, he left the NFL world in shock. He was still in his prime, chasing the all-time NFL rushing record when he boarded a flight to England and never stepped foot on the field again. Now, 24 years later, Barry retraces his steps through the streets of London to finally confront the mystery.

Movies.title: Sitting in Bars with Cake
Movies.overview: Inspired by true events, Sitting in Bars with Cake follows two best friends in their 20s navigating life in L.A. Extrovert Corinne convinces Jane, a shy, talented baker, to commit to a year of bringing cakes to bars, to help her meet people and build confidence. But when Corinne receives a life-altering diagnosis, the pair faces a challenge unlike anything they’ve experienced before.

Movies.title: One Night in Miami...
Movies.overview: A fictional account of one night where American icons gathered to discuss their roles in the Civil Rights Movement and cultural upheaval of the 1960s.

Movies.title: Madres
Movies.overview: Expecting their first child, a Mexican-American couple move to a migrant farming community in 1970's California where strange symptoms and terrifying visions threaten their new family. Part of the Welcome to the Blumhouse collection.

Movies.title: Chemical Hearts
Movies.overview: 17-year-old Henry Page is the editor of his high school newspaper and hopes to become a successful writer one day; his secret: he has never been in love, yet he dreams of the great and romantic love story that fulfils and inspires him.

Movies.title: Maxine's Baby: The Tyler Perry Story
Movies.overview: Tyler Perry is America’s consummate multihyphenate. But underneath this entertainment behemoth is a man working humbly to heal his childhood trauma by transforming his pain into promise. Maxine’s Baby: The Tyler Perry Story, a nod to his mother’s love, is an intimate portrait of visionary Tyler Perry and his harrowing but faithful road to the top of an industry that didn’t always include him.

Movies.title: Sound of Metal
Movies.overview: Metal drummer Ruben begins to lose his hearing. When a doctor tells him his condition will worsen, he thinks his career and life is over. His girlfriend Lou checks the former addict into a rehab for the deaf hoping it will prevent a relapse and help him adapt to his new life. After being welcomed and accepted just as he is, Ruben must choose between his new normal and the life he once knew.

Movies.title: Lucy and Desi
Movies.overview: Lucille Ball and Desi Arnaz form an unlikely partnership to become one of the most prolific power couples in Hollywood.

Movies.title: Master
Movies.overview: Three women strive to find their place at an elite Northeastern university as old as the country. When anonymous racist attacks target a Black freshman - who insists she is being haunted by ghosts of the school's past - each woman must determine where the real menace lies.

Movies.title: Honey Boy
Movies.overview: When 12-year-old Otis starts to find success as a child television star in Hollywood, his ex-rodeo-clown father returns to serve as his guardian. When Otis isn't on set charming audiences, he spends his days with his father at an extended-stay motel on the edge of the city, enduring his overbearing father's abuse. HONEY BOY follows two threads of time, watching father and son's contentious rela..

Movies.title: The Vast of Night
Movies.overview: In the twilight of the 1950s, on one fateful night in New Mexico, a young switchboard operator Fay (Sierra McCormick) and charismatic radio DJ Everett (Jake Horowitz) discover a strange audio frequency that could change their small town and the future forever.

Movies.title: The Manor
Movies.overview: After suffering a mild stroke, Judith Albright reluctantly moves into a historic nursing home where she becomes convinced a supernatural force is killing the residents. Part of the Welcome to the Blumhouse collection.

Movies.title: Silver Dollar Road
Movies.overview: Silver Dollar Road follows the story of the Reels family who are valiantly attempting to protect the land their family bought one generation after slavery. This documentary, based on the 2019 ProPublica article, highlights the covert ways the legal system has been exploited to keep Black land ownership fragile and the racial wealth gap growing.

Movies.title: The Dressmaker
Movies.overview: Tilly returns to her hometown to find her mother, Mad Molly, demented. Tilly is an outsider, accused of murder and turned upon by insular locals.

Movies.title: The Report
Movies.overview: FBI agent Daniel Jones performs an exhaustive investigation into the CIA's use of torture on suspected terrorists.

Movies.title: On a Wing and a Prayer
Movies.overview: When the pilot of their private plane dies mid-flight, a man facing a crisis of faith must take the reins and save his entire family on Easter Sunday.

Movies.title: Cinderella
Movies.overview: Ambitious orphan Cinderella gets some magical help from her Fab G to realise her dreams, making a life for herself selling her signature dresses.

Movies.title: The Way Ahead
Movies.overview: A British Lieutenant strictly prepares a group of drafted recruits during World War II in advance of an upcoming North African deployment for battle.

Movies.title: The Wereth Eleven
Movies.overview: This World War II documentary honors the 1.2 million African Americans who bravely served in America's Armed Forces and fought for freedom.

Movies.title: Lancaster Skies

Movies.title: All the Queen's Horses

In 2012 after a close colleague turned whistle-blower finally uncovered her scheme and alerted the Mayor, the FBI arrested Crundwell as the largest municipal fraud perpetrator in American history. ALL THE QUEEN’S HORSES is the riveting story of how a pillar of the community could so callously execute a scam of such magnitude. The film reveals the procedures behind how she did it and got away with it for so long, how she was caught, how the city is attempting to rebuild and recover, and how if it happened in Dixon, it could happen anywhere.

Movies.overview: A mysterious Russian gunslinger aids a marshal and a sheriff in a standoff with a bloodthirsty outlaw gang that’s invaded their small East Texas town.

Movies.title: Alien Conquest
Movies.overview: Sibling astronomers, who discover that Martians are targeting the Earth, team up with the military once the aliens begin attacking New York City.

Movies.title: The Girl with All the Gifts
Movies.overview: In a bleak future, mankind has succumbed to a fungus that turns everyone into flesh-eating monsters, until an immune child is discovered.

Movies.title: Tornado Valley
Movies.overview: Two decades after her home was ravaged in a tornado, a professional storm tracker’s family is once again caught in the path of a devastating twister.

Movies.title: Last Shot
Movies.overview: A young man is released from prison with a chance to turn his life around but the streets haven't changed since he left and the same hate, regret, and fear waits for him on the other side of the wall.  It's tough to play it straight when his world is so crooked and it's hard to see who's good and who's bad when all the lines are blurred. Can he ever really be free?

Movies.title: The Eagle Has Landed
Movies.overview: A German plot to kidnap Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

Movies.title: Don't Get Caught
Movies.overview: After stealing weed from a marijuana farm, a young man races to repay the gang of hillbilly bikers who are now holding his girlfriend hostage.

Movies.title: Book of Joshua: Walls of Jericho
Movies.overview: After wandering the desert, Joshua leads Israelites to the Promised Land. Confronted by the walls of Jericho, they carry out God's improbable plan.

Movies.title: The Extraordinary Adventures of Adèle Blanc-Sec
Movies.overview: A popular novelist in 1912 must deal with a prehistoric monster roaming the streets of Paris. Will she be the one to discover its secret?

Movies.title: Inferno
Movies.overview: A series of suspicious fires set throughout town pit Fire Chief Darcy Hamilton against a range of suspects and a self-serving, money-driven mayor.

Movies.title: Trading Paint
Movies.overview: When their winning streak begins to fail, legendary driver Sam Munroe and his son Cam have a falling out. A rival racing giant takes advantage of this rift and offers Cam a lucrative opportunity. Engines rev and sparks fly as the two are set against each other in an ultimate high stakes race and the most dangerous competition of all.

Movies.title: David and Goliath
Movies.overview: Loosely based on the biblical tale comes this story of a simple shepherd, who transforms into a powerful warrior and takes on a terrifying giant.

Movies.title: 6 Ways to Die
Movies.overview: A man of mystery hires six criminals to help him take revenge on a drug kingpin and make him suffer in all the ways he did at his target’s hands.

Movies.title: Kill Command
Movies.overview: In a dystopian future, an elite army crew heads to a remote island for routine training, but finds that deadly robots have other plans in mind.

Movies.title: Blue Hill Avenue
Movies.overview: Invited into a dangerous world of crime by a local kingpin, a group of friends in 1980s Boston become a formidable crew—with deadly consequences.

Movies.title: The Wraith
Movies.overview: A mysterious black turbo racing car appears and challenges a murderous gang leader to a series of races. The driver's identity may surprise everyone.

Movies.title: Unstoppable
Movies.overview: Dean (Wesley Snipes), a former special ops soldier, is mistakenly identified as a CIA agent and is kidnapped and injected with a mind-controlling drug, making him susceptible to the power of suggestion. Dean escapes and goes in search for the antidote, but first he must fight off his foes, his inner demons and the illusions of his drug-induced state or he'll die by the end of the day.

Movies.title: Skin in the Game
Movies.overview: The horrific abduction of a 15-year-old into sex trafficking sends her mother and a former prostitute out to the streets to find her at all costs.

Movies.title: Child of Satan
Movies.overview: The premature birth of a woman's son gives way to strange and gruesome occurrences, which leads a priest to investigate the supernatural events.

Movies.title: The Conversation
Movies.overview: This Oscar®-nominated classic directed by Francis Ford Coppola and starring Gene Hackman is an enthralling character study inspired by Antonioni’s Blow-Up. Embodying the Cold War era of paranoia with formal and political rigor, The Conversation deservingly won the Palme d’Or in 1974.

Movies.title: Skyline
Movies.overview: A trip to Los Angeles with his girlfriend to visit his old friend and his wife turns into a fight for Jarrod and company against alien invaders.

Movies.title: Dragon Fury: Wrath Of Fire
Movies.overview: After Vanessa went into hiding, researchers find her and convince her to return to the mountains—and this time, the dragons are deadlier than ever.

Movies.title: The Warrant
Movies.overview: In the shadow of the Civil War, two former Union Army comrades with very different motivations for serving, wind up on opposite ends of the law.

Movies.title: Jungle Run
Movies.overview: A search for their missing father turns deadly when sibling adventurers find themselves viciously attacked by jungle animals. But as they fight back against the relentless onslaught they start to realize something much more sinister may be behind the attacks.

Movies.title: Caged No More
Movies.overview: Based on actual events, a grandmother joins her son and an ex-military grandson to free her two granddaughters sold into sex slavery by their father.

Movies.title: They Reach
Movies.overview: Set in 1979, this is the story of a 13-year-old girl who accidentally opens her town up to a demonic spirit from a possessed reel-to-reel player.

Movies.title: Croc!
Movies.overview: A family of bloodthirsty crocodiles awakens in a lake near a wedding. Now, the guests must survive the night against the vicious beasts.

Movies.title: Above the Best
Movies.overview: This fascinating doc examines the role of Army Aviators, who protect soldiers on the ground and face intense danger in the midst of war.

Movies.title: Elimination Game
Movies.overview: In the wake of a civilian massacre, a disgraced Navy SEAL has a choice: risk his life to win his freedom or rot in a maximum security prison.

Movies.title: The Dirty South
Movies.overview: When a ruthless, big shot goes after the deed to her family's bar, Sue turns to a criminal to help her raise the money to save it.

Movies.title: Lost in Africa
Movies.overview: Two young lovers, lost in the African wilderness, are rescued by an elephant, yet face mortal dangers from wildlife and a tribe of enraged warriors.

Movies.title: American Justice
Movies.overview: When the actions of a rogues LAPD police officer get his partner killed in a hostage standoff, he goes to Mexico to battle a group of crooked cops.

Movies.title: Murder: By Reason of Insanity
Movies.overview: When a married Polish couple moves to the US, the husband’s business fails, his wife’s career takes off, and hard adjustments drive him to the edge.

Movies.title: Shark Waters
Movies.overview: Great white sharks attack a fishing charter, and those aboard are forced to fight for their lives before they are either drowned or eaten alive.

Movies.title: Black Warrant
Movies.overview: A semi-retired special ops assassin and a DEA agent cross paths on separate missions to stop a cyber terrorist organization that has built a dangerous machine threatening to attack the power grid and bring catastrophe to the world. Starring Cam Gigandet (The Magnificent Seven), Tom Berenger (Inception) and Jeff Fahey (Lost) in this gritty, action-packed thriller.

Movies.title: The Icebreaker
Movies.overview: Después de intentar evitar un iceberg gigante, un barco rompehielos y su tripulación quedan atrapados durante 133 días en un frío helado.

Movies.title: Raw Deal
Movies.overview: FBI chief Harry Shannon sends former FBI agent, now small-town sheriff Mark Kaminski (Schwarzenegger) to destroy a criminal organisation from within.

Movies.title: Wilderness
Movies.overview: The worst of a juvenile facility get dropped into the deep woods for 7 days of team building, but a killer and his dogs murder them one by one.

Movies.title: River Runs Red
Movies.overview: When cops gun down his only son in cold blood, a judge renounces the legal system and switches his gavel for a gun, dishing out revenge, not justice.

Movies.title: Hunt to Kill
Movies.overview: A border patrol agent who retires to the mountains after his partner’s death snaps back into action when fugitives take him and his daughter hostage.

Movies.title: Life on the Line
Movies.overview: With a huge storm barreling down on their hometown, a team of brave linemen risk it all to make sure essential services stay online.

Movies.title: First Shift
Movies.overview: Veteran New York Police Department officer Mike and rookie Angela face a high-stakes day on New York's most challenging streets. They plunge into a whirlwind of danger and action, encountering unexpected threats and adrenaline-charged pursuits. As they navigate these perilous situations, intense challenges help forge unbreakable bonds between them.

Movies.title: Erased
Movies.overview: An ex-CIA operative and his estranged daughter are forced to flee when his employer erases all trace of their identities and orders them killed.

Movies.title: Abigail
Movies.overview: A magical steampunk adventure filled with sorcery and mythical creatures that follows Abby on her quest to uncover the truth about her father's disappearance.

Movies.title: Army of One
Movies.overview: Después de que traficantes de drogas matan a su esposo en una ruta de senderismo, una mujer soldado se propone vengarse del cartel responsable.

Movies.title: Murder on Pleasant Drive
Movies.overview: The true story of killer John Smith, his disappearing wives and the perseverance of his second wife's family who finally managed to break the case.

Movies.title: Final Kill
Movies.overview: A mercenary embarks on an action-packed thrill ride when he is hired to protect a couple hiding out in Central America from a ruthless crime family.

Movies.title: Buckskin

Movies.title: Mortal

Based on ancient Norse Mythology, a young boy must discover the origins of his extraordinary powers before he is captured by authorities hell-bent on condemning him for an accidental murder. A breath-taking and thrilling origins adventure story.

Movies.title: The Prototype
Movies.overview: An agent is subjected to alien experimentation and wakes up 300 years into the future. With Earth now destroyed, he is the only hope for mankind.

Movies.title: Jane Got a Gun
Movies.overview: The Old West is no peaceful place for a woman who joins forces with her ex-lover to keep a violent gang from killing her outlaw husband.

Movies.title: Guns & Moses

Movies.title: The Three Musketeers
Movies.overview: The hot-headed young D'Artagnan along with three former legendary but now down on their luck Musketeers must unite and defeat a beautiful double agent and her villainous employer from seizing the French throne and engulfing Europe in war.

Movies.title: The Trial of the Incredible Hulk
Movies.overview: Superheroes The Incredible Hulk and Daredevil in an explosive adventure!

Movies.title: Wire Room
Movies.overview: Homeland Security agents battle gunmen at a command center.

Movies.title: Thor: God of Thunder
Movies.overview: When Loki escapes Asgard with a plot to control the universe, Thor follows him to Earth to wage an epic battle as the two worlds hang in the balance.

Movies.title: County Line
Movies.overview: When his brother in blue is gunned down, a retired sheriff investigates the murder and finds himself ensnared in a deadly web of corruption.

Movies.title: Rapid Action
Movies.overview: Blaming himself for his wife’s death, Gao leaves the security industry until his old boss returns six years later and forces him back into the fold.

Movies.title: The Homesman
Movies.overview: On the Midwest frontier, an independent spinster and a grifter she saved from hanging transport three mentally ill women on a dangerous journey.

Movies.title: Kon-Tiki
Movies.overview: Despite a fear of water and inability to swim, a Norwegian explorer and his crew embarked on an epic journey across the Pacific on a balsa wood raft.

Movies.title: Invasion
Movies.overview: After an encounter with an alien craft, a young woman begins to acquire superpowers that put a target on her back by extraterrestrials and humans.

Movies.title: Detective Knight: Independence
Movies.overview: Bruce Willis is Detective James Knight in the trilogy's final chapter. A vigilante hits close to Knight's home when he threatens to blow up the city's Fourth of July festivities.

Movies.title: Viking
Movies.overview: In the 10th century, after the death of his father, a viking prince is forced into exile, and must escape the grasp of his dangerous brother.

Movies.title: The Roundup 2
Movies.overview: Two South Korean detectives sent to Vietnam to extradite a suspect wind up uncovering a series of connected murders and crimes against tourists.

Movies.title: Savaged
Movies.overview: While traveling across the country, beautiful young Zoe (newcomer Amanda Adrienne) stumbles on a horrific crime. A gang of rednecks are slaughtering two boys, and Zoe's brave attempt to save one seals her gruesome fate alongside theirs.

Movies.title: The Last Legion
Movies.overview: As the Roman Empire collapses, Romulus Agustus must leave the city and set out on a dangerous journey to locate his last legion of supporters.

Movies.title: Ravage
Movies.overview: Alone in the woods, a nature photographer who witnesses a murder is captured by the culprits and must use her survivalist skills to make it out alive.

Movies.title: Blue Ridge
Movies.overview: When a murder shocks a small town, an old feud reignites and a new sheriff must solve the crime before the locals take the law into their own hands.

Movies.title: Lost Girls & Love Hotels
Movies.overview: Searching for meaning, an American English teacher at a Japanese flight attendant school explores love and lust with a dashing gangster in Tokyo.

Movies.title: State Property: Blood on the Streets
Movies.overview: Three criminal enterprises, all of which compete for turf and cash, wage bloody battles against each other on the hard streets of Philadelphia.

Movies.title: Dominique
Movies.overview: Dominique; a well-trained assassin; flees from her troubled past in an attempt to begin a new life in South America. However; she soon finds herself in a town plagued with violence and corruption. Facing brutal attacks from the police and mafia; Dominique must decide whether to protect herself or an innocent family that has taken her in.

Movies.title: Falcon Rising
Movies.overview: After his sister is attacked by gangsters in Brazil, a dangerous man cuts through thugs and crooks, leaving chaos in his path as he seeks revenge.

Movies.title: Grand Larceny
Movies.overview: A young woman discovers after her father's death that his immense wealth resulted from his unusual occupation as a master cat burglar.

Movies.title: Flight Crew
Movies.overview: During an international flight, an air crew receives a distress message from a volcanic island and makes a risky decision to attempt a rescue mission.

Movies.title: Detective Knight: Rogue
Movies.overview: Bruce Willis is Detective James Knight in this first film of a trilogy. Chasing bandits from L.A. to New York, Knight crashes into his dark past, imperiling his case…and his life.

Movies.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
Movies.overview: In the waning days of World War II; the Navy warship USS Indianapolis secretly delivered one of two atomic bombs that would eventually end the war. The Japanese attacked and sank the heavy cruiser. The USS Indianapolis' mission was so classified it was not reported missing; and no one knew the ship had been attacked until four days later. Of the 1197 crewmembers; nearly 300 went down with the s...

Movies.title: Vengeance
Movies.overview: When his daughter is attacked and the police hesitate to act, an outlaw returns to a London he no longer recognizes to deal with the culprits himself.

Movies.title: Toxic Skies
Movies.overview: A brilliant doctor with the World Health Organization uncovers the real cause behind an epidemic: the U.S. government's secret chemtrail program.

Movies.title: Rising Fear
Movies.overview: When an ex-Marine is linked to a bombing, he must stay one step ahead of the feds and terrorists to save the nation from a far greater catastrophe.

Movies.title: Last Knights
Movies.overview: Set in a nameless feudal society, Commander Raiden (Clive Owen) and his band of warriors wage battle against the corrupt ruler Geza Mott to avenge the unjust death of their honourable leader Lord Bartok (Morgan Freeman).

Movies.title: Sands of Oblivion
Movies.overview: An archaeologist couple and an Iraq War veteran discover that secrets can't stay buried forever after unearthing a 1923 replica of ancient Egypt.

Movies.title: Lionheart
Movies.overview: After his brother's murder, a tough soldier goes AWOL and enters the underground world of bare-knuckle fighting to support his widowed sister-in-law.

Movies.title: Out of Control
Movies.overview: After their seaplane crash-lands on a deserted isle, eight teenagers are forced to fight for their lives against a gang of murderous drug smugglers.

Movies.title: Daughter of the Wolf
Movies.overview: After her son gets kidnapped, an ex-military specialist, instead of seeking help, captures one of the kidnappers and uses him to track down her son.

Movies.title: Long Gone Heroes
Movies.overview: Gunner, a special forces soldier who has witnessed the darkest side of country and combat, is forced back into the field of battle to save his niece, who is being held in South America. As the fight intensifies, Gunner and his team discover that her disappearance is part of a corrupt private operation that hits way too close to home.

Movies.title: A Most Wanted Man
Movies.overview: When a mysterious immigrant arrives in Hamburg, he attracts the attention of U.S. and German intelligence, kicking off a race to uncover the truth.

Movies.title: Escape from New York
Movies.overview: John Carpenter’s cult classic epic plunges his muse Kurt Russell into an expressionist New York seemingly stuck in eternal night. The iconic presences of Lee Van Cleef and Ernest Borgnine, combined with peerless widescreen camerawork, shape this into a neo-western with an anti-authoritarian edge.

Movies.title: Tekken
Movies.overview: In 2039, when territories are run by corporations, a warrior rises from the streets to avenge his mother's death by entering a fighting competition.

Movies.title: Bullet Head
Movies.overview: Three career criminals find themselves trapped in a warehouse with the law closing in and an even worse threat waiting inside for them.

Movies.title: The Contract
Movies.overview: On a hike to reconnect with his son, a man encounters a deadly scenario with hired assassins and ex-military mercenaries led by a mysterious figure.

Movies.title: Thirteen Lives
Movies.overview: In the true story of Thirteen Lives, twelve boys and the coach of a Thai soccer team explore the Tham Luang cave when an unexpected rainstorm traps them in a chamber inside the mountain. Entombed behind a maze of flooded cave tunnels, they face impossible odds. A team of world-class divers navigate through miles of dangerous cave networks to discover that finding the boys is only the beginning.

Movies.title: Legal Action
Movies.overview: A lawyer uncovers big corruption in a small town, when he defends his shady former brother-in-law, who has been accused of murdering a local DA.

Movies.title: Kickboxer
Movies.overview: After a kickboxing champ is paralyzed battling Thailand’s top fighter, his brother vows vengeance but must first train in Muay Thai to fight back.

Movies.title: Ballerina Assassin
Movies.overview: A female assassin takes ballet for a mission. After her organization is betrayed and killed, she infiltrates the ballet world to find the mole and defeat the syndicate hunting her.

Movies.title: In the Blood
Movies.overview: A vigilante bride must outwit and outfight a foreign underworld to uncover the secrets behind her husband's disappearance in this dynamic thriller.

Movies.title: Escape Plan 2: Hades
Movies.overview: Second instalment of the franchise - Sylvester Stallone stars. Security man Ray Breslin is back. Years after escaping prison, can his top-notch gang help when his mate disappears?

Movies.title: Occupation
Movies.overview: When alien invaders threaten mankind, a group of random townspeople must band together and fight back against the vicious extraterrestrials.

Movies.title: Miami Heat
Movies.overview: After his daughter gets kidnapped days before Christmas, an ex-Russian agent must abandon his quiet life in Miami and go back into killing mode.

Movies.title: I Am Wrath
Movies.overview: John Travolta unloads a barrage of blistering action as a former Black Ops agent seeking vengeance for his wife’s murder.

Movies.title: The Lost City of Z
Movies.overview: The Lost City of Z tells the incredible true story of British explorer Percy Fawcett, who journeys into the Amazon at the dawn of the 20th century and discovers evidence of a previously unknown, advanced civilization that may have once inhabited the region.

Movies.title: The Blackout
Movies.overview: When an unexplained phenomenon wipes out most life on Earth, a military crew finds an outpost of survivors in a small section of Eastern Europe.

Movies.title: Red Ghost
Movies.overview: A band of Soviet soldiers fight against a small army of Nazis with the help of a specter-like, sharp-shooting killing machine known as The Red Ghost.

Movies.title: Escape Plan: The Extractors
Movies.overview: The final instalment of the unstoppable franchise sees legend Sylvester Stallone kick this explosive action into high gear. Security expert Ray Breslin is hired to rescue the kidnapped daughter of a Hong Kong tech mogul, but his girlfriend is also captured. Now he and his team - Trent DeRosa (Dave Bautista) and Hush (Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson), must pull off a deadly rescue mission.

Movies.title: Dragged Across Concrete
Movies.overview: HD. After being suspended without pay for using excessive force, two rogue cops hatch a scheme to rip off a drug dealer.

Movies.title: A Vigilante
Movies.overview: Olivia Wilde gives a captivating performance in what critics are hailing the most important film of the year. A once abused woman, Sadie (Olivia Wilde: Life Itself), devotes herself to ridding victims of their domestic abusers. Co-starring C.J. Wilson (The Sinner) and Morgan Spector (Homeland) this is a compelling, gritty and highly enthralling revenge thriller with a powerful message.

Movies.title: Above Suspicion
Movies.overview: A newly married FBI agent is drawn into a career-ending scandal when he engages in an illicit affair with his key informant in a high-profile case.

Movies.title: Fire with Fire
Movies.overview: Raised to be tough by her Black Panther father, Jasmine and her friends come face-to-face with white supremacists during a getaway at a lakeside farm.

Movies.title: The Bounty Men
Movies.overview: Retired militia man Daniel King rides into a deserted Texas town, tracking his latest bounty: a powerful war criminal named John Dooling.

Movies.title: Reprisal
Movies.overview: After surviving a brutal armed robbery, a Cincinnati father (Frank Grillo) teams up with his ex-cop neighbor (Bruce Willis) to track down the ruthless killer and avenge the assault.

Movies.title: Haywire
Movies.overview: A black ops super soldier seeks payback after she is betrayed and set up during a mission.

Movies.title: One Ranger
Movies.overview: Recruited by British intelligence, a Texas Ranger must track down and stop a dangerous terrorist from attacking London.

Movies.title: 13 Minutes
Movies.overview: As a tornado hits their town of Minninnewah, Oklahoma, four families find themselves tested, forcing paths to cross and redefining survival.

Movies.title: Next Stop Murder
Movies.overview: Strangers on a bus become partners in crime when Molly's fellow passenger kills the person making her life miserable, and wants the favor returned.

Movies.title: Outback
Movies.overview: Tells the terrifying tale of a young couple that makes a wrong turn in the Australian wilderness and quickly find themselves fighting for survival.

Movies.title: Thirst
Movies.overview: Troubled teens on a camping trip find themselves fighting for survival against a chameleon-like alien that literally sucks the life out of victims.

Movies.title: The Last Stand
Movies.overview: After leaving his LAPD narcotics post following a bungled operation, Sheriff Ray Owens (Arnold Schwarzenegger) moves to a sleepy border town filled with characters like local gun enthusiast Lewis Dinkum (Johnny Knoxville). But that peaceful existence is shattered when the most wanted drug kingpin in the western hemisphere makes a deadly escape from an FBI prisoner convoy. Headed straight for Owen’s border town, the Sheriff is at first reluctant to become involved. But when U.S. law enforcement counts him out he ultimately rallies his team and takes matters into his own hands, setting the stage for a classic showdown.

Movies.title: The Ninth Gate
Movies.overview: A rare book dealer hired to authenticate a legendary 17th-century manuscript capable of summoning the Devil finds himself shadowed by a violent cult.

Movies.title: Jungle
Movies.overview: A group of adventurers follow a mysterious guide into the Bolivian jungle. But surviving the wild and their own darker elements proves treacherous.

Movies.title: Braven
Movies.overview: A quiet weekend turns into a battle for survival when a logger and his family run into drug traffickers who’ve hidden cocaine in their hunting cabin.

Movies.title: Samaritan
Movies.overview: A young boy embarks on a journey to find out if the mythic hero who disappeared from his neighborhood two decades ago still lives.

Movies.title: Dragon Soldiers
Movies.overview: In this intense thriller, a town hires a squad of mercenaries to fight off a massive, fire-breathing dragon that has been terrorizing them.

Movies.title: Good People
Movies.overview: Tom and Anna (James Franco and Kate Hudson) fall into debt while renovating Anna's family home in London. As the couple faces the loss of their dream of having a house and starting a family, they discover that the tenant in the apartment below them has been murdered, leaving behind $400,000. Initially hesitant, they plan to take the money and use only what's necessary to get them out of debt.

Movies.title: Alien: Rubicon
Movies.overview: After an alien spacecraft devastates New York and heads for D.C., scientists and the military race to stop the destruction of the rest of the planet.

Movies.title: Fire with Fire
Movies.overview: A fireman takes an unexpected course of action when a man whom he's been ordered to testify against after being held up at a local convenience store, threatens him.

Movies.title: Olympus Has Fallen
Movies.overview: When terrorists seize control of the White House and take the President hostage, a disgraced Secret Service agent becomes his best hope for survival.
